subject: It's clear why they are attacking vote-by-mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
@JeffMerkley: Why does Trump want to ban Vote by Mail? Because it blocks Election Day interference: closing polling places, long lines, voter suppression. Vote by Mail is the best tool we have to put power where it belongs—in the hands of the people. I'll fight like hell to protect it.| | |
---
Donald Trump can't help himself, Team. He keeps openly talking about how every election-related move he makes is to benefit his party and to silence any dissent. That's why we have to fight for our fundamental right to vote. **[If you're with us, we need you to RUSH $25 or more right now to defend ballot access and increase voter participation across the country>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116472969/573536100/-1725532854?refcode=100225_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1MGIwZDE2LWVjOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vhde0q7-IcSP6zTJPJH3pSgtvdYjSUJeNNboeRSjtUE=)**

This is the whole reason behind President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order. After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular _._ He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day. **It's worth noting that Trump himself has used mail-in ballots to vote** , most recently in an election in his now-home state of Florida.This isn't about safety or security. **It's a blatantly partisan exercise to suppress the vote and make it harder for you to have your voice heard in our elections.** It's about their anti-democratic authoritarian desires and need for total control. **[Team, we're fighting every day to protect vote-by-mail and increase participation in our elections. Help us protect our fundamental right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116472980/573536168/-1725532854?refcode=100225_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1MGIwZDE2LWVjOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vhde0q7-IcSP6zTJPJH3pSgtvdYjSUJeNNboeRSjtUE=)**

| | We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, **making it easier for voters to participate in our elections**. Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. **Mail-in voting has been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.** There's no good faith reason to get rid of it. **[Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to fight their unending desire for control and protect mail-in voting?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116473006/573536229/-1725532854?refcode=100225_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1MGIwZDE2LWVjOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vhde0q7-IcSP6zTJPJH3pSgtvdYjSUJeNNboeRSjtUE=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1MGIwZDE2LWVjOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vhde0q7-IcSP6zTJPJH3pSgtvdYjSUJeNNboeRSjtUE=)[ >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116473010/573536232/-1725532854?refcode=100225_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1MGIwZDE2LWVjOWYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vhde0q7-IcSP6zTJPJH3pSgtvdYjSUJeNNboeRSjtUE=)**

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. subject: How Texas’ GOP power-grab affects my California district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
This is not the California I know
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116473247/573540966/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJhOTg1My1lZDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUS4m5i2H1ZLJIRXF9JYIhPH0HEsnBJfHSA7CWzlZPo=)
Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia.
Right now, California Democrats are working on a new congressional map to help counter the Republicans’ outrageous power grab in Texas.
**My new district will include communities that MAGA is trying to take over — like Huntington Beach.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116473248/573540980/789508428?refcode=251002_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJhOTg1My1lZDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUS4m5i2H1ZLJIRXF9JYIhPH0HEsnBJfHSA7CWzlZPo=)**
Look, I will proudly represent all parts of my district, but adding “California’s MAGA stronghold” means my reelection campaign just got harder.
**[That’s why I’m asking for your support to help ensure I’m prepared to win reelection and continue fighting for our hopeful, progressive future on behalf of all Californians. Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116473249/573541008/789508428?refcode=251002_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJhOTg1My1lZDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUS4m5i2H1ZLJIRXF9JYIhPH0HEsnBJfHSA7CWzlZPo=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116473250/573541032/-309737922?refcode=251002_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJhOTg1My1lZDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUS4m5i2H1ZLJIRXF9JYIhPH0HEsnBJfHSA7CWzlZPo=)
Right now, MAGA leaders in California are pushing divisive culture-war issues — from banning Pride flags from city property, to imposing voter ID requirements, to targeting curriculum and library books for review.
**Let me be clear: That’s not who we are. And it’s not the California I want to defend.**
But at the same time, California is poised to adopt new congressional maps in an effort to ensure fairer representation, which means that many districts, including mine, will look different.
**Because of those changes, every vote, every volunteer, every dollar counts more than ever. We must make sure that under the new maps, our community doesn’t get diluted, our values don’t get silenced, and our progress doesn’t get erased.**
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today so I can run a campaign that meets this moment. Can I count on you when it matters most?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116473251/573541040/789508428?refcode=251002_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJhOTg1My1lZDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUS4m5i2H1ZLJIRXF9JYIhPH0HEsnBJfHSA7CWzlZPo=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116473252/573541046/-309737922?refcode=251002_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJhOTg1My1lZDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUS4m5i2H1ZLJIRXF9JYIhPH0HEsnBJfHSA7CWzlZPo=)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116473253/573541051/-309737922?refcode=251002_RG_ca-maga-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJhOTg1My1lZDlmLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUS4m5i2H1ZLJIRXF9JYIhPH0HEsnBJfHSA7CWzlZPo=)

name: Ami Bera
subject: your support means the world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

I wanted to personally thank you — **because of your support, we reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!**

In a political environment where outside spending and misinformation are more prevalent than ever, hitting this milestone means we’re ready to stand strong heading into the next phase of the campaign. **Your contribution helps ensure that we can keep fighting for the values we share: protecting reproductive rights, strengthening our democracy, defending Social Security and Medicare, and expanding access to affordable healthcare.**

Thanks to supporters like you, we’re building a movement that reflects the diverse voices and priorities of our region.

I’ve spent my career working to find common ground and deliver real results for our community. And with you on our team, I’m more confident than ever that we can continue moving this country forward.

There’s still a lot of work to do, but this win reminds me that we’re in this together. Thank you again for standing with me.

With gratitude,

Ami Bera
---

name: Tobias Read
subject: “Like living in hell”: President Trump says Portland will be next city to see National Guard on streets
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251002em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251002em-portland-pet-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
After weeks of attacking our state, President Trump ordered troops to Portland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251002em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251002em-portland-pet-rs]
In the weeks leading up to this decision, he has stood in the Oval Office and called Portland “like living in hell.” He has even attacked our neighbors as “paid terrorists.”
The Portland I know is a beautiful, vibrant, and resilient city. It’s a place where families build their futures, where communities come together, and where people stand up for justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251002em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251002em-portland-pet-rs]
Like many other major cities across the country, Portland has faced its share of challenges. Denying this doesn’t help move Portland and Oregon forward.
At the same time, Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing.
Let me be clear: we do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon. And his threats have nothing to do with protecting Oregonians. We do not need fear-mongering from Washington. What we need is support for our communities, respect for our rights, and pride in all that makes Portland strong.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me: Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject President Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
Oregon will always rise to meet the moment. And no matter what threats come from Washington, we will stand together, protect our communities, and defend our state’s values.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251002em-portland-pet-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

### **[Want more fearless conversations about faith, politics, and power--like this one with Christopher Hale and Mike Madrid? Become a paid subscriber to support Endless Urgency 👇](https://substack.com/redirect/48b84860-e922-45c1-8a90-e7b1ab08aecb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/48b84860-e922-45c1-8a90-e7b1ab08aecb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
I sat down with Christopher Hale and Mike Madrid to unpack the explosive backlash Pope Leo is facing from MAGA influencers--and what it means for the future of the Catholic Church and our democracy. If you're interested in the intersection of faith and politics right now, this is a must-watch.
* **[00:01:10]** Christopher Hale breaks down Pope Leo's viral remarks on what it really means to be pro-life--and the furious right-wing backlash that followed.
* **[00:04:42]** Mike Madrid exposes the coordinated MAGA campaign to hijack the Catholic Church, and why Pope Leo's resistance matters.
* **[00:07:03]** We talk about the Conclave's message to America and why Pope Leo may be the global leader we need in this moment.
* **[00:16:15]** Christopher teases a powerful new papal letter focused on care for the poor--and how the right is already losing its mind over it.
* **[00:26:31]** Mike draws bold historical parallels to past papal leadership in the face of authoritarianism--and why this fight is just beginning.

If you're a Democrat, a Catholic, or just someone trying to live with integrity in a chaotic world, you don't want to miss this conversation. It's not just about politics or religion--it's about reclaiming moral clarity, protecting human dignity, and resisting the forces that want to divide and dominate.
**[Become a paid subscriber to Endless Urgency to keep these conversations going. This community only grows with your support.](https://substack.com/redirect/48b84860-e922-45c1-8a90-e7b1ab08aecb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Matthew Davis, LCV
subject: [TAKE ACTION] 🚨 Tell Congress to end the Republican Shutdown!
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMwMDk3MzYS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjMyMDAzNjc2OQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
TELL YOUR REPRESENTATIVES:

END the Republican shutdown!

Republicans have folded under pressure from Trump and shut down the federal governmentinstead of working with Democrats to reach a deal. The move will halt
environmental protection while driving up costs on everything from electricity
to healthcare. Enough is enough.

Contact your representatives in Congress now. Demand a deal that serves the American people, not Trump’s extreme agenda >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/dmyWFLKE-wh- SEND YOUR MESSAGE >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_ Peter — you’ve seen the news — Republicans have shut down the federal
government. The effects will be widespread. The EPA has now HALTED its oversight duties, freezing reviews of air and water
safeguards and ending inspections that ensure clean water in communities all
over the country. Communities everywhere could be exposed to contaminated water
with no way to know until it’s too late. Trump is threatening “mass firings”, which could endanger millions of Americans
in the middle of hurricane and fire season. At the same time, Republicans are pushing a deal that would cause health care
costs to soar as Americans face unchecked pollution. We can’t allow this to stand.Congress needs to hear from real people all over the country to demand
Republicans STOP the harmful gutting of essential services that protect our
natural resources, cherished public lands, and make life easier for everyday
people. Will you send an urgent message to representatives in Congress in support of a deal that makes sense for ALL OF US, lowers costs for families, and reopens the federal government? https://links.messages.lcv. TAKE ACTION NOW https://links.messages.lcv. This shutdown isn’t an accident — it’s part of a larger pattern.For months, President Trump and Republicans have been working to dismantle the
government: firing federal workers, cutting clean air and water protections, and
removing funding from clean energy programs — all while threatening Americans’
healthcare. No matter who we are or how we make a living, we all want fairness, stability,
and a healthy future for the next generation. Today, that’s at risk. Lawmakers
need to hear from all of us: we need a bipartisan bill to fund the government,
end this theft, and protect communities and families under attack. Please, contact your members of Congress to demand a bill to FUND THE GOVERNMENT, protect communities, and lower costs for the American people. https://links.messages.lcv. Until that happens, we need everyone who cares about our environment to flood
every member of Congress’s inbox with messages urging them to strike a deal that
makes sense for families, communities, and our planet. In solidarity, Matthew Davis
Vice President of Federal Policy
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13009736&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMyMDAzNjc2OQS2&spReportId=MjMyMDAzNjc2OQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13009736&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMyMDAzNjc2OQS2&spReportId=MjMyMDAzNjc2OQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/gryxf4~

name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: Peter, this is my final email to you before time runs out.

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

It’s another Trump and MAGA shutdown and it’s not just politics. It’s a direct attack on people with disabilities.

* Disabled workers and caregivers lose pay and sink deeper into poverty

_All so Republicans can rip healthcare away from 15 million Americans._

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Semper Fi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1evaf0980is1u8velhugv1vm88jrk3nqu0honf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor6cdh2bs) Semper Fi. Always faithful. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za1fl59djjtef6s0amlgpg73551k94seq77249vo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor6cdh2bs) And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages: -I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry. I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children. Not on my watch. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages: -I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry. I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The left is creating a generation of confused and fearful children
body:
If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | |
---
| | Fellow conservative,I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library!Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian.She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3oev0shnl6n9ktjm0hp3qlqpqb6knrt95fgl0m0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zavihnc9ome2sd71ag3n7q2554tpbcci5ljm5of0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuveo1f0bg8ilhf9gp2nr4gme50v076hml8ranj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6hiahlkg3c5v0uu2o7uuivpl1fau14pc26m1kn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zavlld78hgbrpqp05fef76knnv9e4q0uiqh41b4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4qqb9ef0nud528lvejk53mh75tg1r4ecpmd3sh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm916p9n6hmnjh26r7uvg5rpu016p82cauop3gqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z99oiilcops6pv8dv2r1ebeggup0a5p5jug9apvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpsc9q986mumdgis6saoj9m460ebdu2jf33r6mrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z93ccjelgg8vc35t6pkoo1a9agahnqmq20bfbm68_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs)_**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkvv0aojn8ui1et37t6vjpcjg2mo6695fn3hgsm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5geaor2c9h2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---

---
**Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 ****

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0bb18880svisgtohvaggntehoicqur0tnl4bptg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb2cth2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7mre9smf47roe88kb78gkk7fn2b5t9sem3o71qo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb2cth2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zem3ue11t7ooth8jq6qf6j3v35hor84qvmds93q8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb2cth2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt0lklvfihg6n9hp71qp2a56fvcu8dr2elpbuh18_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb2cth2bs)_**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zadvivbm450ke0gc5e76bgfhaibafiiulugav6bo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb2cth2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: A race the Left doesn’t want you to notice
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat Tim Walz

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu8srm4vsef3e32atdhgc7fcou6o025p4uc8l3co_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a _Conservative outsider_ running for governor of Minnesota to **defeat Tim Walz.** His far-left leadership and failed policies have hurt families here and serve as a dangerous model for the rest of the country.
Before I share my story, I need to ask: **_[Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help me take him on and protect our values?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgm2ft1tv41cc9or0586n3m2stos1m5pcptsr9kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs) _**

---
[CHIP IN NOW →](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi12qt4t8blj5021nag7me1q7bqu0qid465ll0m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
| | **Tim Walz’s leadership is a warning for America.** He’s raised taxes by _billions_ , expanded government control over everyday life, and pushed radical social policies that divide communities and weaken public safety.
_If his approach spreads to more states, America will be less free, less prosperous, and less safe._
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** I grew up in poverty — first in Harlem, then in a trailer park in Oklahoma. I worked my way through college, served as a U.S. Army officer, and spent 30 years in the private sector leading teams and turning around struggling businesses.
I’ve _never been_ a career politician, and I don’t owe the political class anything.
That’s exactly why I can, and will, take on the entrenched bureaucracy, cut waste, lower taxes, and put power back in the hands of hardworking people.
This fight isn’t just about Minnesota. _It’s about stopping a dangerous agenda before it spreads_ , and proving that Conservative leadership can still win, even in a state the left thinks they own.
The national Democratic machine is already lining up behind Walz.
**If Conservatives across America stand with me now, we can shock the political class and restore freedom, prosperity, and common sense to Minnesota.**
**_[Can I count on your support right now?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo0rbhoe3o8453i95q4jluv2tf8pks37dg0jsho8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)_ **Your donation today will help us reach voters, fight back against attacks, and build the momentum we need to win.
---
[DONATE $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrd38j39mqhf8bqi25kaob3v5uta1jfjlahlu078_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
[DONATE $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z76qb1nubsd1emga4ktblr523p5bs0o0o91iqv68_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
[DONATE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8s35ncvj2uvrrqccvqq27kdo3o8kdlc5lfcaa48_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6pjpp2anifrikqpebjotohdavi6s0jq00s44bgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
| | **__**Thank you for believing in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjbkaceuj85mkhk95td5cu701ts79eknithrtdb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za0jjli9oqg40i6umgokl4voi42bc4n3bpsjko50_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znud9kid79pbrsltuc7cl6vc6l8q4h154jv0971o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
|
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8sphjtvb3d58t8op0r63trac4oeq02ecmims9b0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
****
**The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zubn06b2aut5cssvdltvccpqj1medbqud96rjv1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.
[SHOP THE STORE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeocja01rg9lisetg5ihhsdc261drib7btioiuv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge6pb1c1h2bs)

clean_body: I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat Tim Walz | | | | | | Friend, I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat Tim Walz. His far-left leadership and failed policies have hurt families here and serve as a dangerous model for the rest of the country. Before I share my story, I need to ask: | | Tim Walz’s leadership is a warning for America. He’s raised taxes by billions , expanded government control over everyday life, and pushed radical social policies that divide communities and weaken public safety. If his approach spreads to more states, America will be less free, less prosperous, and less safe. I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it. I grew up in poverty — first in Harlem, then in a trailer park in Oklahoma. I worked my way through college, served as a U.S. Army officer, and spent 30 years in the private sector leading teams and turning around struggling businesses. I’ve never been a career politician, and I don’t owe the political class anything. That’s exactly why I can, and will, take on the entrenched bureaucracy, cut waste, lower taxes, and put power back in the hands of hardworking people. This fight isn’t just about Minnesota. It’s about stopping a dangerous agenda before it spreads , and proving that Conservative leadership can still win, even in a state the left thinks they own. The national Democratic machine is already lining up behind Walz. If Conservatives across America stand with me now, we can shock the political class and restore freedom, prosperity, and common sense to Minnesota. Your donation today will help us reach voters, fight back against attacks, and build the momentum we need to win. | | Thank you for believing in this fight. Sincerely, Kendall Qualls Candidate for Governor of Minnesota | | | | | My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school. I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit. Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation. We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities. That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. With gratitude,Kendall Qualls | ** The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts. When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go. Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together. | | | | Prepared and paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082 | | The appearance of Kendall Qualls in military uniform does not imply or constitute endorsement by the U.S. Army or U.S. Department of Defense. subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani

body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfua96m2nnso3m5s9sn12r5lk3em5b6epkkrf2qo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge9oj4c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z556tlrgaonsm0eeccnsrc31m5kicmesoehn2iqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge9oj4c1h2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgd43u2tkhm6df9lp1vgvj9f0vok6s04vt2142q0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge9oj4c1h2bs)
---

__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1hh721rpcgbsmolmnbkj3naknj7qbipnn1h6a2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ge9oj4c1h2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR | | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492 Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdatuvl0o12oplf17qkfapk6dj7s02mnkbpirvk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ie8o34cjh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrkgkql6p0oipigiq4baae2nsiq68idf35a9fk1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ie8o34cjh2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zufgldi549tjultp241a8c3kk016rvejdjgs6i3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ie8o34cjh2bs)
---

__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztbljjjf0gr39kacamvlpg525emume2ai01g14n0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4s5ie8o34cjh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

name: Troy Downing
subject: MAGA extremist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)If you hate BS political emails, good. You’re exactly who I want to talk to, Peter.
This is Troy Downing.
I’m a combat vet, not a career politician. I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.
I ran for Congress — and won — because I tell the truth and fight for __We the People__ , not party bosses, lobbyists, or woke elites.**
****And because I refuse to play their games, the Left is coming after my GOP House seat.**[ RUSH HELP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)They want me out because I call out their radical agenda, support President Trump, and won’t back down on the issues that matter.
In other words, I’m “ _deplorable._ ”
“ _Garbage_.”
“ _MAGA Extremist_.”
They can label me whatever they want, but I guarantee you it won’t stop me from standing up to open-border policy and the mutilation of our kids in the name of “gender ideology.”
But here's the real problem: **Democrats are pummeling us with cash. **
They’ve stockpiled a **_$37 MILLION advantage over Republicans_** , aiming it straight at flipping the House Majority.
If I don’t flip the switch on fundraising soon, defending this seat will be nearly impossible.
And if we lose it, we don’t just lose my seat. We’ll lose our only chance at advancing President Trump’s America First agenda.
I’m not asking for a handout. I’m asking for an ally. [If you’re ready to join this fight, will you chip in $15.50 today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-SqIisynIJOpuGKPaA)[JOIN THE FIGHT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[DONATE TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Thank you for your patriotic support,
-Troy Downing** _Combat Veteran in Congress_**| |

name: Winter is coming
subject: MAGA’s red wedding in PA could eliminate Dem Party as we know it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6pnLlwkRcFoVyZRyePCqlVBWXQE509mBXXPwJOSScnM5zYMsW6vHZntuYZnP1tntCC_EQNpiOUL_3foESCx8_EuLOpwlmGZEp72MTofN7y5yOQ-M0rZWjptsXxINVi2dHgN7Q5t266Djs-6uCdiEkGnk3-txNDpAoeev_SeKuqlU-cSQGpvTBBNTNN4DbrTOBkO1XWRO8n54i-Gh0GfayddO6Ql_zWxQG6DLWt5zBs=&c=5hBHx12OxKlJCZuK49BlBP0PiA4zNtMcBBaiukAn88RIa-Pv1AOOvg==&ch=bQwqUwK8bNQXTwdchdKTdVYCUZZNb2cYnhsDNXsMDKgN_io8El2Blg==)
---
| Peter,
MAGA just launched a brutal political power grab reminiscent of a Game of Thrones plot.
Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention races are usually sleepy affairs. Rare elections that happen only once every 10 years, Justices up for retention hardly ever lose, and both Democrats and Republicans have strayed from spending big in these elections.
But this November's PA Supreme Court retention race is different. Lulled into a false sense of safety assuming that the 3 Democrats on PA's Supreme Court up for retention would face no danger, Democrats let their guard down--unaware that MAGA was plotting a sinister "Red Wedding" style ambush behind their backs:

| In the dead of the night, billionaires under MAGA's banner launched a full out assault, spending millions of dollars in advertisements to convince PA voters to boot the Democratic justices off the court.
It's all part of Trump's plot to consolidate power and name himself king.
If Trump eliminates the three Democrats off of PA's Supreme Court, he can install puppets loyal to him on the court responsible for overseeing elections in the most crucial swing state in America. This would allow him to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--suppressing Democrat votes, decreeing mail-in ballots illegal, and even prevent Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether.
Having heard rumor of this plot from our "little birds" in the capital, Defend Our Courts has been rallying Democrats from across the nation to join in this battle since early summer. body:
The Trump administration sent a memo to Congress on Thursday declaring that the U.S. is now in [a formal "non-international armed conflict"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3DAMhJ_G7rSQpf2xCxdptru0KQ1aomwGlLWguKe7tw-cPELqGQzm-359LB9ATMf2EzLOmspyYKuMqihLAFHkBhIxMAjGDF8NmffFWXczgzXWLxGIv5drH-eE6ND3OA-P23Qd785P_T67FJy3PvqHh3Wy4_pIg_dhndYbrBDHnuZzbbDWD3awfry4hNMa0wD-PmJyQ3e1GEmLXH4XOnTHxN_lE-USSu553lVftfM_Ovfs3LO1dknl66Q48849X4VJKdTOPVXe-WUgZjqMInM1oRybYK2G1ERUlEwHRvOuBo8NNowmFcnABiRjPOuJKahppLtRFClCVU2U92b-6aq9zPHViJnq_dFd7ZaB-O9X_S_Bn7P7EwAA___iypUw) with drug cartels, which the government has designated as terrorist organizations.

# Friday, October 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1863, President Abraham Lincoln proclaimed that [Thanksgiving would be celebrated](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOpDAQheHTmMzIlGloAgebkPWmGyJjl3HtFHbLWM1w-1GP5gYTf9LT0__vsTwsMaXtr93R1JCXhOfBWCuWxdlSkU9bPDq2Bf1uP09kjgsouMlOSaUXb4mvpW-8CYiAukHTjbepvw-gpyaaYQXwHgf0MIKF9RbCOAUMox5654exIfNe65TSneqUvrcQcFp96Kwe7higE71CTzWX9n-mVCMGvvILS-vy3rCJtT4Pof8ImAXM53m2kY6ay_V2AXONdEhvL0lJ_oiAObuaVyxSC5iZksuc5LNkx5b2Q-YQyJFlWaNNH8dGL0qbjJnJ26spxj9PYqZjGEWvtt0Sf5-pvyr4MvAVAAD__0LkiPw) on November 26, 1863, to honor the Union victory at Gettysburg, establishing the last Thursday in November as the official date for the holiday. Where did pilot Amelia Earhart disappear to on her mysterious last flight? Researchers at Purdue University say they think they know, and they're embarking on a journey to check it out. Hear their story on [today's _Flyover Podcast_ by clicking here.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQxfGnwV0smCH-KCiuFPlW2XZLNIFxzAqbCJOwefuV9xW2PUf6Ff_Pq71SiGG7f9DKpszJblz3yKVwto5y4Vgpe3aRMvuVvivHuFiQcD4peZJoPYX4trrxZmYGxoaN6s-jHjrAsVmM873uB5YSGLDX41nizWk9jD0NrBw1wRyakhKVVBKHFmYeb35WhN3AMyihJftQUm6_UtjKwnN8pxfn1qW1iWYp5bEL_CdgEjDVWtt3epbnjY__WKi4ReD0EnjBK9tpq8T_tYCuCLzACHuTjX_UEGPYu15oeV8pxF-9_CnJy8BPAAAA__9sgXOQ) You've probably seen [_The Pour Over_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGK-yAQx_GnMbcWdWyaHjz8ofTW_3WPMtExcdEYjGm2b7-k7NIH2NvAB34M34-7uWOIYRr-YyJdfTYTbUukWqkYi6VS3LA4shELuYRfG8U4Gsnl6SD4gYNxGOLTqMZpTyQJGtLifLqorpVwaUatWjo7kL3wpHgPINF3JG1vT1yBEK4Jel8TnIPggkN3lJ4uvfMCoe3IS8EUJxdqLsfPHKY6ko_P_KBytDk1UY-1zguDf0zemLz9Wh1pzmt53bkMO8JtrckseS2WGFzfQ0y2uyRyYU0Mru8EP2IxzRiGaTesIU8YTbbVQFO0m7cQY1jaM1N8SBji66_6p5gPLb8DAAD__7sAjGE) mentioned before--and for good reason. It's trusted by over 1.4 million Christians who want to stay informed without the partisan noise. Many of us on _The Flyover_ team read it ourselves, and we can tell you it's one of the best sources out there for believers who want news without the spin.
|
---
## Trump Formally Declares War on Cartels
The Trump administration sent a memo to Congress on Thursday declaring that the U.S. is now in [a formal "non-international armed conflict"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3DAMhJ_G7rSQpf2xCxdptru0KQ1aomwGlLWguKe7tw-cPELqGQzm-359LB9ATMf2EzLOmspyYKuMqihLAFHkBhIxMAjGDF8NmffFWXczgzXWLxGIv5drH-eE6ND3OA-P23Qd785P_T67FJy3PvqHh3Wy4_pIg_dhndYbrBDHnuZzbbDWD3awfry4hNMa0wD-PmJyQ3e1GEmLXH4XOnTHxN_lE-USSu553lVftfM_Ovfs3LO1dknl66Q48849X4VJKdTOPVXe-WUgZjqMInM1oRybYK2G1ERUlEwHRvOuBo8NNowmFcnABiRjPOuJKahppLtRFClCVU2U92b-6aq9zPHViJnq_dFd7ZaB-O9X_S_Bn7P7EwAA___iypUw) with drug cartels, which the government has designated as terrorist organizations. The notification to Congress comes as a follow-up to three U.S. military strikes, killing 17, on what the White House has said were drug-smuggling boats in the Caribbean, at least two of them originating from Venezuela. Democrats have said that Trump needs war powers authority from Congress to continue conducting the strikes. The administration, [in its memo Thursday,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u4yAURleDOyK4GP8UFNO4y7RTWhgugdHFRJjEk92P_N4SXvUVn3Skc_7c17tNlPbHb5vRtFDWHc-DsDWsq7O1IZ22enRkK_ps_51IFFcQoLkUXKjV20Sfte-8CYiAqkMjRz330wBq7qIJMCqn9Dz3wWo9wej9pqRDMQ6qH6TtkrloUgglhRRqukHAefNBWjVMGECyXqBPrdTb35L2FjHQp7yx3lzJHZnY2vNg6heDhcHSIsZEdH0MllgyXkIMFq2V1qB4q6_85LZm9NyVPVByjfv6evBv3ePatG1odwZLV41_nokoHcPIevHINn3Bu_ajWm8D_wMAAP__yQx-mw) says the attacks are part of an official war against the cartels:

_"The President determined these cartels are non-state armed groups, designated them as terrorist organizations, and determined that their actions constitute an armed attack against the United States."_
## Terrorist Attack Hits British Synagogue
British officials declared a terrorist incident in Manchester on Thursday after an assailant [rammed a car into a crowd and stabbed people](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ_G7rDg4N-CYpt02XZL6xiObXaPIcIkbN7-ymnuA9xuNJ80mpk_9_mOnn3YfuNBJq9xDlROppwpzRZTJi6YHFnGRO7A_4WY9xkkdEJJIfXs0PN7bmtnViIgXZNRQze1Yw96qncDgxqXxdle9i10raRB4bCOmuykWlBd7c2VpqTUSiqpxwZWmha3KtT9SCuoqpXkfI6p-Rt9yDut_I4vSo2NR81mz_lxVvpXBbcKbqWUJiz2WnHxy4mJXQW3Z_CZnPjnw-Y-4MBgdzozJXG-A25xe5I4My6LD5uwmETC47j0N35E9pZEsgFBd0oNdTLuUTyzP_uhauV2oOdPs_yjO18GvgIAAP__zbWL3Q) outside a synagogue, killing two and seriously injuring three, on the holiest day of the Jewish year. Manchester police [shot and killed the suspect](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ_G7ogOP8ZQUGyTLttuaR3g2GaDcYTZePP2V76vcMvRSKP5vj-P6YEpp7L8xo1cm_ep0Hlkao3qFLA2yifWSCFjpbjh_5NyXicBYmAcGMgpYsqfSfXRzUSCZE-Oj4NVRgtp-9WhCTaKYLS3yghpPYrR-zCaqAfjg-qTu9Y4gOTAQZqbmMn6OHOU2tAseKeAYmp7vf3dU2krzfmzv6newr712a2tvY5O_urEvRN3fF0AV3WF2lLI1Im7r6lhKmzDElY6GlV2fAou-_KPGLaG4cmeJc3EAlamDUqQFlBrAxwArDSjssZ4OyhjeV9dfJ0p53TosVOwbJjy9532I4dvJ74CAAD__9nbhEg) seven minutes after they arrived on the scene, identifying him as a 35-year-old British citizen of Syrian descent named Jihad Al-Shamie. Police also said that three other people—two men in their 30s and a woman in her 60s—have been arrested in connection with the attack. Officials say they’re still working to determine the motive behind the attack, but noted that it took place on Yom Kippur, the Day of Atonement and the most solemn day on the Jewish calendar, when synagogues around the world are full of people.
## WNBA Finals Open at End of Big Season

clean_body: The Trump administration sent a memo to Congress on Thursday declaring that the U.S. is now in with drug cartels, which the government has designated as terrorist organizations. | | | | | | Friday, October 3, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1863, President Abraham Lincoln proclaimed that on November 26, 1863, to honor the Union victory at Gettysburg, establishing the last Thursday in November as the official date for the holiday. Where did pilot Amelia Earhart disappear to on her mysterious last flight? Researchers at Purdue University say they think they know, and they're embarking on a journey to check it out. Hear their story on You've probably seen mentioned before--and for good reason. It's trusted by over 1.4 million Christians who want to stay informed without the partisan noise. Many of us on The Flyover team read it ourselves, and we can tell you it's one of the best sources out there for believers who want news without the spin. | Trump Formally Declares War on Cartels The Trump administration sent a memo to Congress on Thursday declaring that the U.S. is now in with drug cartels, which the government has designated as terrorist organizations. The notification to Congress comes as a follow-up to three U.S. military strikes, killing 17, on what the White House has said were drug-smuggling boats in the Caribbean, at least two of them originating from Venezuela. Democrats have said that Trump needs war powers authority from Congress to continue conducting the strikes. The administration, says the attacks are part of an official war against the cartels: "The President determined these cartels are non-state armed groups, designated them as terrorist organizations, and determined that their actions constitute an armed attack against the United States." Terrorist Attack Hits British Synagogue British officials declared a terrorist incident in Manchester on Thursday after an assailant outside a synagogue, killing two and seriously injuring three, on the holiest day of the Jewish year. Manchester police seven minutes after they arrived on the scene, identifying him as a 35-year-old British citizen of Syrian descent named Jihad Al-Shamie. Police also said that three other people—two men in their 30s and a woman in her 60s—have been arrested in connection with the attack. Officials say they’re still working to determine the motive behind the attack, but noted that it took place on Yom Kippur, the Day of Atonement and the most solemn day on the Jewish calendar, when synagogues around the world are full of people. WNBA Finals Open at End of Big Season The tip off tonight as the Phoenix Mercury visit the Las Vegas Aces for Game 1 of a best-of-seven series at 8 p.m. ET on ESPN. Las Vegas enters the series as slight favorites behind league MVP A’ja Wilson, while Phoenix’s Alyssa Thomas after her dominant playoff run. 2025 proved the most successful season to date for the WNBA in terms of ratings. ESPN averaged per regular-season game, a 6% increase from last year’s numbers. Rising interest in the league has highlighted by the $660,000 sale of a Caitlin Clark one-of-one signed basketball card, with the entire league seeing record-high valuations of player memorabilia. # Friday, October 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1954, blues guitarist [Stevie Ray Vaughan](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DtywjAQgOHTyB0evfygUJHGHSmSmaTUrKW1vYOwiLVguH2GXCHl33zF_33yJ6BE6_wOF3T8mLJfcS8JmXHzYaFEZcX954YlL_lWOK8M5ey11M1ByYM0PgKlp7dVdKOMR1WhU11ztP3RSFktDkzT67ELtpmiBqtM36HSASaLbWiDqsi9MCWlUUoq09ZGtbGX_WhsiGD6UViJkThvNS_I-IAypWe-41aHfKmSW5ivRZg3oQehB1zrnc50xUhQ520Weni10MMn453Qf8DTf8FtXmCtNhevO6VEpe2ElfMFKP2p_L8Xd6d_AwAA__8lW3SX) was born in Dallas. Considered one of the greatest guitarists of all time, he spearheaded the blues revival of the 1980s as the leader of the band Double Trouble before his life was tragically cut short in a helicopter crash in 1990. The FDA has granted conditional approval for a new drug to treat infestations of the New World screwworm as the parasite nears the Texas border and threatens the state's livestock industry. Get [the details](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SpSAUhJ8GM27xp6MBwSZms-mGFleOemoRXDjK-PZbzitM1kHXV93fn8_p02HAuP52O1j6WtIUoZYARJCnecOAJUL9d0JJWzoLpUiu_J2UUC2Xggs9eYfhnkzj7Vv4QTZg5Uc7mH7QQjSbHXo_KKP00PaD9EoaucjOgzBSdH2rdIP2gUkhtJRC6u6lZed70b-1mb3T_ZsZAR4p5RdtQPDlyhLudEF-zWlvgt2IjsL0L6ZGpsZa62u_N1y3IziM5SkxNT6vmBrdmnE-A50ZmBoX7_icokfCFF0IN3fHkdMFhft8rnxJmR8ZLoiEceWUwX2HCJXXlIPnZc5Qa8o7x8hnRxQebpOtPyqGgKX7YEasu8PwvZZ-5viy6n8AAAD__z6UlRU) in today's _Around Texas_ section. When a University of Texas student broke his wrist in a skateboarding accident, his Uber driver did more than take him to the ER—he stayed for six hours. Amy Hess interviews Joey and Beni about the night that turned into a lifelong friendship—only on [today’s edition of _The Feel Good Flyover Podcast_](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnwVusC9gOHhgqRRkqJerUjhY2F4NKTGquQ_z2VfoKXc-RvuH_ugwXE2JY5qu5oaanS8OCJUckwnWYfIghL1h-NszJpy1TWsjk70GAaA8cDiAHa0Lch6ayegTb8wo1P7Z9o3oJUHmNzoyusW3f4eTAmZZ3qncWoQfeKi6roF8YB5CcA5ddLXlnFahRNpM1Uo2sAbSB0lqTR8KnyS7u6YFrPaVbFbUnumcm35g4M3EupdR72mgb8fW_FkOTZ_L8YPL0Me-Fz-P79VMx0RGTJyGOuVq1vZcQY8jdkTUw30yIfzr9r8lDi98AAAD__0PXdXw). If you’ve been searching for a safe, proven way to finally break through weight-loss frustration, today's sponsor is [Medvi’s GLP-1 program](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LtOwzAUgOGncbZGxz7ObfCAQBFLAUElukW-nDQWblxit2l5elRegf3XN_yf22GrffDz4UUfSeXrGIeZ1hQoZ1oGO_ng00zr95lSnOI55Thnnb4GAaLacNgADk77cBtk4ZQB1_GCFG-qTrYdAhSTQq3HamwkVY003OBoK-NM08mK5GhrKLy6YxwAOQeOdYm8di20BqV1GlvDJJDzOS5lnijTVacx3OKFltLGYxHUlPMpMXxgomeiX9e1ND8wW27ne8BEj_Xb-_5xx0TfPgvZfbT3Evt0Npzh027fvxaLcqfVh-BT3TAJh6P24Y_P_5tyUeI3AAD__-K9dBI), which could be the life-changing solution you’ve been waiting for.
