## Six Injured in Houston Hotel Explosion
At least six people were hospitalized following an [explosion at a high-rise hotel](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u4yAURleDO6zLr6GgmMbdm3ZKC8P1MwoxGUNCsvtRotnBqz_p6Dvnz9fy5VNOx_dvf0XXnltZDuw1Y2t4LmFPOdUD-9871rKXe23laL5eFg5cUQYUxBJ9yq9FDtGtEC0b0LFJWWmsABh2h8JPnsWgzGbUGqIxiMZyDqs208amIbk3jAEIxoAJPQqmowGzChmiF2YlEjCmVs6x7djw6euWX-WB5xjKdchub-1WifhF-Ez43HsfL3u5v0fCZ3-2FDISPr-9CJ9zCT4TPm_pRIrPWy41lYN-uLS2E7HRWPrRSj_of2XCZ24U1dqrqI2mE7eGSqEUtTBZuiHIzQDyYOVwunjrKedU9UQkfF99yp-j7Wd5H47_CwAA___ybI4N) under construction in Houston yesterday morning. According to investigators, a natural gas line for multiple tankless water heaters [ignited on the 17th floor](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFy5CAQRL8GZWwNg6wVAcElZL70QhUSI2nKLOgEa9Z_f6Ur_4Hzrn6v-8_79O45ctp--wfZ-lrzlKiVSLXSOS07Ry6J2t8nlbznZ6k5VV8-JgR8kwok6Cl4jl9T3wU7QzCqI6vub6YfjQbodrvqkQwMeMcBx37VAYIhUMbM934dzdqxvcoUgFYKlB5uWg1hhHHW_RK8HmfRAwWu-bzVnSq9fFnjV_6k87bkRxftXutRhP4l0Al0rbXbEnn5wG_fKyXQXbMEupgXHwW6iynQKRDoAAW6I5fCcyRJryPmwjlJX-XO2y5PLiTnJ8fAaZOcZMgt1dyS_EYIdN1pw9E4Ri7DXfSwPTzH_4L1Z7d-WvwXAAD__zTejSs) of a downtown Holiday Inn Express hotel, which was scheduled to open in December. The victims, all of whom are believed to be construction workers, suffered lacerations and burn injuries. The names of the victims have not been provided, and their condition is unknown. Arson investigators are reviewing the incident. "_It's very fortunate that more people were not injured_ ," [said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQRp_GdF75D3ZduEhDd9OmRAYPl0mMTTzDZffto43yBqk_6dM558fH9BExY_n8HncI_FzrVOCiDMzQpmXDjFTg-n0C1a2exLVwpF-TUaaXWkllpxQxvybXpTCr5HUHQd977x7eKtVtwejeJw998jMMcUhD8na9K5ecidb3psPwPtNKWa2VtsPN6iE91GO2bknRPmbhFCTk2m68AcMz0ppf9Qvabal7l8PGfJCw34QZhRnjvGj7XoQZj0oszLifmfHIILH8PBsCyQZHbQxJzhUzNIlEJ8gGdGYmCc8jV8JaZKpX4XoV-c9dbpUhy21NkuKLhBn13Rs3KC3M2LWQjgtzRhruwqnPPWL-y8j_V_YrmD8BAAD__8hlkD4) Houston Fire Department Communications Director Brent Taylor.
## UT Austin Asked to Sign Compact for Priority Funding
The University of Texas at Austin is one of nine U.S. universities that were asked to [adopt a series of policies](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2upDAQBODTQOaRfxgGAgebkL1NN0QNbqD1_MPaDczcfsVe4cVV-lSqP1_jF5CnuP6GgJbfSxojXsUjM-Zx3shTiXj9PbCkLR2FU2Qo36OW-imUFNKMDsh_xqZ2dpKuVzVa9Xr2TdcbKevN6rl5zpPrmxbmHntsXdeDUq9ukggSpprsjSkpjVJSmfZhVOs62U2mmR2YbqoaiY445QdvyPiGsvhPOjE_5hRqbzfmvVTmV6WHSg_XdT2-3xDvsNLDRt6LPXlimkulB85H2AVQKIKTWOlEsWdcMGNkAi-WIzqKq-CMwAEj37Uj0om5EBMWwRuwCIgsHAaI7lbrbN1-kfdU2lfVyDUA-f_z-Gennlb_CwAA__-IA5Dp) that align with Trump administration priorities in exchange for expanded access to federal funding. According to the [10-page](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGOnDAQBNCvMTejts0yw8GHVbQol801R9TYzdCKsQnuWWb-PprkE3KuUumpfn5On8iJ8-0HbuTlsZQp01kTidAxhZUT10zn7zvVspZ7lZIF66_Jgn3TBjS4KSKn59Q10c8QB9OQN5e3obsODqBZPQbXz0Mfo4PBLMbM7mINoMXBgO3n2LB_jRkAZwwY17fO9PEK19l1IaK7zqoDiizlaGUloQfWJT3LFx1tKFuT_CqyV-XelR2VHc_zbE-sK-eblEwP3Dj_q77CXYeShbIoO973VDBWZccXQNnRgLLjt7LtGEQv5dDvASNtHPTHI1BKlANpzvo731Y69Ee8BxQuWRtoTbvHpTl83E9OiWt_UR3cNuT0Vyn_9-2Xt38CAAD__5oejvo) "Compact for Academic Excellence in Higher Education," applicants should be required to take the SAT or ACT, and admission must not be based on sex or race. Additionally, international student enrollment should be capped at 15%, and administrators must enforce the single-sex use of bathrooms and locker rooms. The agreement also asks universities to [freeze tuition for five years](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGS3CAQRU-DMk01oBkxAYETsnXqUMVAS3QZgQy9q53bu-QrOO9-9f779bF8eMpUtp9-R8vfa10Knj0jM7YlJMrUC55_PrHXVD8718K-_14UqPsoYQS9RE_5vUxDtC-ITzmglfP9OZmnBhiSNTI8jcY4T0EqI18ABlZzX-eopZ-DHMheMAmgpQSpHzctH9GAeekpRK_NS0yAkbi2Gydk_PZ9ze_6he0W6j5km5iPLvQPoZxQ7jzPG5VOERNtCRvG60wod-0Sym3XZ9mxsFCuB8IScGzY0beQxqNmCm-h3OUklJMglAN1cRMxjlcDHNdcPfcx1P3wgcej4YoNC5PPQ7PxOCln6o9ZTLDtnvI_Uf6_vF9W_Q0AAP__f0GQ3g) and publicize the earnings of students who graduate with certain degrees. Regarding free speech, signatories are asked to "commit themselves to fostering a vibrant marketplace of ideas" and "shall neither support nor permit a heckler’s veto." Kevin Eltife, the chair of the UT System Board of Regents, [said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SrCAURlejGdZF_MGA4CWd9UsntBCuSjWCA9eme_dTPVuY_Kuvzjlf9_munXdh-68PVPRa4xywZI9EmGazO-9ywPJ9YY57vDLFQDo_5hbannFgIGarnX_PXW3VAnbiNSo-9lMnJwFQ78rwUayLWGVvewsa5WgmY3DVQycHmKbaqc8ZBxCcAxdDI_hgJchFdMZqIZeqA7SOYmpoR8KXzqt_xyemxsSj9monOnMl_lXtrWpvpZTmo1AQH59B1d5M9B43ZFdwT0zZ0ZutaDFpz9YrWBc2Ruk6Tob2MppcDMziqRMdGIhxkFxOA9RJ2bM4710exqqD7dDO_yLQ38I9VfsTAAD__-kahag), "We look forward to working with the Trump Administration" in implementing the agreement. UT recently joined UNT in launching a course review to [ensure compliance](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu2zAQRL-G6mjwpVehIo26mzalsCJX1uLS5A25suy_D-RfSDkzwAHO_PlavoAipftveODEry0vCc8akRnL4neKVBOefw-sec9H5ZwY6vdilGmlVlLZJQDF9-KaMK0qjLrBSfft6IbRKtXsk9-gNx1A2_ZOW228bpWG4NTocds0NjRdMK2U1Vpp292s7sKghtU6H8AOq3AKA3EuN96R8QV1i-_8xHLz-dHEaWf-qcL-EmYWZj7P8_b9PPAahZmhMPmIwsyXlzAzhsMDU07CzNXvOcer_WAlo98lF0j1jilgkSmnlRKUt6SAiYkJqzwSPbHUTxBmNt0oB2W70SBI2IZVutV6OZgepXIa1mDGtvPQlCn8nBQj1a4XTt0fQPGjwP93_HMy_wIAAP__6ViY6w) with state and federal laws, while Texas Tech issued guidance restricting classroom discussions of gender identity.
## Chili's Introducing New Queso
Dallas-based Chili's Grill and Bar is discontinuing two longtime menu items—Skillet Beef Queso and White Skillet Queso—and [replacing them](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAUhZ8Gd1j82eCCYht3s-2W1jVcAhpisoYMk7dfJdk3mOpK35WOznf-fGwfkHI6Lr_hirZ9h7Id2GvG1vDcXEw51QP73zvWEsu9tnI0qJ-bYGKinFEmNw8pPzY1eLszv_ABLdfToswiGRuiVTgvhrtlmhe3c_B6h0kY5oxSapJhGpJ9hnHGJOeMy3mUfPaGmV0q50GanSiGPrVyji1iw2-oIT_KF56jK9ch29jarRL5i4iViLX3PvYA8HwSscLZkstIxJpTeJ5QiidifavR-plyxkZfgrSWe4sda8Pz-I9chOOC1MV0q29ExCqMpqgQGA9IvZ4XqkDs1PDgqRJaSQ2ondPDaf2tp5xTnTVR7HKFlF-t28-2_rLiXwAAAP__PM-TTg) with its new Southwestern Queso. Chili's introduced its Skillet Beef Queso in 1990, and White Skillet Queso was added within the past decade. "Dissatisfaction with Chili's queso lineup" and "low sales numbers told us that our guests were clearly looking for a better queso," [said chief marketing officer](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SozAQhJ8GsnHpB3shIHBCsrWbXkgJzWCmPEg-SV6t3_4Kv8LF_VVX9_fna_5yLBxu326nsfyucQ5Us1AplGa_sXAOVP8-KcctPnOJobh8n40yZ9AKlJ3RsbzmrsVxUTjolkb9cR66frBKtdu4rt6rXlnvNfreD2ZAuw7rcu5xsEt3aXk8yrRSVmul7eVk9QV71S-28-hsvzSdIuQS06lsVOjX5VVe8YfSyce9lXEr5ZEbe23M1Jip1nracziyxkwU4JkbM60xIriAgInD_cBiEgT_5MyBDuL9FTJ4FzxJBonhVngnyHcWoQJvB5DoIc5zuAEXqFw2CFQBnYjLsDskQH40ZnIJrlf9_bl9Xts04qOyCOfLR9Op2-5Y3tvL_xn_Gc2_AAAA__85oZks) George Felix. The new vegetarian menu item is [made with](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2ymzAUxfHViE6MvjBQqHhF6F6qzKRkBLpYioVkc68te_cZewtvA2fO7__3e_52McV8_u12sPTcypyhYgIiOOY1xBQxQ73dAUsod6SSyeFlVkJ1XAou9OxdTK_ZNN4uwo-yASv7bjTDqIVogu1hMMp0w7aC2JSX67iMW7dpMWq3ut400b7HpBBaSiH1qdXy5AcxLNqs3ulhYUaAj1SOlgIQPB1u6VUecLRr2ZtkA9EVmf5iamJqqrW2SGW9UCSX2wzE1PQ2MTX9-vrD1PRRceQIhJwC8I-OI7ns3eF5jRS4S4lnqBzLnUIFJDgyj2p3__b6vNwepQ20p-aw_lpjShFPPTPivLuYPrfoZzEfVv0PAAD__zZsjS0) American and cheddar cheeses, green chiles, onions, and lime. Chefs have been working on the recipe since the fall of 2023, and 70% of consumers at a Curion Insights event in Atlanta preferred it over the Skillet Beef Queso. Southwestern Queso will be rolled out to customers on Oct. 7. According to investigators, a natural gas line for multiple tankless water heaters of a downtown Holiday Inn Express hotel, which was scheduled to open in December. The victims, all of whom are believed to be construction workers, suffered lacerations and burn injuries. The names of the victims have not been provided, and their condition is unknown. Arson investigators are reviewing the incident. "It's very fortunate that more people were not injured ," Houston Fire Department Communications Director Brent Taylor. UT Austin Asked to Sign Compact for Priority Funding The University of Texas at Austin is one of nine U.S. universities that were asked to that align with Trump administration priorities in exchange for expanded access to federal funding. According to the "Compact for Academic Excellence in Higher Education," applicants should be required to take the SAT or ACT, and admission must not be based on sex or race. Additionally, international student enrollment should be capped at 15%, and administrators must enforce the single-sex use of bathrooms and locker rooms. The agreement also asks universities to and publicize the earnings of students who graduate with certain degrees. Regarding free speech, signatories are asked to "commit themselves to fostering a vibrant marketplace of ideas" and "shall neither support nor permit a heckler’s veto." Kevin Eltife, the chair of the UT System Board of Regents, , "We look forward to working with the Trump Administration" in implementing the agreement. UT recently joined UNT in launching a course review to with state and federal laws, while Texas Tech issued guidance restricting classroom discussions of gender identity. Chili's Introducing New Queso Dallas-based Chili's Grill and Bar is discontinuing two longtime menu items—Skillet Beef Queso and White Skillet Queso—and with its new Southwestern Queso. Chili's introduced its Skillet Beef Queso in 1990, and White Skillet Queso was added within the past decade. "Dissatisfaction with Chili's queso lineup" and "low sales numbers told us that our guests were clearly looking for a better queso," George Felix. The new vegetarian menu item is American and cheddar cheeses, green chiles, onions, and lime. Chefs have been working on the recipe since the fall of 2023, and 70% of consumers at a Curion Insights event in Atlanta preferred it over the Skillet Beef Queso. Southwestern Queso will be rolled out to customers on Oct. 7. Greg Abbott announced the creation of a new task force to target repeat violent criminals in Houston and Harris County on Wednesday, saying DPS troopers and Texas Rangers would be "swarming" high-crime neighborhoods. body:
“We don't want to give illegal aliens the health care of Americans.”

President Trump just delivered a SCATHING INDICTMENT of Shutdown Democrats – read:[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhnl/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)"We don't want to give illegal aliens the health care of Americans... [Democrats] want to destroy health care in America by giving it to millions and millions of illegal aliens. And there’s not money for that. Nobody has money for that." These words from our President perfectly capture the Democrat Party and make it clear who stands where:
Republicans are on the side of the American People. Democrats are on the side of illegals. Plain and simple.
**Nearly every House and Senate Democrats voted to shut down our government because they want to keep illegals on taxpayer-funded healthcare.**
This is a disgrace. It’s a total betrayal of YOU.
[The Democrat Machine is blaming all of this on Republicans and are holding the American People hostage until they get their way, and right now they are pinning the blame on everyone but themselves.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhnl/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Radical Democrats and the Fake News were so excited about the Government shutdown that CNN and MSNBC both displayed a countdown on the screen like it was New Year's Eve!
Right now we need every single American Patriot to stand tall against this national lie!
The Democrats have chosen to sacrifice the livelihoods of hardworking Americans in favor of illegal aliens. Now it’s time for every single one of us to choose what side we're on:[HOUSE REPUBLICANS
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhnl/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[SHUTDOWN DEMOCRATS

Respond [here](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhnl/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) before 9 PM.
For Freedom,
House Republicansvia Team Scalise

\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhnl/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they’ll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvvemh666wahyed7l9zkgdknfuokj43tuw82zmnzq6dx0ktm1d8pg1g6tpfkjicbsapjfef0kojkjwp7&__stmp=t3k01l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=edb8w7bac21k3t1f40wgditjug49ls76zrc83f1oryghbss9kbpxunclod3qoqaadxlznwf7e1sabyfm8snioqya03yve3qbtdrk0v8vkoauu4p9s5n0fhb92fi5mvwvif4o7cefd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k01l&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: October 2025 Newsletter
body:
It was an honor to join Batya Ungar-Sargon to talk about the U.S. strategy
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
#### Teichert in the Trenches - October 2025
Welcome to this month’s installment of Teichert in the Trenches, a monthly newsletter highlighting a snippet of my attempts to maximize my impact on people and our great nation and to develop the leaders our nation needs! ** _Teichert in the News_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBmP64SPACXkt7Xr7g/SNwk9cOJbRwW)
---
It was an honor to join Batya Ungar-Sargon to talk about the U.S. strategy and the need to demonstrate strength of both capability and will alongside our allies and partners (September 2nd)
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG13EXv1dZJgdaBrW9hw/EQnqXEEv9_E4)
---
| | | A huge thanks to NewsNation and Nichole Berlie for the chance to provide commentary waiting for the press conference between President Trump and Prime Minister Netanyahu. (September 29th) ** _Thoughts by Teichert_**
---
| | | | [ "Running Out the Clock
on Vladimir Putin"](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG7uggjyojTAjPUbUSIC/J5mjSk4ffnwi)
---
A huge thanks to _Real Clear Defense_ for publishing my thoughts on Russia’s bad faith negotiations and actions following the summit in Alaska. Stall tactics, bad faith negotiating, and deception may work for a while, but not when the clock runs out. That clock may expire any moment now – and timelines, pressure, and strength resonate with Putin in ways that nothing else does.
| | | | [ "The Faithful Wounds
of a Friend"](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGEm8pYvztcepEnLSksS/JAR_LrTnqOdX "US absence in the world is as dangerous as US weakness")
---
| | | Thanks to _The Times of Israel_ for publishing these thoughts of faithful counsel that follow the admonition of King Solomon.
---
| | | | [ Purchase "Prayers for a Nation"](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGLdayNtB3m8v465R3Si/gAZW07diClLc "Prayers for a Nation")
---
| | | It’s been a year since I published “Prayers for a Nation” and I continue to be blessed and encouraged by its great reception.
---
| [ HOB Live Interview](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGSV37CqMDvd0tOpPM2y/f11LlQbNnaTm)
---
| | | 🪨 Building upon the rock!

💥 A massive thanks to Adam House Sr. for leading a wonderful discussion about how to keep yourself and your organization strong when the rains descend, the floods come, and the winds blow. ✅ We discussed:
\- An F-22 crash
\- An interview mispronunciation
\- A fighter pilot debrief process
\- A response to a suicide
\- A leadership style entitled Lethal Weapon Leadership
\- And so much more ** _Teichert in the Trenches_**
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
**_Behind the Scenes_**
| | | |
---
| | | This is for those observant people who have noticed something subtle but intentional in _The Dragon Who Earned His Wings_. In every picture of John the Dragon he is wearing an orange lanyard. Sometimes it contains a nametag and sometimes a line badge as a part of his flying duties. There are two reasons for this. First, we wanted something that made him stand out from just any other aviator dragon. Second, the color orange is significant to the flight test community. Since test aircraft are highly modified from production aircraft, those elements of the aircraft that are different (including wiring and instrumentation) are colored orange. That way, it is easy to identify the normal from the intentionally abnormal. As a result, the color orange has become the proud color of the flight test community. Now you know!
---
| | | |
---
🏈 Killing it as the Letter B!

🔥 Noah started off his Vanderbilt career strong with some new church friends. It was even highlighted on the SEC Instagram page and featured as the cover for a Bloomberg article on the thriving situation at Vandy. I guess it is a lesson for all of us to jump into our new activities with both feet – or maybe a torso of paint!

⚓ Anchor Down! ** _My Bookshelf_**
| | | |
---
I was honored to write the following endorsement for the new book from the Severn Leadership Group: “Our society desperately needs virtuous leaders, and they don’t just happen by accident. They are shaped and molded, both through experience and by deliberate mentorship. This powerful leadership book contains the thoughtful writings of proven virtuous leaders who have both been mentored and who provide mentorship. It is a must read for leaders who strive for lasting impact, one relationship at a time.”
|
---
I was also blessed to write the following endorsement for Pastor Paul Chappell’s new book: “On December 17th, 1903, lifeguard John Daniels took one of humanity’s most iconic photos – the world’s first flight with Orville Wright at the controls. Interestingly, Daniels had never taken a photo before. Frankly, he got lucky and the picture was in focus. We must not rely on such luck as we diligently focus our lives. Pastor Chappell’s new book brilliantly arms the reader with practical and spiritual tools to create and sustain intentional focus. I’ve seen him successfully put these tools into practice in his own life, and teach these principles to others. They work for him, they’ve worked for me, and I know they will work for you – no luck needed!” ** _PLUS Posts for the Month_**
| | | |
---
| [ A Modicum of Presentability
(Sep 6th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGZMVG1nXO576ihZNedE/XPGrUiDFILCa "Pronouns Matter")
---
| [ Love Your Enemies II
(Sep 13th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGgDxOqkiYEbCY0JLxDU/cC__-2uG33w- "Finding the Stars")
---
| [ The Blessings of Our Heritage
(Sep 20th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGn5PXfhtiO5INJ3KFnk/c7xvKkL8xVjk "We Must Listen")
---
| [ In God Alone Is Our Trust
(Sep 27th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGtwrgUf4sXZOCbnIYO0/JBafHw3t7lmO "Transforming Common Days into Thanksgiving")
---
| | | **_Blasts from the Past_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDhYHcZvsAP4JMNKzgWGO/lCJn8P3K4gdB)
---
| [ "Testing Efficacy: The Substantial Influence of Test Professionals"](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE9szp0KEGKEZQCiofFyS/lp29hliLkIdj)
---
With my comments about the test community in my discussion of _The Dragon Who Earned His Wings_ in the _Behind the Scenes_ section, I thought that it would be a great time to post some thoughts from a publication from 2008. These thoughts are a deep part of who I am and how I view multi-generational impact. ** _Rejoin Opportunities_**
| [ One Utah Summit](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsEcDi1QiaMFOpU26ddzgW/IW5aLbyc3Ttq)
---
If you are around Southern Utah, come join us at the Emergence Day (October 6th) at the One Utah Summit. Rumor is that Kevin Costner will be there as well, along with Country Artist Craig Morgan.
| | | | [ MCGOP Convention 2025](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsF4YQDr6wSAZ5XrUScjOa/_Fdh6b4CcMpr)
---
I’ll also be the lunchtime speaker at the Montgomery County GOP Fall Convention on October 11th. ** _Dad Joke of the Month_**
I don’t know why people have a problem with vegans? I’ve never had any beef with them.
| | | |
---
| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| You've received it because you've subscribed to our newsletter.
---
| [View in browser](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/mr/sh/SMJz09SDriOHUOWhOt45QHGsupy4/VmoZlvj2C__t)| [Unsubscribe](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/un/v2/sh/SMJz09a0vkbXqU0NAdDsZ4A0AXaC/8bGNlowlyIa3)
---

name: NEGOP
subject: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY](https://feyrpzhbb
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
A reawakening--perhaps even a revival--has begun since the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk. Young people are hurting, searching for meaning. Take a moment to talk with those under thirty in your family. Ask how they're feeling, what's on their minds, and who they're listening to. Invite them to join you at church.
Our youth have grown up in turbulent times, bombarded by information. Many see through the algorithms, CGI, and curated content trying to shape their views. They're rebelling, seeking their own truth, drawn to voices like Charlie Kirk's.
This week, both Governor Pillen in a Pachyderm speech and then Colonel Robert Maness (ret.) at the Douglas County Republican Party Fundraiser emphasized engaging younger generations and the urgency of doing so. I share that desire to connect but, after weeks of reflection, I'm still searching for concrete ways to bridge the gap.
Have you felt this same pull? What are your thoughts or ideas for reaching out to our youth?
Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---
| |
---
| What's Happening:
Communications Update
All across the country, Republicans are focused on a simple message: America is at its best when we protect freedoms, secure our borders, and put families first. That message is connecting with voters, and Nebraska is right in the middle of that momentum.
Here at the NEGOP, we've been building up the tools and resources our party needs to succeed - from rolling out weekly talking points, to strengthening our digital outreach, to preparing for candidate recruitment and grassroots trainings this fall.
The goal is simple: give Republicans across the state the confidence and clarity to share our message with their neighbors. And it's working - we're seeing more energy, more engagement, and more excitement from Nebraskans who are ready for real leadership.
As we head toward 2026, communication will continue to be key. That means telling our story, drawing a clear contrast with Democrats, and making sure Nebraskans know what Republicans stand for. But it's not just about what comes out of Lincoln or Washington - it's about you. When you speak up in your community, post on social media, or simply have a conversation with a friend, you're helping carry the Republican message forward.
Together, we can keep building momentum, keep growing our movement, and keep Nebraska red and America strong.
Haile McAnally Communications Director, Nebraska Republican Party

---

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair A reawakening--perhaps even a revival--has begun since the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk. Young people are hurting, searching for meaning. Take a moment to talk with those under thirty in your family. Ask how they're feeling, what's on their minds, and who they're listening to. Invite them to join you at church. Our youth have grown up in turbulent times, bombarded by information. Many see through the algorithms, CGI, and curated content trying to shape their views. They're rebelling, seeking their own truth, drawn to voices like Charlie Kirk's. This week, both Governor Pillen in a Pachyderm speech and then Colonel Robert Maness (ret.) at the Douglas County Republican Party Fundraiser emphasized engaging younger generations and the urgency of doing so. I share that desire to connect but, after weeks of reflection, I'm still searching for concrete ways to bridge the gap. Have you felt this same pull? What are your thoughts or ideas for reaching out to our youth? Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party | | | What's Happening: Communications Update All across the country, Republicans are focused on a simple message: America is at its best when we protect freedoms, secure our borders, and put families first. That message is connecting with voters, and Nebraska is right in the middle of that momentum. Here at the NEGOP, we've been building up the tools and resources our party needs to succeed - from rolling out weekly talking points, to strengthening our digital outreach, to preparing for candidate recruitment and grassroots trainings this fall. The goal is simple: give Republicans across the state the confidence and clarity to share our message with their neighbors. And it's working - we're seeing more energy, more engagement, and more excitement from Nebraskans who are ready for real leadership. As we head toward 2026, communication will continue to be key. That means telling our story, drawing a clear contrast with Democrats, and making sure Nebraskans know what Republicans stand for. But it's not just about what comes out of Lincoln or Washington - it's about you. When you speak up in your community, post on social media, or simply have a conversation with a friend, you're helping carry the Republican message forward. Together, we can keep building momentum, keep growing our movement, and keep Nebraska red and America strong. Haile McAnally Communications Director, Nebraska Republican Party | | | | == | == | | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | == | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. | Peter,
This is a FINAL CALL for our last Western Mass training session of the year for candidates and Republican Town Committees.
Come for a coffee and snack and stay to learn: 1) How to grow your RTCs ahead of the convention 2) What targeted districts the MassGOP is focusing on next year, and 3) How to help our Republican candidates win next November
Join us at 11AM at the fabulous Tony & Penny's Restaurant, right off the highway in Ludlow. We'll be covering data, door-knocking, fundraising, and Numinar, the MassGOP's voter contact software for 2025.
[RSVP here or at the button below](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zFWPM8x-XYIJ5FjUyJEBt94X5NaOiWsagN1YwXNaP3azf6EA2JR8DgHLhm_obw1wv0An9ttQuXL_cgJSMk3Cgc2VlNpkjQxaUZPRBpJi6Tk4Pn9i3ybn_voEqXy4_bROwJ6dHXI5tfhmDV5y1kFOfhk9JsgcGPuhcNTNZ4oceZ_CTkP4GmGlMu6TFYQJynbt0M2rJm3HqTglt_GVOQWsD7PZdnwvs6Ijcv1_4ixt76pOUQNgJMCOn4zkes-2_HXuDuX7VmfLoVY=&c=Lw8CpIh6FgyMsG7uxGVDOtSCkeBdiOory9ekQ_bYRHey9ii0pMA1bg==&ch=yBcnVLT2TTphh3V5wpQlrn_TTlPUvCFRyzsM0XSTW16zBwxE8p-V8A==) so we can set up your email to learn the system before we begin! name: Aaron Regunberg from All right, then, I'll go to hell
subject: JRR Tolkien has a message for us: Don’t give in to Trump
body:
How rereading The Lord of the Rings is helping me resist despair

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..2DY2iIXAhnBxkOx7YZfSmbezfVOVb_aFK2K68i7kxhc?) for more
---
# [JRR Tolkien has a message for us: Don't give in to Trump](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=175152859&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MTUyODU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk0OTYwODUsImV4cCI6MTc2MjA4ODA4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LJYqMVkXoLtPDks3zu3Ne7Sl_QWsepZryWKkNaDthq0)
### How rereading The Lord of the Rings is helping me resist despair
| | [Aaron Regunberg](https://substack.com/@aaronregunberg)
---
| Oct 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@aaronregunberg)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=175152859&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MTUyODU5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTQ5NjA4NSwiZXhwIjoxNzYyMDg4MDg1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDk4MTE3MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.UTaNRR-INkBa9cGqjvwWxKd46DyybCegCJ0Oeq5shvQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=175152859&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MTUyODU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk0OTYwODUsImV4cCI6MTc2MjA4ODA4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LJYqMVkXoLtPDks3zu3Ne7Sl_QWsepZryWKkNaDthq0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=175152859&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MTUyODU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk0OTYwODUsImV4cCI6MTc2MjA4ODA4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LJYqMVkXoLtPDks3zu3Ne7Sl_QWsepZryWKkNaDthq0)
---
| | [](https://substack..c7M079UjNnyDeCDn7ZN-m2tSxZfB3wu-rnNQlOovz00?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/aaronregunberg/p/jrr-tolkien-has-a-message-for-us?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Amidst so much dark news, I wanted to share a lighter piece I wrote for _[The Nation](https://substack.com/redirect/c6287071-29f9-4072-bd36-4aad4b08fbce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ that was inspired by my recent reread of _The Lord of the Rings_. If you're a huge geek like me, I think you'll enjoy it. And even if you're not, it still might be worth a read, if you've been looking for ways to hang onto hope lately. Wishing you the best in these trying times.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hYXJvbnJlZ3VuYmVyZy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3NTE1Mjg1OSwicyI6NDk4MTE3MCwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTQ5NjA4NSwiZXhwIjoyMDc1MDcyMDg1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.AYYbHaP8heykfqAim8GO4MS2H6_ph9nFc7FXrA2VsSE?)
* * *
When I started rereading _The Lord of the Rings_ , I wasn't looking for spiritual takeaways. I was after a bit of escapism--a chance to decamp from the escalating nightmares of our reality to the fantasy stomping grounds of my childhood.
But Middle-earth is not a light holiday destination. It's a world being overrun by forces of evil. The same can be said of lots of fantasy worlds; that's the thing about a genre-defining piece of literature--it sets the conventions for the stories that come. But JRR Tolkien remains unique in the degree to which his great work focuses not just on the overwhelming threat of a powerful villain but on the despair that such a threat generates in the hearts of those who must choose whether or not to stand against it.
Having not read the books in well over a decade, I was surprised by how the choice whether or not to give into despair in the face of darkness operates as the central organizing principle in Tolkien's universe and the fulcrum around which the entire story pivots.
In _The Lord of the Rings_ , the Big Bad, Sauron, does not want to destroy all the peoples of Middle-earth. Rather, he is seeking to break their will to resist him (as he had done to the men of the East and the [oliphaunt](https://substack.com/redirect/cc31cd7c-81ad-4be9-bdfd-c6a29ad42894?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-riding [Haradrim of the South](https://substack.com/redirect/3134ff5d-0ee4-484c-bbae-50673a281f64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). To this end, despair is his most effective weapon. Sauron's chief lieutenants, the [Nazgul](https://substack.com/redirect/045b52ad-e977-4bd7-adde-795d3c5d7342?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), are not very powerful in a physical sense; as Tolkien describes, "Their peril is almost entirely due to the unreasoning fear which they inspire." Sauron's priority when he launches his assault on Gondor is to send a "great cloud stream[ing] slowly westward from the Black Land, devouring light" to ensure "all hearts in the City were oppressed." And when Sauron finds a way to communicate with the steward of Gondor, Denethor, through a palantir (yes, Peter Thiel seems to self-consciously associate himself with Middle-earth's forces of corruption, which certainly qualifies as one of those escalating nightmares mentioned above), Sauron's strategy is to convince him that "against the Power that now arises there is no victory," a despair in Denethor's mind that soon leads to the self-immolation of his body.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/72db03a1-0bb2-4ce6-aae7-1791648a91d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Denethor, covered in oil, about to light himself on fire. Don't be like Denethor.
So, yes, there's profound despair in the world of Tolkien, who was, after all, a World War I veteran who lost nearly all his boyhood friends at the Somme. And yet, to anyone struggling in this moment, I would strongly recommend picking up these books. Because inherent to any discussion of despair is a discussion of its opposite, hope. And rereading _The Lord of the Rings_ has helped to renew my commitment to the practice of hope in what often feels like a relentlessly hopeless age.
The universe of Tolkien's Middle-earth is composed of both a Seen (material) world and an Unseen (spiritual) world. In the Seen world, the regular laws of physics mostly apply. But in the Unseen world, it is primarily the moral value of our decisions that act on and cause consequences to the universe. Between the two, it is the Unseen world that is the [truer and more fundamental](https://substack.com/redirect/23399a49-7037-499d-beef-4f15f11cc102?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg); in Tolkien's legendarium, spiritual power always has the last word. In _The Lord of the Rings,_ therefore, a person's choice to do the right thing, to continue fighting for good, to resist evil despite seemingly insurmountable odds--in a word, to hope--affects the material results of their struggle.
As one example of this principle, we can contrast the end of Denethor, despairing and alone, with that of Theoden, King of the Rohirim. As Theoden leads his men to relieve the siege of Minis Tirith, there is a moment--as the riders of Rohan, seemingly too late, come upon the vast armies of Mordor breaking through the gates of the city--where Merry, a hobbit, watches Theoden wage this internal battle. Tolkien writes:
> The king sat motionless, gazing upon the agony of Minis Tirith, as if stricken suddenly by anguish, or by dread. He seemed to shrink down, cowed by age. Merry himself felt as if a great weight of horror and doubt had settled on him. ... Perhaps Theoden would quail, bow his old head, turn, slink away to hide in the hills. Then suddenly Merry felt it at last, beyond doubt: a change. Wind was in his face! Light was glimmering. ... The bent shape of the king sprang suddenly erect. Tall and proud he seemed again. ... He seized a great horn from Guthlaf his banner-bearer, and he blew such a blast upon it that it burst asunder. And straightway all the horns in the host were lifted up in music.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/750c2dfb-c6d6-4af4-ae54-54401fc1b67a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_A sword-day, a red day, ere the sun rises! Ride now, ride now! Ride to Gondor!_
Unlike Denethor, Theoden overcame his despair, inspired his men to do the same, and led them in a victorious charge that in turn instilled terror among the forces of Mordor. Sauron's host--who based on their numbers would have carried the day had they just continued fighting--fled, handing victory on the Pelannor Fields to the good guys. The side that held onto hope won; the side that gave in to fear lost.
Of course, there's an obvious response to any attempt to draw real-life lessons from _The Lord of the Rings_ , which I posed to myself upon realizing, with some embarrassment, that I was starting to absorb the internal logic of a fantasy series: We don't live in the magical universe of Middle-earth; we live in this garbage fire of a real world, where making the choice to hope very much does not guarantee victory.
The longer I've reflected on this, however, the more it's occurred to me that this connection--between one's spiritual choice to fight and the physical results of that fight--actually does exist in our world. Just like in _The Lord of the Rings_ , war in the real world often comes down to will; how many times--in Vietnam, Afghanistan, Ukraine--have we seen weaker forces beat back far stronger ones simply because they maintained a greater will to keep fighting? This happens in politics, too. Indeed, it's arguably the story of Trump. After he lost the 2020 election, he should have been broken, defeated, with no chance of returning to the White House. But he refused to give up, and--like Sauron reentering Mordor to rebuild his power--essentially willed his horrifying comeback into existence.
This connection also helps explain why Trump's second term has been so disastrous--because unlike during his first term, most elite institutions are choosing _not_ to fight. Whereas Theoden overcame his fear and led his men to victory, Big Law firms, elite universities, major media companies, and far too often the leadership of the ostensible opposition party have slunk away to hide in the hills or pulled a Saruman and outright joined the forces of darkness. Trump's greatest triumphs lie in these preemptive capitulations, because--like in Tolkien's moral universe, where one's spiritual choices often matter more than the physical results those choices produce--every time these cowards give in to Trump's authoritarian advances, it actualizes a more authoritarian reality by strengthening Trump's perceived power and ratcheting up the despair experienced by the rest of us.
In contrast, when Americans have chosen to fight back, we've regularly succeeded, at least to some degree, in weakening the regime by making its ultimate victory seem that much less inevitable. We saw this most recently with Jimmy Kimmel's return to ABC following massive and sustained public outcry. We saw it with the [pink shirt sandwich guy](https://substack.com/redirect/4dfd974e-f279-4f33-9162-f27a059c345a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the DC grand jury's refusal to indict him. And we've seen it on the unfortunately too-rare occasions when Democrats have taken clear, courageous stands--like, for example, when Senator Chris Van Hollen's mid-April trip to El Salvador to visit Kilmar Abrego Garcia (who remains [imprisoned](https://substack.com/redirect/081e9b94-ff47-4ce5-bc29-b0cb73745bdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in an ICE detention center) was immediately followed by a major drop in Trump's approval rating on immigration.
If the only way Trump can conclusively win is by convincing us not to fight back in the first place, then every act of resistance matters. It sounds trite, but that doesn't make it less true. Every time we choose hope over despair, and put that choice into practice, our decision echoes out across the Unseen world with real consequences for the Seen one. (Or, if you're not yet _Rings_ -pilled and want a more materialist translation: Every time you contribute to the opposition in visible ways, you make it easier and more likely that others will join in next time.)
In this age of nightmares, the siren song of despair is tempting, and resisting it takes work. But _The Lord of the Rings_ reminds us that in every way, the case for hope--the maintenance of which is a necessary (if not sufficient) victory in and of itself--is the more pragmatic option.
So let's end the debate, just as my favorite _Lord of the Rings_ character--and, I strongly suspect, Tolkien's favorite, too--Sam Gamgee did during his and Frodo's last, desperate push through the depths of Mordor to the cracks of Mount Doom.
> Sam could not sleep and he held a debate with himself. ... 'It's all quite useless. You are the fool, going on hoping and toiling. You could have lain down and gone to sleep together days ago, if you hadn't been so dogged. But you'll die just the same, or worse. You might just as well lie down now and give it up. You'll never get to the top anyway.'
> 'I'll get there, if I leave everything but my bones behind,' said Sam. 'And I'll carry Mr. Frodo up myself, if it breaks my back and heart. So stop arguing!' ...
> No more debates disturbed his mind. He knew all the arguments of despair and would not listen to them. His will was set, and only death would break it.
We have some dark years ahead of us. Whether we allow them to also be despairing years is a choice--our choice. We must set our wills.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d252d863-0738-423b-9e52-7f1b984b0b8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's not easy. But every choice we make to keep going is itself a strike against Trump.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hYXJvbnJlZ3VuYmVyZy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3NTE1Mjg1OSwicyI6NDk4MTE3MCwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTQ5NjA4NSwiZXhwIjoyMDc1MDcyMDg1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.AYYbHaP8heykfqAim8GO4MS2H6_ph9nFc7FXrA2VsSE?)

name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: A quick update for you
body:
We knew Charlie’s mission would live on.

| | |
---
Friend, We knew Charlie's mission would live on. _But we didn't expect this..._ In just two weeks, more than 121,000 students have reached out to start or join a Turning Point USA chapter at their college or high school.
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1vkhh6uda4hn4sfsb44u49olofbkh2ri9ot07lo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sli60o76c3h2bs)
---
Young Americans -- from high schools to college campuses -- are raising their hands and saying: **_" I'm ready to lead."_** And thanks to you -- many of them already are. Friend, your prayers... your generosity... You've helped us meet this moment with activism kits, leadership resources, and boldness. Charlie dreamed of a Turning Point USA chapter in every college and high school in America. Now, it's within reach.
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z32gi264s251kbd2vf7oj66fpuutfn3a40i67jj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sli60o76c3h2bs)
---
Our movement was already strong, but no one has ever seen anything like this before...And it's moving faster than anyone expected. From high school students launching Club America chapters to college students organizing with urgency... **The youth movement Charlie built is gaining unstoppable momentum.** **And Friend, behind every new chapter ... is someone like you -- making sure students have what they need to lead.** We are _deeply grateful_ for you. And we promise -- we're not slowing down.
---
**For Charlie,** Andrew Sypher
Vice President of Field Operations Turning Point USA
---
---
[**Support Turning Point USA**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcl9l4aepdb81epg11pb3g7tn3tjnrjbaa0vsgq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sli60o76c3h2bs) **P.S.** If you've already helped -- by sponsoring an activism kit or becoming a monthly donor -- **thank you.** Your generosity is equipping students, launching chapters, and honoring Charlie's mission in the most tangible way possible. We couldn't do this without you. But if you haven't had the chance yet -- _and you feel called to act..._ **Here is a powerful way you can help:** **[Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit-- including leadership tools, Constitutions, flags, and chapter gear -- for a new student chapter...](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcrp81cfjv2fp0v6l9l1b6app0ri7ahbnfcnm8q8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sli60o76c3h2bs)** **Again, if you've already stepped forward to help -- ****_thank you._** Your impact is already being felt on campuses and in high schools across America. For Charlie. For the next generation. For America.
---
[ 1 KIT = $25](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc692kih8ku49q6pjo3u6331alvjfa9sl0v119bg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sli60o76c3h2bs)
---
[ 2 KITS = $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdv7ej82dac8rrc8b27b4p4v2ib9k9ad3rj8o9d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sli60o76c3h2bs)
---

clean_body: We knew Charlie’s mission would live on. | | | Friend, We knew Charlie's mission would live on. But we didn't expect this... In just two weeks, more than 121,000 students have reached out to start or join a Turning Point USA chapter at their college or high school. Young Americans -- from high schools to college campuses -- are raising their hands and saying: " I'm ready to lead." And thanks to you -- many of them already are. Friend, your prayers... your generosity... You've helped us meet this moment with activism kits, leadership resources, and boldness. Charlie dreamed of a Turning Point USA chapter in every college and high school in America. Now, it's within reach. Our movement was already strong, but no one has ever seen anything like this before...And it's moving faster than anyone expected. From high school students launching Club America chapters to college students organizing with urgency... The youth movement Charlie built is gaining unstoppable momentum. And Friend, behind every new chapter ... is someone like you -- making sure students have what they need to lead. We are deeply grateful for you. And we promise -- we're not slowing down. For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Vice President of Field Operations Turning Point USA P.S. If you've already helped -- by sponsoring an activism kit or becoming a monthly donor -- thank you. Your generosity is equipping students, launching chapters, and honoring Charlie's mission in the most tangible way possible. We couldn't do this without you. But if you haven't had the chance yet -- and you feel called to act... Here is a powerful way you can help: Again, if you've already stepped forward to help -- thank you. Your impact is already being felt on campuses and in high schools across America. For Charlie. For the next generation. For America. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: The polls show this race is tied, but now Soros is getting involved

body:
I’ve faced some truly tough challenges before Friend, but I think this could be the hardest mountain I’ll ever have to climb...

| | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrtmumnqalvdv8ioffme326j7uep9fjn174mtg78_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sli60o76c3h2bs)

I've faced some truly **tough** challenges before Friend, but I think this could be the hardest mountain I'll ever have to climb...

I was legally barred from accepting _any_ campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was _**RAKING IN**_ millions and **millions** of dollars! I'm not kidding - _**a Soros-backed group gave Spanberger $500K all in one shot, Friend!**_

As a devout Christian, I wouldn't lie to you. So, please believe me when I tell you this is a really __**BAD**__ situation! _The truth is, Spanberger has**bottomless** dark money to rely on. _She can run to Soros, the Clintons, and every liberal in Hollywood to fill her campaign coffers to the brim!__

_This is a BAD situation that will only get worse if folks like you don 't step up to the plate!_ I'm coming to you today with a gracious plea from the bottom of my heart; **[**please send in any amount you can to help me and my team make up this fundraising difference:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zricimebhubtonf21fsreulaabrjbtt9m4nqv018_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sli60o76c3h2bs)**

Someone like me was never supposed to make it this far. **At 17, I dropped out of high school.** My parents, a tough Army General and an even tougher schoolteacher, gave me two choices: **Go back to school, or get a job.** So I went to work at a fine-dining establishment __**some of you may know as Waffle House.**__

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | South Carolina can’t afford to wait.America can’t afford to wait. It’s Nancy Mace. Someone like me was never supposed to make it this far. At 17, I dropped out of high school. My parents, a tough Army General and an even tougher schoolteacher, gave me two choices: Go back to school, or get a job. So I went to work at a fine-dining establishment some of you may know as Waffle House. Simply put, I’ve had to work for everything I have ever had in life. Jesus carried me through trauma, heartbreak, single motherhood, public failure, and private grief. He carried mewhen I was diagnosed with PTSD. He carried me when I moved four times to keep my children safe. And when I had nothing left to give,He filled me with living water. Twenty-five years ago, I made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel. I got here the hard way. And I’ve been FIGHTING ever since: 💥 I go toe-to-toe with Fake News CNN anchors on live TV.💥 I fight every single day for President Trump’s agenda. 💥 I’ve suffered DEATH THREATS for fighting to keep MEN out of women’s bathrooms. This isn’t about headlines. I’ve had a target on my back since I took on the establishment, but now they’re serious. They will stop at nothing to silence me. Dems are hurling MILLIONS against me, and establishment Republicans are throwing their support behind RINOs just to shut me down. The battle is just getting started. I can’t do this without you. Every dollar fuels our movement, whether it’s spreading new yard signs across the state or buying pizza and water for my grassroots volunteers. I wasn’t born with a silver spoon in my mouth. But I’ve never given up. Let’sHOLD THE LINEand make history together. Thank you for standing with me. — Nancy | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR | | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492 |

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhi31i5vtcg1m2pzbq2nqj6h9l09rdn6fwlvn8v4w9rvg6j6yg5z7jsmiddya7t3d3o0j5t9queqhd76w2wnjn&__stmp=t3k5gl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=1wduekwl7wti2v3y97zhy93wopu96scqkr66ofynjyx4tiahl4oeons7it4ilft6qs10uucjvtcnrjwtoquobpv7igq4zeshp1tsldy55avmfvcdymbar40a619tpn6s58hcf9yim31a8djm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhi31i5vtcg1m2pzbq2nqj6h9l09rdn6fwlvn8v4w9rvg6j6yg5z7jsmiddya7t3d3o0j5t9queqhd76w2wnjn&__stmp=t3k5gl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=rd06mgksptgtvos2j0z85jbtvz17aj5zyvnu8xkvbqv8xx04dfp9uco98a009wehqvt3loo3p7h5l9vwj1rghm4vuwu1xv6pb0uzyqh7xjsr4f6ub2iwfuybu6x68chgfudgozyp9s7epbknvhjt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=edb8jn9ebfryoljni7m73uyww4bsfyj3uee7bdniqvkonjgr4x7ilakxffp3sty92noyrsgykn388tsx4f4l6ixiv28oc9e139taeyb6o4ahsiwpnjggszsx6suk72zec2l9y3opd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k5gl&__onlt=h)

subject: Just asking you to confirm

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qvxl80k04727em9rfrwv9bypfc7spckufqhxiokmnedox0t2ddnvkkv0s2caxztlprakqcsp7&__stmp=t3k65k&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=qwikcdl711siwdxfvfxxe8rtkkts310yyllle7cczbxeoze6sno5xzddyp1nxa8xa3jrnf84ava0aoahv5a5z3fd0aingf0765c8i4uak3vchsjrfd1jxksddvpfj25wl15&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qvxl80k04727em9rfrwv9bypfc7spckufqhxiokmnedox0t2ddnvkkv0s2caxztlprakqcsp7&__stmp=t3k65k&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=11qfvsq9v6vlwb4p56a1juj30fffru3fi78fat3k9hjfqg70l1pr1l2jakt72iboyr4symb28z0xpybg3gy7ow1s33hes005wgo4pebgj085arim2nz0n8znsv10&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=ukxuchlat4j9yygo88wtu0jm58lr46ka6lp2o8v9mc0mpv9hu0kaax3t8n0nfrum29o0uu84jm2fnfr0b5ob4mix9370bxwayx1fmqlav7buz8ov9759m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3k65k&__onlt=h)

Trump stated that women should just “tough it out” and that there’s no downside to not taking “Tylenol,” but that’s simply not true. **When a fever goes untreated in a pregnant woman, it can lead to miscarriages, birth defects, preterm labor, and more.**

Dr. Linda Ecker, an esteemed author and a professor of obstetrics and gynecology at the University of Washington, shared her insights with _PBS_. She emphasized that major health organizations, including the American College of Obstetrics and Gynecology, the Royal College of Obstetrics and Gynecology, and the Society for Maternal Fetal Medicine, have thoroughly examined the data and consistently **reaffirmed their support for Tylenol as the safest option for pain and fever control during pregnancy.**

**We can’t accept this harmful conduct, Peter. Trump has no interest in protecting women and babies. If he did, he would spend less time placing unnecessary blame on mothers and more time implementing policies such as federal maternity leave, increased access to healthcare, gun safety measures, food security, REAL research, etc...**

Some experts are concerned that this administration will be targeting epidurals next – and we have no reason to believe that won’t happen. Our best defense will be getting more _**women**_ in the rooms where that potential policy will eventually be introduced – to block it at every turn. We will desperately need women representing ALL American women when and if that happens.

[**We cannot afford to sit back and watch this administration continue to attack women, our safety, our well-being, and our health. It's time to act. Support our pro-WOMEN women candidates by donating $20.25 now. We have no time to waste.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116498203/573629055/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251003Fwd_HBM_10_90DO_G_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjZWJmNjMyLTVmYTAtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=m5dvn8e2mIVW_mZbpY7dW3-YWNtKTOL8SUdOBmlkP2M=)

body:
Our apocalyptic prophecy has come to fruition. MAGA is opening the gates of hell in the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election and is about to pull off one of the biggest electoral coups in history
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017UNXaTiKj8euoxsxgmQLGoz3dAOAJywenfkrnLeYqX8wbR1nAoI_kl1nsgShFN3W5YyRB-tBk5zn-EZLxli63LicC8tZUqtVkEiveeHxYPajRwAkPFw84h3tVxELBmXISZzJArgZQVAgZJ0yBDf-VDQbSeAcQRJKVsFz8KDC9_1DCYY-T8y7Lu26Lq6WUHeGA-4HxWUGBm_DzNfpI_uNmTdBRx__3c0I&c=FDoUp9M277nK6ffKpWGzqmj-Ap-xPMgIRgUVPDSpZHZ5CjGKecZQsQ==&ch=mdYfJfnhWXHRntNT8NHjdXYg2A0PAmFiuy_GbiBj2YicxnSQq70Dew==)
---
| Peter,
For the last few months, we issued a dire warnings to any Democrats willing to listen:
MAGA is opening the gates of hell in the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election and is weeks away from pulling off one of the biggest electoral coups in American history.
We knew this was coming because if MAGA wins and seizes the PA Supreme Court, Pennsylvania is theirs for the taking. Democrats never win Pennsylvania again. 19 electoral college votes in the penultimate swing state--gone forever.
These warnings went largely unheeded... now our apocalyptic prophecy has come to fruition. An unprecedented surprise attack by MAGA is in full swing and democrats have been caught completely off guard. We are hanging on for dear life.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017UNXaTiKj8euoxsxgmQLGoz3dAOAJywenfkrnLeYqX8wbR1nAoI_kl1nsgShFN3W5YyRB-tBk5zn-EZLxli63LicC8tZUqtVkEiveeHxYPajRwAkPFw84h3tVxELBmXISZzJArgZQVAgZJ0yBDf-VDQbSeAcQRJKVsFz8KDC9_1DCYY-T8y7Lu26Lq6WUHeGA-4HxWUGBm-qQ6BqgqI_9_bdHjOqAZrc&c=FDoUp9M277nK6ffKpWGzqmj-Ap-xPMgIRgUVPDSpZHZ5CjGKecZQsQ==&ch=mdYfJfnhWXHRntNT8NHjdXYg2A0PAmFiuy_GbiBj2YicxnSQq70Dew==)
---
| | | | Right now, Defend Our Courts is one of the only democratic organizations organizing the defense of PA's democratic Supreme Court justices and we are facing nothing short of a tidal wave of MAGA spending.
Thankfully, enough small dollar democratic grassroots donors listened to our warning and we are now a serious player in this race having raised $1.5 million.
It's a start, but if we want to continue putting up a fight as MAGA spending climbs into the tens and soon hundreds of millions our fundraising needs to go supersonic.
