subject: In court this week
body:
Defending abortion rights in Kansas | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116513658/573667836/2141984067?sourceid=1150908&utm_campaign=25emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=kansas&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmQxMmU4Yy02YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z1KovfGQb6zArYj9Bir9OYQ4AArtKe5eDnzZBhn0pM=&emci=673fc776-eb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f2d12e8c-6ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116513659/573667839/2141984067?sourceid=1150908&utm_campaign=25emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=kansas&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmQxMmU4Yy02YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z1KovfGQb6zArYj9Bir9OYQ4AArtKe5eDnzZBhn0pM=&emci=673fc776-eb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f2d12e8c-6ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter

This week, we returned to court in Kansas to challenge abortion restrictions that delay care, invade patients’ privacy, and force providers to share false and dangerous information. | [**DEFEND ABORTION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116513660/573667842/2141984067?sourceid=1150908&utm_campaign=25emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=kansas&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmQxMmU4Yy02YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z1KovfGQb6zArYj9Bir9OYQ4AArtKe5eDnzZBhn0pM=&emci=673fc776-eb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f2d12e8c-6ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237 "DEFEND ABORTION")
---
[**The Center has been fighting for abortion rights in Kansas for over 10 years.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116513661/573667843/2141984067?sourceid=1150908&utm_campaign=25emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=kansas&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmQxMmU4Yy02YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z1KovfGQb6zArYj9Bir9OYQ4AArtKe5eDnzZBhn0pM=&emci=673fc776-eb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f2d12e8c-6ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237) Here's the timeline of this fight:
* **2015:** We filed a case in Kansas state court on behalf of abortion providers, arguing that the Kansas Constitution protects personal autonomy, including the right to abortion.
* **2019:** The Kansas Supreme Court agreed. In a landmark ruling—secured by the Center—the court recognized that the state constitution protects the fundamental right to personal autonomy, including the right to abortion, making Kansas a beacon for reproductive freedom even before _Roe v. Wade_ fell.
* **2022:** Kansas voters reaffirmed those protections by overwhelmingly rejecting an anti-abortion ballot measure that would have rescinded state constitutional protection for the right to abortion.
* **2023:** We filed _Hodes & Nauser v. Kobach_ and a few months later, a Kansas court blocked the onerous laws—including government-scripted misinformation and arbitrary waiting periods—after our lawsuit demonstrated the harms they cause.
* **Now:** The state is back in court defending these laws, and we are fighting to ensure they remain blocked. This trial is the next major test to protect those hard-won rights from being hollowed out by harmful restrictions.

[**HELP US FIGHT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116513662/573667844/2141984067?sourceid=1150908&utm_campaign=25emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=kansas&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmQxMmU4Yy02YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z1KovfGQb6zArYj9Bir9OYQ4AArtKe5eDnzZBhn0pM=&emci=673fc776-eb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f2d12e8c-6ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237 "HELP US FIGHT")
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116513663/573667845/2141984067?sourceid=1150908&utm_campaign=25emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=kansas&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmQxMmU4Yy02YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z1KovfGQb6zArYj9Bir9OYQ4AArtKe5eDnzZBhn0pM=&emci=673fc776-eb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f2d12e8c-6ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)
Your partnership makes long fights like this one possible. [**With you by our side, we can keep fighting—and winning—against restrictions that deny people the ability to make decisions about their own bodies and futures.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116513664/573667846/2141984067?sourceid=1150908&utm_campaign=25emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=kansas&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmQxMmU4Yy02YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z1KovfGQb6zArYj9Bir9OYQ4AArtKe5eDnzZBhn0pM=&emci=673fc776-eb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=f2d12e8c-6ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)

With gratitude,

Alice Wang
Senior Staff Attorney

clean_body: Defending abortion rights in Kansas | | | ---|--- Peter This week, we returned to court in Kansas to challenge abortion restrictions that delay care, invade patients’ privacy, and force providers to share false and dangerous information. | "DEFEND ABORTION" Here's the timeline of this fight: 2015: We filed a case in Kansas state court on behalf of abortion providers, arguing that the Kansas Constitution protects personal autonomy, including the right to abortion. 2019: The Kansas Supreme Court agreed. In a landmark ruling—secured by the Center—the court recognized that the state constitution protects the fundamental right to personal autonomy, including the right to abortion, making Kansas a beacon for reproductive freedom even before Roe v. Wade fell. 2022: Kansas voters reaffirmed those protections by overwhelmingly rejecting an anti-abortion ballot measure that would have rescinded state constitutional protection for the right to abortion. 2023: We filed Hodes & Nauser v. Kobach and a few months later, a Kansas court blocked the onerous laws—including government-scripted misinformation and arbitrary waiting periods—after our lawsuit demonstrated the harms they cause. Now:** The state is back in court defending these laws, and we are fighting to ensure they remain blocked. This trial is the next major test to protect those hard-won rights from being hollowed out by harmful restrictions. "HELP US FIGHT" Your partnership makes long fights like this one possible. With gratitude, Alice Wang Senior Staff Attorney "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

body:
Please read this.
Peter —
I need you to hear about the reporting from last week:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95878?refcode=em20251003-9518&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9518%2E614464%2ECMgzVV)
**CBS News is reporting that the Trump administration improperly released my personal records from my time in the Navy. It’s a shameful attempt to smear my record.**
This is a wildly unprecedented — and blatantly illegal — weaponization of the federal government. All part of an effort to ensure that the president’s preferred candidate wins an election.
These military records detail my early life, and go so far as to include my Social Security number and insurance records. There are supposed to be several layers of checks set up to prevent something like this.
This isn’t just about me. Any member of the United States military that the Trump administration sees as an enemy can have their personal data exposed.
And it’s incredibly dangerous.

name: Prophets of Doom
subject: Dems ignored our apocalyptic warning…now it just got real
body:
Our apocalyptic prophecy has come to fruition.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ii80n5fD8d-G8Sw5823xit86sOxG0rk8euvdQEdZd6B3o8sBDuqVVULW6vtlrFcUu2CpGrGCBu_40IuyGV5v6mQcU3Obxe-Il1JbnDgmzq1b9WS-jlC9mEL130-mNMSERBHdryEcDJLtHN4Wbiwzdea2V7fESdLx49Dzrl7ehRxjYiSvA6MWOZHVTetlxbdQiHfTH3-imnZR7T6Zw5ZoNj-hJBcZavgVbSuMZxStRhl9Ca6LmrYvKA==&c=8WlSrvkRphVyoMMYpgZJHExFqtwLgBR8oKsoCMIxTM38boU-Z6cQJw==&ch=JITY-lc6E3PdL86WZT7gDOVfVYtx20TWPrDRNCTKb_E3ckKrJcgs9A==)

| Friend,
For the last few months, we issued a dire warnings to any Democrats willing to listen:
MAGA is opening the gates of hell in the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election and is weeks away from pulling off one of the biggest electoral coups in American history.
We knew this was coming because if MAGA wins and seizes the PA Supreme Court, Pennsylvania is theirs for the taking. Democrats never win Pennsylvania again. 19 electoral college votes in the penultimate swing state--gone forever.
These warnings went largely unheeded... now our apocalyptic prophecy has come to fruition. An unprecedented surprise attack by MAGA is in full swing and democrats have been caught completely off guard. We are hanging on for dear life.
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ii80n5fD8d-G8Sw5823xit86sOxG0rk8euvdQEdZd6B3o8sBDuqVVULW6vtlrFcUu2CpGrGCBu_40IuyGV5v6mQcU3Obxe-Il1JbnDgmzq1b9WS-jlC9mEL130-mNMSERBHdryEcDJLtHN4Wbiwzdea2V7fESdLx49Dzrl7ehRxjYiSvA6MWOZHVTetlxbdQiHfTH3-imnZR7T6Zw5ZoNj-hJBcZavgVLmdG72YHLeaSFQLp4m7K-g==&c=8WlSrvkRphVyoMMYpgZJHExFqtwLgBR8oKsoCMIxTM38boU-Z6cQJw==&ch=JITY-lc6E3PdL86WZT7gDOVfVYtx20TWPrDRNCTKb_E3ckKrJcgs9A==)

| Right now, Defend Our Courts is one of the only democratic organizations organizing the defense of PA's democratic Supreme Court justices and we are facing nothing short of a tidal wave of MAGA spending.
Thankfully, enough small dollar democratic grassroots donors listened to our warning and we are now a serious player in this race having raised $1.5 million.
It's a start, but if we want to continue putting up a fight as MAGA spending climbs into the tens and soon hundreds of millions our fundraising needs to go supersonic.
We have 32 days to turn things around or it's game over for Democrats ever winning a Presidential election again. This is our last stand.
[If you've been waiting to make a contribution, this is your sign. We know we're asking a lot, but can you rush a contribution of $50 or whatever you can spare?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ii80n5fD8d-G8Sw5823xit86sOxG0rk8euvdQEdZd6B3o8sBDuqVVULW6vtlrFcUu2CpGrGCBu_40IuyGV5v6mQcU3Obxe-Il1JbnDgmzq1b9WS-jlC9mEL130-mNMSERBHdryEcDJLtHN4Wbiwzdea2V7fESdLx49Dzrl7ehRxjYiSvA6MWOZHVTetlxbdQiHfTH3-imnZR7T6Zw5ZoNj-hJBcZavgVVauWvyYIVqKZOSyfgGGiJg==&c=8WlSrvkRphVyoMMYpgZJHExFqtwLgBR8oKsoCMIxTM38boU-Z6cQJw==&ch=JITY-lc6E3PdL86WZT7gDOVfVYtx20TWPrDRNCTKb_E3ckKrJcgs9A==)

clean_body: Our apocalyptic prophecy has come to fruition. | | | | | == | Friend, For the last few months, we issued a dire warnings to any Democrats willing to listen: MAGA is opening the gates of hell in the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election and is weeks away from pulling off one of the biggest electoral coups in American history. We knew this was coming because if MAGA wins and seizes the PA Supreme Court, Pennsylvania is theirs for the taking. Democrats never win Pennsylvania again. 19 electoral college votes in the penultimate swing state--gone forever. These warnings went largely unheeded... now our apocalyptic prophecy has come to fruition. An unprecedented surprise attack by MAGA is in full swing and democrats have been caught completely off guard. We are hanging on for dear life. | | == | Right now, Defend Our Courts is one of the only democratic organizations organizing the defense of PA's democratic Supreme Court justices and we are facing nothing short of a tidal wave of MAGA spending. Thankfully, enough small dollar democratic grassroots donors listened to our warning and we are now a serious player in this race having raised $1.5 million. It's a start, but if we want to continue putting up a fight as MAGA spending climbs into the tens and soon hundreds of millions our fundraising needs to go supersonic. We have 32 days to turn things around or it's game over for Democrats ever winning a Presidential election again. This is our last stand. == | | == | | | == | == | This is MAGA's endgame, everything is on the line here. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. I am proud to have the endorsement of the Washoe County Republican Party, and I am grateful for their efforts to advance the conservative movement and elect Republican candidates! **They know that I am the only MAGA Conservative in this race who will back President Trump in Congress!**

We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together. **Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**

_The American People signed, sealed, and delivered an America-First Mandate to President Trump and Republicans last November, with a specific demand to deport illegal immigrants who have broken the law._

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=30ddb29e496a444a80261781190a796f&_e=bc-3cl0KQ05Vj-7Ehva-lZbmGNjT9ksWs90tqiGFjacpB9GR4KjEAYJlMfoE_Hl6kLon6Y0wUhrjkYZlBQh5Fsj4Lmxw5F-Fiu4U6f9UEs6ok4JsaxTh9CRqJS7ZLbBtRqp8_3ZgTfwD83qsc48j5kBpUMFgCKD78Cj_rkkm_XqXktSoI-IeRx2FqP350B79-B6gFPY4Xpl-foOteO7SQKni4DlLbYF3uGWCsXBPYILnpcTak_vIlvPpOqFl3_2lz0sBrYtG_fqufORxzhzIvUNmoolw4_jMqCkDSUHz0jG3J5Jt0UAzT3Z0sZs5p-BfTotYHr2uSo3QD6hRiZPIYZDbqUpZFCwQ57s5A-u-o3zZVihEsgT0-TIfn0FLyP49Zplc9bOayvGwzioR2kt3gKVcHxj9P4RqBbvjhGCviH0LQBHraF6cHVIxqOb6H16YKJRsCKzUWop0bYeSxWXzGfgztuZswtJJi3SOc9QoOjW_dECQBrH2rEcjRqTO_II-FieRbJh6BXXj3NX7gYNOH_tf7hCoBdnm_-0Fwg-7X00DWZ98fCTq1FPlsf7C02kG)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

name: Cori Bush
subject: They tried to silence us. We’re so back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act]
Peter,
Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for Congress in Missouri’s 1st Congressional District. St. Louis needs leaders who won't fail or take orders from billionaires. Are you with me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act]
I never imagined I’d be in politics. I’m the daughter of a union meat-cutter, a nurse for over a decade, a pastor, a survivor of gun violence, and a formerly unhoused single mom. I know the struggle of families who work hard and still get left out.
My fight began on the streets of Ferguson, where I stood day after day demanding justice and caring for my neighbors after Michael Brown was killed.
That’s what shaped me. That’s what brought me into this work. When my community asked me to run, together we defeated a 52-year dynasty and proved that regular people, not corporations or megadonors, could win. That’s why I ran in the first place—and why I’m stepping up again. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act]
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act]
As you read this, families and communities are being squeezed here in St. Louis. Groceries, rent, and utilities keep climbing, while wages stay the same. Violence, division, and attacks on our rights are pushing us to the breaking point.
But here’s what I know: St. Louis is built different. And so am I.
When you sent me to Washington, we moved resources home and stood up when it mattered most: from holding the first post-pandemic hearing on Medicare for All, to sleeping on the Capitol steps to extend the federal eviction moratorium, to standing with our neighbors after floods and disasters, and fighting to lower insulin prices. That’s what service looks like: helping people where they are.
This campaign isn’t about politics; it’s about the future of St. Louis and the special interests trying to take it away. There’s a lot at stake. Trump and his buddies are stripping away our rights, attacking our communities, and rigging the rules to benefit the wealthy and powerful. Our most vulnerable will pay the price.
So, we need a fighter who truly represents us.
I stand with the people. I don’t wait for permission. I rise when it’s hardest. Now, I’m running again to keep fighting for us. Can I count on you to become a founding donor by contributing to my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act]
In solidarity,
Cori Bush
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Join Team Cori today and sign up to volunteer. [https://www.coribush.org]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251003_Corilaunch1_act&recurring=1]

St. Louis, MO 63132
United States

name: Becca Balint
subject: Day Three
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
Peter— We’re now on day three of a government shutdown.

If you’re worried, scared, or downright furious, I’m with you.

This cruelty is not normal. Donald Trump wants to use this shutdown as cover to purge civil servants in mass firings and to dismantle federal agencies — which has always been his goal.

But any shutdown layoffs would be illegal . Trump has zero authority to fire federal workers.

And Republicans are still hoping you’re not paying attention as they try to rip healthcare away from tens of millions of Americans. However, Trump and his allies know these abuses of power are tanking their popularity. They’re weaker than they look.

I’m telling you, Peter — we can win this if we stand up and use our voices together. We can unseat crooked Republicans, take back a House majority, and get our government back to work for working people.

Republicans turned their back on Americans.

I refuse to stand by as they sell out millions of people.

If you can, please make a donation today to help us send a message to Republicans: This is not what the American people want. You can use this secure link: http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rab-em-oct2025 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rab-em-oct2025]

Thank you.

— Becca
beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com [beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com]

P.O. Box 291
Burlington, VT 05402

Hi there, it's Lisa Blunt Rochester.

I want to take a minute to personally explain to you what's happening with the federal government right now.

🔵 Funding for the federal government ran out at midnight last night, and it's the job of Congress to pass a new budget that funds critical services like Medicaid and Social Security, and restores the ACA subsidies that the Republicans cut in their big, ugly bill.

My good friend Phil Weiser is running to be the next Governor of Colorado — and I’m proud to give him my full endorsement.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116515664/573673576/1239926708?refcode=email_100325_shapiro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzAwNWJmNi02ZmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGk_--KrpsqL73_EX3rdfRYMPz40qIgm7hm0bcN1DPw=&emci=bcaef2dc-6aa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=1c005bf6-6fa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=51844520) Hey there, it's Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro. **I’m reaching out today because my good friend Phil Weiser is running to be the next Governor of Colorado — and I’m proud to give him my full endorsement.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116515668/573673579/1945231541?amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&refcode=email_100325_shapiro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzAwNWJmNi02ZmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGk_--KrpsqL73_EX3rdfRYMPz40qIgm7hm0bcN1DPw=) **Phil never hesitates to put Colorado first. He never shrinks from a fight when your rights are on the line. ****[That’s why I’m supporting him in this race, and I hope you’ll join me by donating today to support his campaign →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116515670/573673582/1945231541?amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&refcode=email_100325_shapiro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzAwNWJmNi02ZmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGk_--KrpsqL73_EX3rdfRYMPz40qIgm7hm0bcN1DPw=)** | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116515674/573673585/965323095?amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&refcode=email_100325_shapiro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzAwNWJmNi02ZmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGk_--KrpsqL73_EX3rdfRYMPz40qIgm7hm0bcN1DPw=)

As Attorney General, Phil has stepped up time and again to defend consumers and protect Coloradans’ rights and freedoms:
* He’s taken on powerful special interests, challenged fraud and unfair practices, and returned _millions_ of dollars back to the people of Colorado.

* He held polluters accountable to protect Colorado's land, air, and water, and preserve your natural resources.

* He enforced Colorado’s laws to protect your right to choose, fought restrictions on abortion medication, and pushed for an amendment to Colorado’s state constitution to protect access to reproductive health care.

* **And he’s on the front lines of the fight to defend your constitutional rights — beating the Trump administration in lawsuit after lawsuit to block illegal actions that harm you and the people you love.**

At this critical moment for our nation, Phil Weiser is the kind of leader Colorado needs.
Phil is fighting each and every day to defend your freedoms, to protect Colorado’s environment, to lower costs for hardworking families, and to stop the Trump administration from harming Coloradans.
Now listen, I know a thing or two about making the jump from AG to Governor, so I know that to win this race in Colorado, Phil is going to need your support.
Phil is running a grassroots campaign powered by people like you. Every dollar helps him reach more voters, push back against right-wing attacks, and make the case for a Colorado where everyone can thrive.
**[I’m proud to stand with Phil — and I hope you will too. Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help him win this race and keep up the fight for Colorado’s future.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116515678/573673589/1945231541?amounts=5,10,25,50,75,100,250,500&refcode=email_100325_shapiro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzAwNWJmNi02ZmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGk_--KrpsqL73_EX3rdfRYMPz40qIgm7hm0bcN1DPw=)**

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: The Seattle Times has endorsed our campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
Yesterday, The Seattle Times Editorial Board officially endorsed my reelection campaign for the King County Council! | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=9d8dcdd1a7&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2d7b7e1286a6/the-seattle-times-has-endorsed-our-campaign?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=4edc9a799b&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend

Yesterday, The Seattle Times editorial board officially **endorsed my reelection campaign for the King County Council**! [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=3811e7bb62&e=77eef70c61) [**_The Seattle Times editorial board recommends: Reagan Dunn for King County Council District 9_**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=45d72a23ed&e=77eef70c61)
Here's what they wrote: **_" For his bold leadership and stewardship of tax dollars, residents of King County's 9th District deserve Dunn as their council member." - Seattle Times 10/02/25_** **_[READ THE FULL ENDORSEMENT HERE!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=c0369640bd&e=77eef70c61)_**
The Times highlighted my leadership in demanding an audit of county contracts that exposed millions in waste and potential fraud, as well as my work to ensure county employees return to in-office work so that taxpayers can get the accountability they deserve.

I also appreciated the editorial board emphasizing the value of having an independent voice on the Council: **_" it's to the county's advantage to have an experienced and oftentimes dissenting voice on the County Council. Council member Reagan Dunn would be that needed voice for the 9th District." - Seattle Times 10/02/25_**

I'm so proud to add this endorsement to our campaign's current list of supporters, which includes police organizations, business associations, every single mayor represented in the 9th Council District, and many more! **Would you be willing to add your name to my endorsement list as well? **[ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN HERE](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=9f47fd2cf5&e=77eef70c61)** _._**

Friend, this endorsement does not mean it's time to sit back--it's time to take action! This race is critical to ensuring that common sense and fiscal accountability have a voice on the King County Council. **In the final full month of this race, would you be willing to support my campaign for reelection by **[**donating $15, $25, or $50**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=45d2957ef9&e=77eef70c61)**, or by **[**endorsing my campaign**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=8639fab292&e=77eef70c61)**?**

Thank you so much for your support!

Reagan Dunn
P.S. Help me spread the word about The Seattle Times endorsement with a quick $15 or $25 donation right now! [**DONATE HERE!**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=4295444576&e=77eef70c61)
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: As it stands, I’m simply out of options.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d7874b17440f4804a24f4b53a048cfed&_e=5FvIeDOScrNRijHbJbq7cShF359usOrcC0tT8HruA2X6MZ3GyzT9jnKlekFxRzrHG4yfzrjymxN8R9st4ugeu4Gy-TcO3W6sX2FttA2Qg3z8UQ1oQrGWZXqK7PATKS8dt-7wIqTzj0KydymAXXocvJ9QxxEoBFgfIlhwmYi4O-p3N5bqu6bCek7DOyM6Qu55ZfNTePY-qgm4Yj_I6KY10_E0IXEWQr2olg_JkFes17Td-z1J7uJ7qa9vWZdXLIGkRuqr-SwgKkc_1BojFcSXnnUvrVjsyoo6QKyPEjVpq2r2_GXzqFczfU3O0kUVkN0cJmPPrB2Zvsd-hE0msD17lfGQMAZN_4FOzfndv6BhTfx2DUO8d54usxX-W5OTLNbSwh76zMCH1G-gUdSnywQyfq87teiytQjYECruLJhnUMWk_02CEVcvNe92xnFwB0q0vVDdfsjin-25tsX_JR9Nf2d_jagBhR_32dgd69x8XRnuRFMhjs8j-dqoyquWM17wD_rkTkjLcbWI4k4QUe34W6hOqGU7Lx0MVpMtDdPOpYDDreVMnh4pw6H98yzudpJCqAMDXRxC_KSfLp-3PiPSIASfs4gBTVM2X84Rj9T7rzGH6ggkRbXu4YRKY3ZVQUbCjfhzaQzoZWUkzm2o9McHGA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d7874b17440f4804a24f4b53a048cfed&_e=5FvIeDOScrNRijHbJbq7cShF359usOrcC0tT8HruA2X6MZ3GyzT9jnKlekFxRzrHG4yfzrjymxN8R9st4ugeu4Gy-TcO3W6sX2FttA2Qg3z8UQ1oQrGWZXqK7PATKS8dt-7wIqTzj0KydymAXXocvJ9QxxEoBFgfIlhwmYi4O-p3N5bqu6bCek7DOyM6Qu55ZfNTePY-qgm4Yj_I6KY1034zqOuhW4rCifLZnOmulEkstu79Nt_9ZEqH3jC6YfB-1fEMW3VftHW65eVTPlB2umdSGM0f8IhFqExhiCy3kHYADAwhsLNMv3r8aOnSh9tEwazmmIilwMeaFcUYHbHUy2WrFRc8kubx1rmmwEec9m1IE8dbELf7VHvFoJbEktoXNpsiyfWTgiRjx2V-nQBcHkt30PV0Zzv091mM56v_B4cI3iEENA2OLQWrOf59_56_HeITLAm5d56dMgpE_fqGDL7945aZ5r3DfF23a2Cr9Nu7qZCGI-0PAh17Qo6N7IcUjDluSdvyDBbeLcXnxh-0MIEOfjV8OAD6T8BPPVIYZaPPRSDF2_Mh9l4IqS2N_wSPxmjxOoBqb6dRZVuQrOO19DEwWDnf73yi-tWrGyZEKphhwwOO2FIOKuZmzN-v2Dwn0Kmbl0O0nybWp5dBqIWwuA%3D%3D)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d7874b17440f4804a24f4b53a048cfed&_e=5FvIeDOScrNRijHbJbq7cShF359usOrcC0tT8HruA2X6MZ3GyzT9jnKlekFxRzrHG4yfzrjymxN8R9st4ugeu4Gy-TcO3W6sX2FttA2Qg3z8UQ1oQrGWZXqK7PATKS8dt-7wIqTzj0KydymAXXocvJ9QxxEoBFgfIlhwmYi4O-p3N5bqu6bCek7DOyM6Qu55ZfNTePY-qgm4Yj_I6KY101zLlRBuayG8heQAs8gchqBajnY5hqmJ9-uWSrp7tmgfn5qE3kPzm5CjTlzUzxPobUpJ8lvXlMxM4-_y4JwY2Uf5IzE7aIfXhv3hQ23glB08FdDllMi3UCHXEXv8ulNG9W9SToTx3FCAehYksnAvCUW2BkmNpDGKFO4sM7S9MF0yXYVgPpNltoWcyg6oAKWY7XFYHEQ5RO2ag6UM8GChh21neNYK_-2a2k1Im1ekSJFPN9UcbJ9aSrUaQmMkCHz05InzjELIpxxzK_7mu8oNAYX3hSYvuc6o0sgVxT0fmpqSbyPR3DUekbKc68W5HJ6WeEdPKYojtI47gzOxuMQzh32nDutdLagGd30fViznGRTmTK3H0oJEojW2eXnfOWEZEKSRXnE3R2osc-kJiKZ3E_-KNEFtNvuBjMXXB7pyaaiSZfVsnEv9DNrQRHighYEqyw%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: | Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Wes Moore
subject: Have you heard?
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=706%2E1086043%2EyfCJJY)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251003-1?refcode=em-20251003-1&refcode2=706_1086043_yfCJJY&akid=706%2E1086043%2EyfCJJY)
Hi Peter, you probably already heard the news: **I’m running for reelection for Governor of Maryland.**
Together, we’ve proven that progress is possible when we put people first. But Donald Trump is doubling down to push his agenda — and he’s already coming after states like ours and Democratic governors like me.
That’s why I’m running: because Maryland needs a governor who will stand up to Trump’s dangerous threats and protect the progress we’ve made together.
**[Will you chip in to our campaign today to prove we won’t bow down to bullies and we will stand up for Maryland?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251003-1?refcode=em-20251003-1&refcode2=706_1086043_yfCJJY&akid=706%2E1086043%2EyfCJJY)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251003-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20251003-1&refcode2=706_1086043_yfCJJY&akid=706%2E1086043%2EyfCJJY)**
Trump and Republicans in Washington are trying to erase our hard-fought progress, and I am already facing Republican opponents ready to join them in that fight.
I need you, Peter, if we’re going to be able to fight back. That’s why I have to ask:
**[Please, join our movement by making a contribution today. It will directly power our reelection campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251003-1?refcode=em-20251003-1&refcode2=706_1086043_yfCJJY&akid=706%2E1086043%2EyfCJJY)**
Thanks for being on this team!
Elevate,
Wes

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251003-1&t=2&refcode2=706_1086043_yfCJJY&akid=706%2E1086043%2EyfCJJY)**

name: Troy Downing
subject: I'm down to my last play

body:
That’s it... I’m throwing my final Hail Mary pass.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Q)That’s it... I’m throwing my final Hail Mary pass.
Peter, it’s not looking good. **We came up short of our Q3 fundraising goal, and I’m down to my last play.**
I was counting on grassroots Patriots like you to help run defense, but I guess I’m out of luck.
I’ve sent texts, sent emails, made phone calls... and I’ve heard nothing. It’s been **__RADIO SILENCE.__**
**THIS. WON’T. DO.**[ CHIP IN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) _I’m**NOT** a quitter_ \- I will keep fighting, even when my back is against the wall.

It's Troy Downing. I’m just a guy from Montana taking a huge leap of faith.
Peter, I'm also a U.S. Air Force combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian, a husband, and a proud dad.
**I've taken my seat in Congress, and I couldn’t be more honored to serve you!**
But, I still need to make one thing clear to my new colleagues: the American people are demanding real change. To do that, I need your help to shatter my next goal. I’m asking you, person to person, please **CHIP IN TODAY.** [Whether it’s $5 or $100, EVERYTHING HELPS.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-SZlHrl_uuWJfF_v5L8aOw)[CHIP IN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[You’re on deck, Peter. Will you help me crush this next goal?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Congressman Troy Downing| |

## Next week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Coming up next week, Monday I"m discussing the latest on the government shut down with Chicks on the Right. Then Tuesday I'm joined by special guest Eric Trump for a great conversation. Thursday we've got our panel, featuring Lyndsay Keith, Rob Bluey, and Arynne Wexler. Finally, Friday we round off the week with pollster Robert Cahaly. You won't want to miss it!

---|---|---
## Government shutdown over healthcare for illegals...
Guess the left isn't too happy with all of Trump's recent wins, because they're shutting the government down over healthcare for illegal immigrants.
Just to be clear: they're not upset that illegals are __ receiving taxpayer-funded healthcare. . . they're upset that they're _not._
Interesting hill to die on.
Of course the optics of this is a nightmare for the Dems.
They don't want to say out loud that they're fighting for illegals to receive healthcare benefits.
But that's exactly why they're shutting down the government.
This is a slap in the face to the American people, it really makes you wonder what their endgame is.
Meanwhile, the Trump administration goes on the offensive, using facts and memes to go on the offensive against this clear misstep.
It's the perfect storm, and it's all blowing up in the left's face.
Let's break it all down. ...

| This weekend is a critical moment. This is our **_final_** weekend of canvassing before ballots drop for the Proposition 50 ballot measure that’ll pass the Election Rigging Response Act. **That’s why Gov. Newsom and his team have declared this weekend a “Weekend of Action.”** We’ll be launching more canvasses, rallies, and other organizing efforts up and down the state. **[With ballots arriving in the mail next week, we HAVE to make this weekend count. But a massive mobilization like this is another expense we didn’t plan for. Will you consider pitching in a donation to help fund this Weekend of Action?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116519462/573683782/347904267?&refcode=20251003_FR_45DO_WeekendOfAction&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2VkMjcwNS03M2EwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NWMvDOz9yG0zcrsdT6rahA1ICd2WO37XM2kbKtukfNE=)** [CHIP IN $35 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116519463/573683783/347904267?&refcode=20251003_FR_45DO_WeekendOfAction&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2VkMjcwNS03M2EwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NWMvDOz9yG0zcrsdT6rahA1ICd2WO37XM2kbKtukfNE=) Our opponents have spent _millions upon millions_ of dollars carpeting the airwaves with negative ads and launching multiple salvos of direct mailers to undecided voters’ mailboxes. They are hoping these slick ad campaigns will trick voters into defeating Prop 50 and giving Donald Trump a clear path to rigging next year’s midterms. But we believe in the power of old-fashioned grassroots organizing. **If we can get our volunteers and our literature in front of voters, we know that face-to-face conversations can set the record straight.** **[But time isn’t on our side. Ballots are arriving to voters next week, which means that undecided voters need to be reached NOW, before they mail in their ballots. This is a critical make-or-break weekend, and we want to leave it all on the field. clean_body: This weekend is a critical moment | = | This weekend is a critical moment. This is our final weekend of canvassing before ballots drop for the Proposition 50 ballot measure that’ll pass the Election Rigging Response Act. That’s why Gov. Newsom and his team have declared this weekend a “Weekend of Action.” We’ll be launching more canvasses, rallies, and other organizing efforts up and down the state. = = Our opponents have spent millions upon millions of dollars carpeting the airwaves with negative ads and launching multiple salvos of direct mailers to undecided voters’ mailboxes. They are hoping these slick ad campaigns will trick voters into defeating Prop 50 and giving Donald Trump a clear path to rigging next year’s midterms. But we believe in the power of old-fashioned grassroots organizing. If we can get our volunteers and our literature in front of voters, we know that face-to-face conversations can set the record straight. = = = = = = Thanks so much, \- The California Democratic Party P.S. Want to join in the Weekend of Action? . | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. If this email was forwarded to you, We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to . | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: The Democrats
subject: We understand.
body:
---
Derek, **We understand.** We know you get dozens of messages just like this every day, asking you to make a contribution. Many of them are scam PACs, groups that make it look like your donation is going to elect Democrats, when in fact they are just keeping most of the money for themselves. It can be hard to know who to support and who to block. We’re sorry this happens. **Here's our truth:** The DNC is the _only_ committee that works to elect Democrats at every level, up and down the ballot, across the country. We are uniquely positioned to allocate resources where they need to go to give us the best shot at electing more Democrats, from governor’s races in 2025, to the House and Senate in 2026 — and the presidency in 2028. [**So if taking America back from MAGA Republicans and their destructive agenda matters to you, we’re asking you to chip in $7 to the DNC today. We have a team of the smartest political minds we could gather working every day to make sure that your donation will be spent in the most impactful and effective way possible to combat Republicans and take back our government.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251003_4734_fr&refcode2=4748_22930333_YcUXRi&akid=4748%2E22930333%2EYcUXRi) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251003_4734_fr&refcode2=4748_22930333_YcUXRi&akid=4748%2E22930333%2EYcUXRi)**

name: Grijalva HQ
subject: Tomorrow: The Drawings & Doodles of ¡Grijalva!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva_
body:
We wanted to take the time to invite you to The Drawings & Doodles of ¡Grijalva! Opening Reception TOMORROW, Saturday October 4, at 7:00pm

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0140db1233e2/weekend-of-action-for-adelita-10308989?e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=07c58070f8&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | | | | |
# **Join us!**
---
| | Hi friends, We wanted to take the time to invite you to **The Drawings & Doodles of ¡Grijalva! Opening Reception** TOMORROW, Saturday October 4, at 7:00pm-10:00pm at [THE PROJECTS/SPACE,](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=001bc2694a&e=f7c3700ccb) 174 E. Toole Ave. Tucson, AZ. 85701.
If you can’t make it tomorrow, the gallery will be available to visit October 4-October 31.
**All are welcome to this free event**. Below, please see more information from Shannon Smith, Gallery Manager and Head Registrar at Etherton Gallery.
---
|
---
| |
_**The Drawings & Doodles of ¡Grijalva!**_October 4 – October 31, 2025Opening Reception, Saturday, October 4th, 7:00PM – 10:00PM
On view at:**THE PROJECTS /SPACE**174 E. Toole Ave. Tucson, AZ. 85701
---
| | Raúl Grijalva (1948-2025) meant many things to many people. Known as a Congressman, serving in the United States House of Representatives from Arizona from 2003 to 2025, and as an advocate. To me, he was the creator of these intricate drawings that he never intended to be artwork. He drew his thoughts on paper, often on his official House of Representatives stationary. This was how he concentrated and focused, and took notes during countless meetings, hearings, and committee sessions he attended throughout his decades-long career.With the permission of the Grijalva family, we have the privilege of viewing over 175 of Raúl Grijalva’s drawings, spanning from 2012 – 2023, with many undated. These works offer an intimate glimpse into his moods and thoughts, reflecting some of the most tumultuous times of the early 21st century, including events like Standing Rock, shut down votes, gun violence debates, the pandemic, and mass student walkouts. His drawings include a personal element, capturing his voice within the “notes” of what he observed during these meetings. Some even feel like self-portraits.Grijalva would gift these “doodles” to friends and staffers, and they were sometimes auctioned off at charity events. Whether they are called sketches, doodles or art, Raúl Grijalva left behind a time capsule of the behind-the-scenes dynamics of some of the most important meetings in politics during his tenure as a representative in Arizona. His drawings are more than just political commentary; they are portraits, visions, dreams, violence, arguments, decisions, hope, and love. Grijalva always said, “it’s all about the love.”\- Curator, Shannon Smith
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=3c8dc750b4&e=f7c3700ccb)

| Team,

I just wanted to take a moment to **thank you for your incredible support.** Because of people like you, we not only met — but surpassed — our fundraising goal this quarter!

Your commitment shows that together, we can keep proving that grassroots energy and everyday people matter in politics. There’s still a lot of work ahead, but your encouragement and belief in this campaign make all the difference.

I’m excited for what’s next as we continue to fight for working families, work to win critical districts in Michigan, and build a majority in Congress that works for everyone, not just the wealthy few.

With gratitude,

Hillary

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[Mark as Spam](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1o5vdjoiyk3lt4qr44q2e6a89vwoz5vn6fpm962a1f17703dr6all3ua40mvtvw0cknushusqqqczk6krgwuez8md19&__stmp=t3kddl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1o5vdjoiyk3lt4qr44q2e6a89vwoz5vn6fpm962a1f17703dr6all3ua40mvtvw0cknushusqqqczk6krgwuez8md19&__stmp=t3kddl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kddl&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kddl&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kddl&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?

If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.

**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... clean_body: | Please read the message below from Turning Point USA. | | | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Tell Congress: Don’t silence dissent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
| |
---
Peter, **Fascism has come to America.** The Trump administration is taking aim at its perceived enemies, and using any means available to enact retribution. For James Comey, it’s trumped up charges dictated over Truth Social. **For people in the streets protesting, it’s tear gas.** [**In a democracy, no one should be tear gassed for expressing their opinion. Tell Congress: Don’t let Trump silence dissent with tear gas. Ban law enforcement from using chemical weapons!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39nmySR0aJHAndHZtu0f-UbVUd3unVzk1ayw8afp38IJL62Sr78sSjsCV6JYPTcx4gprHAPjd1x4OtFPMx8_JiRfvu_0D6IvQnERVlzFvZd6VBsaImA5Rf2r31tu60B8jJsxq_1A-e_VKr-AsRvV2oa6QBZ1r-ltcYJniaMVbae6xqMA1BQ8HFsIDlZFhavga459Q7Ksdh5qzIvpGqNrXMAJj13Lcy2O5_uQL9HSFXKY0-jkrBBEKTT951NPsq1yuKtBu35nAFd2VcZPf9IrX-vVfD2iZ4TR3ZQOh-gsHcyma9PeE2pDiNL7Or0xbitk7xiVyKqBiJuxrFlzNMefZIO7KGb45Ndru-RKreBbhdCCxSNDOTSYddQSZdaTIaX_GcvPvzuki2uGMY9iCENQZC_pCI9_HJZXO_IhtWBvZYvzA/4kf/LnkzO49mRnmRDaxjMXTGJQ/h0/h001.IYOzxCnXCNmgQWRL64ris_Ze1-1HIP8MTrCPGs1iE6I) [SIGN & SEND](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39nmySR0aJHAndHZtu0f-UbVUd3unVzk1ayw8afp38IJL62Sr78sSjsCV6JYPTcx4gprHAPjd1x4OtFPMx8_JiRfvu_0D6IvQnERVlzFvZd6VBsaImA5Rf2r31tu60B8jJsxq_1A-e_VKr-AsRvV2oa6QBZ1r-ltcYJniaMVbae6xqMA1BQ8HFsIDlZFhavga459Q7Ksdh5qzIvpGqNrXMAZDelR4SlsUWn4SbNlhsDrvfhLipnl62w6lmME4a5BVGn9TRoJegWfOdxkMwcZ95fJKof6ejmFAOD5PBVtljoBOGF05XsO_x-Mk36BY-mmJlvcusm9or59JklT2BcjHjFZj1hldQhvQcLfFfNa_7uApRmkX21q5SxOBV8k4Lzz1TPFpSA5O0-F7lBZd5IFXCZZFJPrRKY2A_2YqawuMEzlQ/4kf/LnkzO49mRnmRDaxjMXTGJQ/h1/h001.AEHhDMuEVSfzRgFsQi1IletL3q4uCXDPiNcqtxMzM-g) **There’s a reason tear gas is banned for use in warfare by the Geneva Protocol.** In the short-term, it causes intense pain. Over the long-term, it can burn, blindness, and even kill.**** Only a wannabe dictator would deploy such chemical weaponry on their own dissenting citizens. **Trump feels extremely empowered to stamp out any dissent to his authoritarian agenda. The Supreme Court gave Trump the power of a king in America, and they provide cover for him every time he takes illegal action.** Congress must step up and check Trump’s power to jail, prosecute, and silence critics. Activism is covered under the First Amendment—it shouldn’t be subject to chemical weapons. [**Tell Congress to get tear gas off our streets. Rein in Trump’s authoritarian agenda and ban federal law enforcement from silencing dissent with tear gas!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39nmySR0aJHAndHZtu0f-UbVUd3unVzk1ayw8afp38IJL62Sr78sSjsCV6JYPTcx4gprHAPjd1x4OtFPMx8_JiRfvu_0D6IvQnERVlzFvZd6VBsaImA5Rf2r31tu60B8jJsxq_1A-e_VKr-AsRvV2oa6QBZ1r-ltcYJniaMVbae6xqMA1BQ8HFsIDlZFhavga459Q7Ksdh5qzIvpGqNrXMAnrWpeKELWJRhmGwnrbkd3bgZRbIMULzdbC6ILztQ6XhxA7bYHxJlE-sYe0hShUjiId0OA307UWtKQuZS0vu1ogwuAOeI0V3MEJITvt1nm2iMSi1aiBEmdTOTuoXOBSkZTUJXy8tQ2UL4tsBLoJmu3ADzZbIiKvdB5yQYl8NSEmFtPvEiz2GFLwJtUJp47UzT7W8BpJzRcqkSHE3Muq3TVg/4kf/LnkzO49mRnmRDaxjMXTGJQ/h2/h001.D76Gu28WpEXzZ2-zqZajjyjAka7hD1Acy5hT_bfpmR8) Thank you for fighting back against authoritarianism, Morgan Stahr

name: Steve Garvey
subject: I’m coming out of retirement…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOU GOTTA BELIEVE PAC
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15418889/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVzhTdHE0Ynk2ag/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEwMDM/LbmNsYmdCU2FvSw/qP2hpZHM9bmM0WkxTNzNiSVlXOGFscw/gaN_4QA/s8n24b9ab04)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._4QA/s4kb4fc7c60)
---
| | Patriot, I hate to be so direct, but progressive Gavin Newsom and his Democrat henchmen are planning to wipe out FIVE GOP-held Congressional seats. Republicans represent about 40% of the vote, yet Newsom wants to take our congressional districts to only 8%. [I need your urgent help to fight back.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._4QA/s4kb4fc7c60)
---
[ STOP NEWSOM'S REDISTRICTING POWER GRAB ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._4QA/s4kb4fc7c60)
---
Today, I’ve made it the mission of You Gotta Believe PAC to help these five Republican Congressmen “hold the line” on their seats, and I can’t do it without your help. This is a blatant power grab and retaliation against President Trump. Radical Gavin Newsom would rather lie, cheat, and steal than play the game by the rules. Here’s the deal: during my career with the Los Angeles Dodgers, I played by the rules. **_But_ _I_ _played_ _hardball_**. I’m not going to sit on the bench while Far-Left Gavin Newsom tries to illegally re-write the rules and steal our Republican House Majority out from under our noses. [I need your support to do two critical things:](https://link.email.america1stwarroom._4QA/s4kb4fc7c60)
---
1. Give these five Republican Congressmen as much cash on hand as possible so they can be prepared for the massive fight they have ahead of them.
2. Build statewide public outrage against radical Gavin Newsom's Redistricting Power Grab to steal our rightfully-elected Republican Majority

---
With your help last year, I built a historic statewide coalition of Republicans and fed-up Californians – **I even received the most votes of any Republican candidate in California's _history_.** If you can help me mobilize these same folks again... ... I strongly believe we can build a movement so loud that Newsom and his Democrat buddies in the state legislature will be forced to back down (or face consequences at the ballot box). We must be alert. We must build our team. We must stop Gavin Newsom’s gross plot to erase your voice in Washington.

Republicans represent about 40% of the vote, yet Newsom wants to take our congressional districts to only 8%. body:
I write to you now, having witnessed Pete Hegseth and Donald Trump’s ludicrous, self aggrandizing, politically motivated display in front of the entire corps of generals and admirals.
#
Peter,
I write to you now, having witnessed Pete Hegseth and Donald Trump’s ludicrous, self-aggrandizing, politically motivated display in front of the entire corps of generals and admirals.
A disgraceful, deleterious moment for American leadership at home and around the world.
However, I also write to you after witnessing a stoic, principled corps of admirals and generals meet this moment with the same discipline and bearing that we have come to expect from the finest Military in the world.
This is a terrible time for our nation, but even now, I am proud to be an American. I am proud of our Troops, and I am proud of their leadership. And I am more determined than ever to stop this administration from doing further damage to the U.S. Military and the Department of Veterans Affairs.
VoteVets leads that fight. We always have, and we always will. And I am respectfully asking you for your support.
[**Make a donation of $5 to VoteVets. As one of the most important organizations opposing this administration, these contributions have a serious impact on our ability to fight back.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct25.PLXLty&refcode=em251003-1-120&t=1&akid=34661%2E3013755%2EZiKZUT)

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[Mark as Spam](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xul=4cscvssgesax5z7odbg0fo8c8iprnvhvsedp6apmbn8edwbtzj6n5il6ubphkbh9gewlrdx3fbrxt37odaqmrqkqtk94b2fbstz9bup024k99bo&__stmp=t3kdpw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xul=4cscvssgesax5z7odbg0fo8c8iprnvhvsedp6apmbn8edwbtzj6n5il6ubphkbh9gewlrdx3fbrxt37odaqmrqkqtk94b2fbstz9bup024k99bo&__stmp=t3kdpw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
* * *
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xtl=n7zbbkmoh29iq3410zanp51a96sbebnpxwbn5s1pbyu5x1nhmjecbxi96zihl7je50cbwu311kwbkgvwkpymys3p0cbs0zueyymuyuczorvnrn9b2a7761xsk0gpigsbnsbmxsuq8bvfav1bx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
| | |
---

[Privacy Policy](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xtl=7lpnk4o31rjqjewl1otg632ozfk6g15ny57y1n66bn4g77jj7ahibd70hhg4i70tshkjwewwip0t6jj0b629n9s2tdd2zkxk8qit94pfu01dbuht3i5grjearzomkbar14627gil8g6n1h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)| [Contact Us](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xtl=qwikjql1ljozgp3xz5fa6eyr2b18imf9rsf0x5aql083zunrajn3lhavje33r3ouv119onm8dn4g71qmd5maf7az5egvrcpjgq9pmfch45tr7z1s1i6bqw5c1bu5f1trg5x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kdpw&__onlt=h)| [Unsubscribe](http://trk.greatamericandigest.com/?xul=4cscvssgesax5z7odbg0fo8c8iprnvhvsedp6apmbn8edwbtzj6n5il6ubphkbh9gewlrdx3fbrxt37odaqmrqkqtk94b2fbstz9bup024k99bo&__stmp=t3kdpw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Fighting for New Jersey through this shutdown
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Friend,

Our country is now in the middle of another Republican government shutdown. Working families across New Jersey are being forced to pay the price for this administration’s political games. They even froze federal funding for the Gateway Tunnel and other critical infrastructure projects in our region.

This goes beyond political retribution; it’s flat-out sabotage.

The Gateway Tunnel is not some luxury project. It is, frankly, one of the most important infrastructure undertakings in the nation. It will protect millions of commuters, strengthen our economy, and ensure our region’s transportation system is safe and reliable for decades to come. Blocking funding for it and treating it like a bargaining chip is irresponsible and disrespectful to every single New Jerseyan.

Above all, I fight for New Jersey families. Delivering funding for our transportation, protecting health care, and lowering costs for families have been and will continue to be top priorities of mine in Washington. This shutdown is the exact opposite of that. Families are stretched thin — paying more at the grocery store, the pharmacy, and the gas pump — and this manufactured crisis only risks exacerbating those issues.

I didn’t come to Congress to play political games. I came here to deliver for New Jersey. Right now, that means reopening the government, protecting affordable health care, and making sure critical investments like the Gateway Tunnel move forward.

I will keep fighting to make sure our community’s needs are never used as bargaining chips. New Jersey deserves better.

With gratitude,

Nellie Pou
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=485a40d0-75a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=485a40d0-75a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4]
Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/QcG518LlG0yfilVoJO5ZLg2?unsubscribedata=oPCRO3J%2FQbSYC5p16tnkBn5mycmA9YjQACz628r6gL0awZP8P3gCrswqZB1XviodDdjb%2F8zhBW7A63hl1%2BM7tvx6tcR3b3UeGnznsrZM4PGirbb87S6GFn%2Fcjso28p%2Fe16%2F12EqvX3%2Fn4ZN%2F1QpKMTf4F%2BUyngjCKeUNwtCIdo0hTlIVjYAkM2HrwUn%2FqT%2F0QzWcY27axZqumefmvMr5yDRXBl92erhPmHkpXapt7e7FJnTtsMQhhSgUKg5Jzy2mrz88zywW3hCoR8SSpAjbj17HIIv9n7F0N2tcAxEcNHouM0EKSjfaAeloB6SuOyEWm32shtCqXXRwWkMrviU2VACRa0BKaz8A%2FenXCjcZDVJIjxCuVyhWmwFOlqyOCVCp5eKQ2lRePFe8XdNcblUzZQJd12S7oJBfV8tcNgPpgVHjX7iZwPPm5gOHvizSDYTw] . name: Leah Johnson
subject: stressed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4816%2E400544%2Ei7n63a)
Hey, it's Leah.
I’m Deb’s Finance Director and the biggest spreadsheet aficionado on the team.
I’m reaching out because just a few days ago, everyone here was energized and excited about our fundraising numbers. But since then, things have slowed way down. **I’m not gonna lie... we’re stressed.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251003_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20251003-4816&refcode2=4816_400544_i7n63a&akid=4816%2E400544%2Ei7n63a)
The clock is ticking on our October 6th fundraising deadline, and we’re not where we’d hoped we’d be at this point in time. **[That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in $5 today to help us reach our $250,000 goal before Monday’s big deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251003_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20251003-4816&refcode2=4816_400544_i7n63a&akid=4816%2E400544%2Ei7n63a)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251003_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20251003-4816&refcode2=4816_400544_i7n63a&akid=4816%2E400544%2Ei7n63a)**
**Every dollar we raise right now sends a message that this campaign is _strong, competitive, and powered by real people, not MAGA billionaires._** And trust me, Trump and his megadonors are watching, ready to jump in at any sign of weakness.
We’re doing everything we can to build a campaign that reflects New Mexico’s values, but we can’t do it without your grassroots support.
[**So please, can we count on you to pitch in $5 before our deadline on Monday?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251003_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20251003-4816&refcode2=4816_400544_i7n63a&akid=4816%2E400544%2Ei7n63a)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251003_1_deadline?amount=5&refcode=em20251003-4816&refcode2=4816_400544_i7n63a&akid=4816%2E400544%2Ei7n63a)**
I can’t thank you enough for your support,
Leah 💻🩷
P.S. We know the Republican shutdown is impacting tens of thousands of New Mexicans and folks across the country. If you’re not able to donate today, we completely understand. We appreciate your support!
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251003-1&t=2&refcode2=4816_400544_i7n63a&akid=4816%2E400544%2Ei7n63a)**
