name: Team DASS
subject: This violates the Hatch Act. We need an investigation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116522241/573691123/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhM2IzZS03NmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WcwDwRkTGAvp5G5Tmij9DasI4RQixEb0DAbeDh9rA8=)
Friend, This is not normal. In fact, it’s _illegal._ Multiple official federal websites – including USDA, HHS, HUD, and the State Department – are now displaying shutdown messages blaming Democrats for the funding lapse, parroting President Trump’s political rhetoric. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116522243/573691127/954819167?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhM2IzZS03NmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WcwDwRkTGAvp5G5Tmij9DasI4RQixEb0DAbeDh9rA8=&emci=b881979b-6aa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a20a3b3e-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26828920) These are banners hosted on .gov domains, using your tax dollars to promote Trump’s political messaging. This is a direct violation of the Hatch Act, a federal law that prohibits the use of government resources for partisan political purposes. And now it’s happening across multiple agencies, in broad daylight. [**We’re demanding an immediate investigation into this breach of the Hatch Act, and we need your name on the petition right now:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116522245/573691134/-144717237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhM2IzZS03NmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WcwDwRkTGAvp5G5Tmij9DasI4RQixEb0DAbeDh9rA8=&emci=b881979b-6aa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a20a3b3e-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26828920) | | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116522247/573691137/-144717237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhM2IzZS03NmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WcwDwRkTGAvp5G5Tmij9DasI4RQixEb0DAbeDh9rA8=&emci=b881979b-6aa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a20a3b3e-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26828920)**
---
Federal agencies are supposed to serve the American people — not push political propaganda or target political opponents.
**If we don’t speak out, this kind of authoritarian overreach becomes precedent.**
Trump and his allies are already trying to dismantle democratic norms at every level, from censoring the press to targeting election officials. Now, they’re turning the tools of government into a propaganda machine.
We won’t let this slide.
This matters for everyone who believes in an independent civil service, in free speech, and in the rule of law.
[**Will you add your name right now and help us demand an immediate investigation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116522249/573691144/-144717237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhM2IzZS03NmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WcwDwRkTGAvp5G5Tmij9DasI4RQixEb0DAbeDh9rA8=&emci=b881979b-6aa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a20a3b3e-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26828920)
| | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116522251/573691146/-144717237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhM2IzZS03NmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WcwDwRkTGAvp5G5Tmij9DasI4RQixEb0DAbeDh9rA8=&emci=b881979b-6aa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a20a3b3e-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26828920)**
---
****
Secretaries of State around the country are working to keep our elections fair and protected, but the fight for democracy starts with calling out abuses like this one.
Team DASS
| Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the _only_ organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States.

Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. _Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116522254/573691148/-664592562?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhM2IzZS03NmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WcwDwRkTGAvp5G5Tmij9DasI4RQixEb0DAbeDh9rA8=)
---
[Donate Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116522256/573691151/-664592562?refcode=em-footer-recurring&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhM2IzZS03NmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WcwDwRkTGAvp5G5Tmij9DasI4RQixEb0DAbeDh9rA8=)
---

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://action.demsofstate.org/a/unsub?unsubscribedata=R2vhXpTaCyANKCoVOXEL4NL%2B7QnRaBxQK4Lg64gdzQH%2BfH8qVxa5IrMSkoHzbxeErAIb73MJRSJAwDBxHSGOX5Dkuv75okd%2FuQgJLod0cioI6dUMlR5yGQaXtdP7NFHSNJZVbLR3FT1%2B2stZ%2Biy%2F7nrCIr71HXm6Cr7itydSy0JYIJ26KpXBFDwNnWNHiuIGld4dee%2BJkkrDXIJCd8KdkCtjC%2FDIqCUDFNHhVwB2WtjDRXB4OHQu5C4FClic%2BoDUmYBiZKRTBWbMq%2FQia8X5y%2BO2vkcyv%2F3JZ4M7NpymPCyxA%2B%2FA9MNKIf1bPNHc8X4K2m1NRfn%2FJDpy6idUasuxr7oXyMrmzV%2BmXC0UNTPnxwdgw1sCQduED5cQw7WXihsQOoggcnCZCHixqoPDnt8qUAbu4z0bxzJ5SZwBGKZI0Tq1dFwXHZ55zhbz6r65o7uh).

name: Jane Fonda
subject: New endorsements →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
There’s no time to waste.

|
---
✨ Big News✨ I’m thrilled to announce that JanePAC is endorsing three exceptional candidates who are ready to take on the fight for climate action in Whatcom County, Washington State: **Carly James** , **Elizabeth Boyle** , and **Jessica Rienstra**. **Would you consider splitting a $24 donation today — just $8 split between each of their campaigns — to directly help them reach and mobilize the voters they need to win before Election Day?** | [**Donate $8 to Carly James**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116522372/573691527/1439714077?refcode=ea.249cfc7b-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.249cfc7b-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0OWNmYzdiLTc2YTAtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fkKO0pXpaZzAfBnYcOemp9QE55-2iGv8aAdEaeRWP8k=&emci=7b1360cd-65a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=249cfc7b-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
[**Donate $8 to Jessica Rienstra**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116522374/573691530/149796605?refcode=ea.249cfc7b-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.249cfc7b-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0OWNmYzdiLTc2YTAtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fkKO0pXpaZzAfBnYcOemp9QE55-2iGv8aAdEaeRWP8k=&emci=7b1360cd-65a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=249cfc7b-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
[**Donate $8 to Elizabeth Boyle**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116522376/573691532/932093278?refcode=ea.249cfc7b-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.249cfc7b-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0OWNmYzdiLTc2YTAtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fkKO0pXpaZzAfBnYcOemp9QE55-2iGv8aAdEaeRWP8k=&emci=7b1360cd-65a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=249cfc7b-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---

**_Why it Matters_**
In 2021, Whatcom County became the first county in the nation to ban the construction of new oil refineries and fossil fuel export infrastructure. Now, we must defend those hard-won gains by keeping new corporate polluters out — and stopping existing ones from expanding.
**_Meet Our Climate Champions_**
* **Carly James (Port of Bellingham Board, District 2)** : Running against a conservative incumbent, Carly is ready to lead on decarbonization, expand EV infrastructure, support fishing and Tribal fleets’ transition to renewable fuels, and block new fossil fuel projects. Her win would flip the board to a progressive majority.
* **Elizabeth Boyle (County Council, District 2)** : Elizabeth is focused on affordable, sustainable housing that reduces sprawl, improves walkability and transit, and keeps fossil fuel corporations out of her community.
* **Jessica Rienstra (County Council, District 3)** : Born and raised in rural Whatcom County, Jessica knows firsthand the struggles of rising costs, limited healthcare access, and climate-driven disasters. She’ll prioritize strengthening flood resilience in the Nooksack basin, updating land use policies, and investing in infrastructure that protects farms, homes, and our precious habitats.

These leaders understand there’s no time to waste. The climate crisis won’t wait, and neither can we. We have to give the next 32 days until Election Day everything we’ve got if we’re going to break Big Oil’s chokehold on our political system.
**Would you be able to split a contribution right away between these incredible candidates? In local races like these, every single dollar makes a real difference. Your support could be what pushes Carly, Elizabeth, and Jessica over the finish line.**

clean_body: There’s no time to waste. | ✨ Big News✨ I’m thrilled to announce that JanePAC is endorsing three exceptional candidates who are ready to take on the fight for climate action in Whatcom County, Washington State: Carly James , Elizabeth Boyle , and Jessica Rienstra. Would you consider splitting a $24 donation today — just $8 split between each of their campaigns — to directly help them reach and mobilize the voters they need to win before Election Day? | Why it Matters In 2021, Whatcom County became the first county in the nation to ban the construction of new oil refineries and fossil fuel export infrastructure. Now, we must defend those hard-won gains by keeping new corporate polluters out — and stopping existing ones from expanding. Meet Our Climate Champions Carly James (Port of Bellingham Board, District 2) : Running against a conservative incumbent, Carly is ready to lead on decarbonization, expand EV infrastructure, support fishing and Tribal fleets’ transition to renewable fuels, and block new fossil fuel projects. Her win would flip the board to a progressive majority. Elizabeth Boyle (County Council, District 2) : Elizabeth is focused on affordable, sustainable housing that reduces sprawl, improves walkability and transit, and keeps fossil fuel corporations out of her community. Jessica Rienstra (County Council, District 3) : Born and raised in rural Whatcom County, Jessica knows firsthand the struggles of rising costs, limited healthcare access, and climate-driven disasters. She’ll prioritize strengthening flood resilience in the Nooksack basin, updating land use policies, and investing in infrastructure that protects farms, homes, and our precious habitats. These leaders understand there’s no time to waste. The climate crisis won’t wait, and neither can we. We have to give the next 32 days until Election Day everything we’ve got if we’re going to break Big Oil’s chokehold on our political system. Would you be able to split a contribution right away between these incredible candidates? In local races like these, every single dollar makes a real difference. Your support could be what pushes Carly, Elizabeth, and Jessica over the finish line. In solidarity, xx Jane | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. It’s day three of the Republican government shutdown, and here's the truth, Peter.

They control the House.

They control the Senate.

They control the White House.

This crisis is on them.

Trump is holding our government hostage to satisfy his extreme, authoritarian agenda. Instead of working with Democrats to end the health care crisis he created, Republicans are blocking negotiations. This means that you could see your health insurance premiums up to double starting this month.

And while everyday people are suffering, Trump and his allies are desperate to keep the Epstein files buried — a cover-up that reveals just how deep the corruption runs.

Democrats are standing together and standing up for the American people. I refuse to back down.

My Democratic colleagues and I are fighting back fiercely to protect your healthcare, your rights, and secure a government that works for people. Thanks for standing with us today.

— Yassamin

body:

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116523146/573693376/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjNhMmQ1Ni03OGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t4ERP_32aiATfhoNv-eESgaMXoGFe3LsarEH_zip4Co=&emci=ce2f5ad3-76a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=663a2d56-78a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=13185894) Derek, For the first time in six years, Republicans shut down the federal government. Now, troops and many federal employees will have to work without pay because of the GOP’s foolish and reckless decision. If our troops and federal workers are getting screwed by this shutdown, then members of Congress sure as hell shouldn’t be cashing paychecks. **That’s why I’m a Co-Sponsor of the "No Pay for Congress During Default or Shutdown Act" to block congressional pay during a government shutdown like this one.** [**I’m standing in solidarity with our troops and federal employees to block members of Congress from receiving pay during a shutdown just like everyone else—and I need your support. Here’s the reality: more than 3 million federal employees, including 67,000 right here in Pennsylvania, are at risk because of the government shutdown.
**That’s not by accident. It’s because DC Republicans with full control in Washington couldn't do their job. They skipped town and won’t do anything to work with Democrats to lower costs and protect healthcare for the American people.**
_It’s pathetic, and it’s wrong._

| Peter,
Last week, Donald Trump signed an order that should make the skin of all Americans crawl.
Titled NSPM-7, short for National Security Presidential Memorandum 7, orders the FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force to investigate "networks, entities, and organizations that foment political violence." The order lists opinions that government agents should use to spy on, investigate, and persecute Americans for:

| This order is so ambiguous and leaves such room for interpretation that federal agents could conduct mass-arrests and imprison liberal minded people for crimes as innocuous as expressing commonly held beliefs on Facebook.
It's but another escalation in Trump's war to implement fascism and destroy the Democratic Party, and sadly, it's about to get even worse:
In November 2025, Pennsylvanians will head to the polls to vote in their upcoming 2025 Supreme Court Election. A typically sleepy affair which has exploded into the closest watched race of 2025.
The stakes couldn't be higher. If Democrats lose and Trump seizes this court, we will never win Pennsylvania in an election again, not in 2026 and not in 2028 \- 19 electoral college votes squandered for the next decade and beyond.

Titled NSPM-7, short for National Security Presidential Memorandum 7, orders the FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force to investigate "networks, entities, and organizations that foment political violence." The order lists opinions that government agents should use to spy on, investigate, and persecute Americans for: | == | This order is so ambiguous and leaves such room for interpretation that federal agents could conduct mass-arrests and imprison liberal minded people for crimes as innocuous as expressing commonly held beliefs on Facebook. It's but another escalation in Trump's war to implement fascism and destroy the Democratic Party, and sadly, it's about to get even worse: In November 2025, Pennsylvanians will head to the polls to vote in their upcoming 2025 Supreme Court Election. A typically sleepy affair which has exploded into the closest watched race of 2025. The stakes couldn't be higher. If Democrats lose and Trump seizes this court, we will never win Pennsylvania in an election again, not in 2026 and not in 2028 \- 19 electoral college votes squandered for the next decade and beyond. | | == Defend Our Courts is locked into a life or death battle of wills with the National GOP who have launched a full court press to seize this court and are treating this court race like a presidential election. We are doing everything in our power to hold the line but we are being outspent 10 to 1. If we can get this race the attention it deserves we can mount a comeback but with less than 32 days until the election time is running out. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == We cannot not let this court fall. Everything is on the line. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. name: Kendall Qualls
subject: How we can shock the political class
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat Tim Walz

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb6qo589gee35mqks6512878p9blv648vkg73v20_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a _Conservative outsider_ running for governor of Minnesota to **defeat Tim Walz.** His far-left leadership and failed policies have hurt families here and serve as a dangerous model for the rest of the country.
Before I share my story, I need to ask: **_[Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help me take him on and protect our values?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkshhvflties7j7pfrkshblfaqh04pot7f7nuooo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs) _**

---
[CHIP IN NOW →](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbek0u0r7t04e7ccfcojdo93qdb9ikvvk3ca5qqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
| | **Tim Walz’s leadership is a warning for America.** He’s raised taxes by _billions_ , expanded government control over everyday life, and pushed radical social policies that divide communities and weaken public safety.
_If his approach spreads to more states, America will be less free, less prosperous, and less safe._
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** I grew up in poverty — first in Harlem, then in a trailer park in Oklahoma. I worked my way through college, served as a U.S. Army officer, and spent 30 years in the private sector leading teams and turning around struggling businesses.
I’ve _never been_ a career politician, and I don’t owe the political class anything.
That’s exactly why I can, and will, take on the entrenched bureaucracy, cut waste, lower taxes, and put power back in the hands of hardworking people.
This fight isn’t just about Minnesota. _It’s about stopping a dangerous agenda before it spreads_ , and proving that Conservative leadership can still win, even in a state the left thinks they own.
The national Democratic machine is already lining up behind Walz.
**If Conservatives across America stand with me now, we can shock the political class and restore freedom, prosperity, and common sense to Minnesota.**
**_[Can I count on your support right now?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgfb0llh40sk7k9pkptdjnhaicfrj4u88tvi7tk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)_ **Your donation today will help us reach voters, fight back against attacks, and build the momentum we need to win.
---
[DONATE $25](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za9aakrcfdq6kn73e6roe398tnh8pnoetctdm6vo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
[DONATE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziuoch1m3rcv6klra4kosmn34hdda3ko4fo1ncc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
[DONATE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdms2i0r17cr50egvcg552falijk81gqcodgtieo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrod84r2nm9h8u6a1u4v55qp6tlicc07m3pgd34o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
| | **__**Thank you for believing in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2snvd0t97cq84vuqm7623sqb5gjuf8dkb60nj2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2jn5ui4kngb4ckn84udjovd1diacrould0fba18_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh4rojfcrsj149h5qt8gsu3dd8v16djg2094583g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
|
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5ad15m7kirkr1inr16tkphpcbfnlpa0kb4hotg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
****
**The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7hesh72t5pt6igv9svcjdv2f9kcpqq12u8dspcg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.
[SHOP THE STORE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zker22miod6e2uapqf3bfg11llutoh9ktqo1urpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slh62or4s5h2bs)

name: Jeff Walter for Congress
subject: Will The Government ReOpen Today?
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=474c5929b6&e=fa724b03ca)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Family and Friends,

At midnight Wednesday morning the Democrats allowed the government to shut down. What does this government shutdown mean for you, the constituents of the Illinois 11th Congressional District and Americans across the country? It means National Landmarks and National Parks are closed, no paychecks for Military and Federal Employees, it threatens WIC and SNAP programs, senior programs, TSA operations, just to name a few.
The American people deserve a government that works for them, not one that shuts its doors because of politicans who are holding funding hostage to extend free healthcare to illegal immigrants and other extreme policy positions. Families and businesses across our district live within their means, and it’s time that Congress did the same. We cannot continue writing blank checks and kicking the can down the road. This government shutdown is a failure of leadership on the Democrats in Congress to work with the Republicans, and the only path forward is restoring fiscal responsibility, securing our priorities, and ensuring taxpayer dollars are spent wisely.
As your next Republican representative, I will fight to balance the budget, reduce wasteful spending, and keep the government open and accountable to the people it serves.
---

name: Team Benson
subject: Michigan families will bear the brunt of the federal government shutdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=786%2E181023%2EZhhnL1)
The federal government shut down earlier this week.
**This is what happens when D.C. Republicans, including John James, fail to put Michigan families over corporate interests and the ultra-wealthy. And now, Michiganders will bear the brunt of the shutdown.**
Republicans already gutted Medicaid that could force hospitals in Michigan to close; now this shutdown will cause health care costs to go up. There will be fewer TSA agents at airports, meaning more lines and delays. Veterans' benefits could be delayed. Small business loans could be delayed. Food and nutrition assistance programs could be paused. And that's just to name a few.
[**It's clear now more than ever that we need leaders who will always deliver for Michigan families first. That's certainly not John James — but we can count on Jocelyn Benson to have our backs. Will you donate to help her stand up to the corporate interests as our next governor?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251003_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=786%2E181023%2EZhhnL1)

name: Carrie Anne Templeton
subject: Upcoming events and the top 3 things you can do as a volunteer- from home!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Party news you can use!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_top&n=1)
---
| Hello Forward Friends- It's October already! Our National Volunteer Program Kickoff Party is this coming **Tuesday October 7th at 8pm ET.** There you will learn what opportunities are available and how to get started volunteering. Click below to RSVP. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/nvp_kickoff_party?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_top&n=2 "REGISTER NOW") [REGISTER NOW](https://home.forwardparty.com/nvp_kickoff_party?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_top&n=2)
---
Below are the top 3 things you can do for Forward party, from your home, and we will be discussing this and more at the kickoff event:
**Welcome New Volunteers!** As Forwardists, we want to make sure new supporters feel welcome and know what the party is up to. We are asking volunteers to call new supporters in their state. We will provide training for this Welcome Team so you feel comfortable making calls.
**Reach out to elected officials!** Forward needs to know who are the leaders in your area living by our principles and values. Volunteers are in a great position to make introductions as constituents to representatives from the party. We will train you on best practices.
**Support our candi****dates!** We will begin text banking in the next week! Additionally, if you have website or social media skills, our candidates' campaigns are looking for volunteers! And liking, commenting, and sharing posts is always helpful. Discover our 2025 candidates [here](https://www.forwardparty.com/candidates/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_top&n=3).
Can't wait to share all this and more with you on Tuesday!
_Volunteer Spotlight:_
Our volunteer of the month for October is **Larry Weathers**! Larry has moved around the last few years and been in states that weren't organized yet, but that hasn't stopped him from being a great spokesperson for Forward. Hear more about how he managed to stay plugged in to the party at the [National Volunteer Program Kickoff](https://home.forwardparty.com/nvp_kickoff_party?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_top&n=4) event on the 7th!
_Other upcoming events:_
**October 13th** 7pm ET [Monday Night Madness](https://home.forwardparty.com/monday_night_madness_text_banking?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_top&n=5) text banking event.
**October 15th** 6pm ET [Welcome Team Intro Call ](https://home.forwardparty.com/welcome_team_intro_call?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_top&n=6)\- for volunteers wanting to call other supporters
**October 22nd** 630pm ET [Elected Official Outreach Series](https://home.forwardparty.com/elected_official_outreach_series_jp4xyksaiasn_sr6zxgkw?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_top&n=7) \- a 4-week course for volunteers
Find more and in-person events on our [calendar](https://home.forwardparty.com/public_calendar?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=forward_friends_top&n=8)!
Thank you for reading and I look forward to working with you, spreading Forward's message across all the states. Our country needs it now more than ever!

clean_body: Party news you can use! | | | Hello Forward Friends- It's October already! Our National Volunteer Program Kickoff Party is this coming Tuesday October 7th at 8pm ET. There you will learn what opportunities are available and how to get started volunteering. Click below to RSVP. | "REGISTER NOW" Below are the top 3 things you can do for Forward party, from your home, and we will be discussing this and more at the kickoff event: Welcome New Volunteers! As Forwardists, we want to make sure new supporters feel welcome and know what the party is up to. We are asking volunteers to call new supporters in their state. We will provide training for this Welcome Team so you feel comfortable making calls. Reach out to elected officials! Forward needs to know who are the leaders in your area living by our principles and values. Volunteers are in a great position to make introductions as constituents to representatives from the party. We will train you on best practices. Support our candidates! We will begin text banking in the next week! Additionally, if you have website or social media skills, our candidates' campaigns are looking for volunteers! And liking, commenting, and sharing posts is always helpful. Discover our 2025 candidates . Can't wait to share all this and more with you on Tuesday! Volunteer Spotlight: Our volunteer of the month for October is Larry Weathers! Larry has moved around the last few years and been in states that weren't organized yet, but that hasn't stopped him from being a great spokesperson for Forward. Hear more about how he managed to stay plugged in to the party at the event on the 7th! Other upcoming events: October 13th 7pm ET text banking event. October 15th 6pm ET \- for volunteers wanting to call other supporters October 22nd 630pm ET \- a 4-week course for volunteers Find more and in-person events on our ! Thank you for reading and I look forward to working with you, spreading Forward's message across all the states. Our country needs it now more than ever! Carrie Anne Templeton Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Kathleen Clyde, ODP Chair
subject: 🚨Ohio Republicans blew past the first deadline in our redistricting process
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They’re running out the clock to rig our maps
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116525535/573701434/879334541?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Redistricting_251003_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTI4NTZhZi03YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3D_YeRc63n7rsL-8o9ZBnjx49hTcAsDS7m13guW74aQ=) Team,

Republicans have officially blown past their first deadline in Ohio’s redistricting process.

**Instead of following the process Ohio voters overwhelmingly approved to create a fair, constitutional map, Republicans missed the deadline COMPLETELY and didn’t even propose a map.**

They’re determined to run out the clock to once again cheat Ohio voters. We won’t let them.

[**_Will you rush a donation right now to fuel our fight for fair congressional maps?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116525536/573701435/879334541?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Redistricting_251003_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTI4NTZhZi03YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3D_YeRc63n7rsL-8o9ZBnjx49hTcAsDS7m13guW74aQ=)

We’re not surprised this deadline came and went. The first round of redistricting hearings was a sham conducted by Republicans who made it clear that they were only present because it was legally required.

**They’re not even trying to hide the fact that they’re just wasting time. They stopped doing their jobs – they didn’t propose one single map.**

_Ohioans deserve transparency and a commitment to draw a fair, constitutional map._

Ohio Democrats are fighting like hell to get fair maps for Ohioans. But we need your help to spread the word: we’re getting out in our communities to register new voters, keep Ohioans informed, and make sure everyone has a voice in how our maps are drawn ahead of next year’s elections.

clean_body: They’re running out the clock to rig our maps | = Team, Republicans have officially blown past their first deadline in Ohio’s redistricting process. Instead of following the process Ohio voters overwhelmingly approved to create a fair, constitutional map, Republicans missed the deadline COMPLETELY and didn’t even propose a map. They’re determined to run out the clock to once again cheat Ohio voters. We won’t let them. = We’re not surprised this deadline came and went. The first round of redistricting hearings was a sham conducted by Republicans who made it clear that they were only present because it was legally required. They’re not even trying to hide the fact that they’re just wasting time. They stopped doing their jobs – they didn’t propose one single map. Ohioans deserve transparency and a commitment to draw a fair, constitutional map. Ohio Democrats are fighting like hell to get fair maps for Ohioans. But we need your help to spread the word: we’re getting out in our communities to register new voters, keep Ohioans informed, and make sure everyone has a voice in how our maps are drawn ahead of next year’s elections. = Thank you, Kathleen Clyde, ODP Chair = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Hassan Martini, Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind
subject: Trump has turned our cities into war zones.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
I saw it with my own eyes in Chicago. Armed troops, snipers, and unmarked vans. We must fight back. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91D5Y0OEMi_DqSiteNvAg89wZ6KQ8HNJV0_Bj77x4eHkV5vyiMNr7QTM0RpHQWA8dPg8n68Q8QYv1YJ6usnimHMrjyYBvM1lt6d9q8u8tR-Qh0C-lHIunyIywBNsLmbzBMgV7MhbTtg5EZw_NOXGdEWRzskXBO9nLNtke5wW1X1M-UeMhXj6QkTKBVR-dmaDwMeymGpu91uVCWaEQvPCEl1OWlTUCiuOnAc3AwspmkioOl3gVP5sEH4RD_VrryZEg5L_vC3hnDeA6DVJXIsyhCVJ3aqvr6WHFTq58yiJ4e_4J6JbIUX5IMKi3MZLuozL0MqPhp0oc823oOtMluZ_bHG8uaMOblXy-Qg4V_TdANfHuQNoJenfsmSqCdQ_GB1yjrYgT6VkAFQpkescON_sJuvXg/4kf/IE6yrKgWQeKQXqil48G8Gw/h0/h001.lkxY_7VZ90mISQR_RZjbJdBh6ihPlITa7V6QNW-ttIo)
---
Hello Friend, Our cities are turning into unrecognizable, dystopian, war-torn places. The kind we only ever read about or watch in sci-fi movies. I live in Chicago, and I travel to DC frequently. **The scenes unfolding in front of my eyes are terrifying. Our troops are patrolling our cities.** I went to the ICE facility yesterday in Chicago,**_and what I saw I never imagined would happen here in America._ **The faces are covered, and so too are the windows of the buildings they are hiding in. There are snipers on the roof and fences surrounding the buildings. Fun fact:**the Chicago Fire Department informed ICE that those fences are unlawful.**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91D5Y0OEMi_DqSiteNvAg89wZ6KQ8HNJV0_Bj77x4eHkV5OiDAlPUvwdWc90XomcBvLondxrY-yBeapASwtFMv7j5JimBYLTs_tPsF8gfo03RtW4UsZXuyB7jE4qKLe3tS6fMzpJC5XEHT-F3buojcUn1wJJ8KYZbvWBW7nCtmtTDS_L0rtt5faNY7SzA2nXqZadQQNQXpV1RhMVtO05t9CCTKwcY7zxvHck4uYbzL0y3sa3Jwbc4K16iAbtvXoIinp1CGjgByo9_f0FShyOtkuuOEJ9t00NpZHnVcpguc-S4YKzIYaoBt0Qn-CoB901y_2hdOw2moA1mCyDvmhdYX53vmlbU4K1nS-_Gs7EP_yh7lBk8BfGv3Jk_bKalQREOvuv_hlQe_U0_t6bvb4Phz3WQ/4kf/IE6yrKgWQeKQXqil48G8Gw/h1/h001.jL6N8y_C3mWDUwYFkkYUU9wtomfeelK-Ch2qH8FbmBk)
---
Of course, they ignored them. No checks and balances. They do not respect the law. They wave their guns around as a sign of intimidation, and it works because it's undeniably intimidating. I am frightened of the direction we are headed in. It starts little by little, and before we know it, **we are in a full-blown authoritarian state.** Right now, they are contained to one facility, although we have no idea where the unmarked vans are going to and from. The movement is nonstop, I can tell you that. **Every minute, unmarked cars go in and out.** The ICE facility was filled with press, so the media is covering the story to the best of their abilities. But remember: no one has been able to see what's happening behind those walls. Members of Congress have shown up demanding access, and the men with the guns keep saying no. **Legally, they are not allowed to deny such requests,_but they don 't care._** Many of these officers barely graduated high school, yet they are handed a gun and a badge at job fairs taking place all across the country. Their budget is endless. Meanwhile, healthcare is being stripped from sick children across America. The greed and cruelty are beyond imagination. We knew Trump 2.0 would be bad, but wow - **it has morphed into something unbearable.** And as always, the victims are the most vulnerable: hardworking men and women who risked it all in search of the American Dream we sold to the world. This moment gives us perspective on what we are up against, and why we must win. The House margin is one seat. If we control the House, it changes their calculations and what they may attempt.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91D5Y0OEMi_DqSiteNvAg89wZ6KQ8HNJV0_Bj77x4eHkV7ebgIC1PJE-_Z6xzDY4W29k7LTLz5PMpw7z-xnH5-xVBihXpmih6Fev471in1Gg1RlZoMgivzeluKIItFCuLeSnrHczfWV0FFI04OovdFGUhAoFNkHu8jqGyiMHgnT1fPQWkh8oY6iF7nc-PFgUrtgffu_miP3XV4Pxb4odfREUjDLf0qGs0bb0cJhc32uULZcexwuZMa5jEAxzv8g1O4koeeabaljzW1znWDapmd9VivLr92x_Pfs7tUj1uj7pnIEB7oVAHSyX1MEB6-GnH4NEu4qGGmqKtIerwQF7TD4e5NqBg7RaLVwGhT7Sta82b6DYHpTaXAvYSla6Ywt8HJlZFmqGaOQl0mbKsDtciVCBA/4kf/IE6yrKgWQeKQXqil48G8Gw/h2/h001.o6hOUZ2N1tGl9BEWIzg6igvl6a2aXioo1Z3jnqsoBeQ)
---
At the facility, I was encouraged to see many Congressional candidates protesting with us, and I was given guarantees that, if elected, they will not tolerate this. _**We need this from our leaders.**_ I am excited to share in the coming weeks some of the rising stars in our party that we at NDLB are getting behind. Election Day cannot come soon enough. After all, no one voted for any of this. The fight is ongoing, and we each have our role to play. **Contribute, call, write - do it all._And don 't stop._**
---
[ Join Our Fight Today ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91D5Y0OEMi_DqSiteNvAg89wZ6KQ8HNJV0_Bj77x4eHkV75OFhIGo7dtBernWlvJqTgf8irl-2zFe8zNGGOncVMsSV9TOfRwhI83bdtbUBrtrl-bJijlrWrVO3gjNzgSSACZ4Yx2qN0l_QssW7fnOzfMVfjK3zUzF8DPU8av24Y_TE5Q3Zv2GlW5I5L-bssbvicQzVoxVwhkfPJ_nj9r8y5NQcg1vP4v2aM5rsYkv2U4ljIIunf8xjAKQBfB-Hm-PMoEuZ3c8LPQHfuai_xJW1UN1C7_0fE2hpyPM4KVCU-B02fdd7dGbNfWiPoEZJIEFpJ4ygj-ur19fYjGF_S7B-Zni4FuMnKETXvFqn5kZ-KiRhCwPQqzgSgvo03n5FtGod5Duo_7f4vbl5GJ0h0tBBIcg/4kf/IE6yrKgWQeKQXqil48G8Gw/h3/h001.cwmGywqDsd92POHHbVRTcnPcekn0U2-MZ1Prk7L6Vrk)

Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Emily Randall
subject: I showed up to work. Republicans didn’t.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
I posted this video outside the Capitol at around 12:01 AM on Wednesday morning as the Republican government shutdown went into effect.

name: Mamdani Election Team via Our Revolution
subject: We Can Win NYC – But Only If We Out-Organize Every Super PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1011&refcode=email-20251003_v&akid=9457%2E5885482%2Exp5KDb ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

News reports just exposed that the anti-Mamdani super PACs have joined
forces, assembling a mega-coalition with one goal – stopping Zohran
Mamdani from becoming Mayor of NYC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33692?source=email-20251003&t=1060&akid=9457%2E5885482%2Exp5KDb ]Headline: Several super PACs that oppose Zohran Mamdani's candidacy for
mayor of New York City have banded together to coordinate attack ads

Their latest plan? Flood NYC neighborhoods with ads and Cuomo-branded paid
canvassers, blitzing voters with glossy attack ads and flyers.

We know these tactics work. In the primary, Our Revolution knocked on
doors, flipped undecided voters, and helped deliver a stunning victory for
progressive change. Now the billionaire-backed establishment is copying
that playbook, hoping their money can buy what we’re building.

If we’re going to win, we have to out-organize them in every ZIP code in
NYC. That means urgently raising $100,000 to fund three critical voter
contacts for every person on our list. Political scientists are clear: it
takes hearing something THREE TIMES before it truly clicks. With new
anti-Mamdani ads dropping every day, we cannot afford to fall behind.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251003nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9457%2E5885482%2Exp5KDb ]Will you donate $27 – or whatever you can – right now to help us ramp up
three phone banks each week and turn out more organizers to make sure the
anti-Mamdani super PACs don’t have a chance to drown us out?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251003nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9457%2E5885482%2Exp5KDb ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251003nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9457%2E5885482%2Exp5KDb ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20251003nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9457%2E5885482%2Exp5KDb ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20251003nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9457%2E5885482%2Exp5KDb ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251003nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9457%2E5885482%2Exp5KDb ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251003nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9457%2E5885482%2Exp5KDb ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

This isn’t just a numbers game – it’s people persuading people. Just last
week, one of our canvassers met a voter who was deeply concerned about
healthcare. After a real conversation about Mamdani’s plan to make sure
families can stay on their plans and afford coverage, that voter switched
from “undecided” to “YES.” That’s the power of organizing, not
advertising.

We’re not afraid of the opposition’s deep pockets because our engine runs
on real grassroots organizing. That means local teams leading volunteer
canvassers, not paid operatives sneaking attack ads onto doorsteps.

But here’s the truth: these anti-Mamdani mega-PACs can outspend us at any
moment. If we don’t hit our $100,000 goal, we won’t be able to reach every
voter three times – with authentic Our Revolution voices – before Election
Day.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251003nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9457%2E5885482%2Exp5KDb ]Now is the moment to show that grassroots organizing can overcome
billionaire spending. Please donate now – $27, $50, or whatever you can –
to fuel our teams and make sure that when voters open their doors or
answer their phones, it’s our organizers out there fighting for the
working class, not Cuomo’s paid shills fighting for the status quo.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

# Hello Capitalists,
### **Here is everything you should be following today:**
* Trump unleashes the consequences of Schumer's Shutdown
* _**Suspended** :_ $2B in funds for Chicago
* _**Suspended** :_ $8B in Biden era "Green energy" boondoggles
* Massive jet fuel refinery explosion rocks Los Angeles
* Bezos sees a bright future after the AI bubble bursts
* Cracker Barrel finally dumps the ad firm responsible for their disastrous rebrand
* Apple yanks ICE tracking app from its store after deadly attack

### **Today 's markets:**
* **✅ DOW: 46906.65 (⬆️0.83%)**
* **✅ S&P: 6705.70 (⬆️0.38%)**
* **✅ NASDAQ: 22886.36 (⬆️0.19%)**
* **⚠ ️⬇️CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 16.32 (1.86%)**

* * *
* * *
# Trump swings the hammer on Chicago, $2.1B in infrastructure spending on hold
President Donald Trump's OMB director Russ Vought **[ordered an immediate hold](https://substack.com/redirect/888031b6-5560-48b4-897f-5f544c3dceea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on $2.1B worth of infrastructure projects in Chicago, targeting key transit and utility systems.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/888031b6-5560-48b4-897f-5f544c3dceea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Vought spearheads federal takeover:** OMB Director Russell Vought leads the aggressive intervention, citing chronic mismanagement and safety violations in Chicago's aging networks as justification for the move.
* **Political backlash intensifies quickly:** Mayor Brandon Johnson blasts the order as "federal overreach," vowing legal challenges while rallying city council for emergency funding appeals.
* **Long-term reforms eyed ambitiously:** White House signals the Democrat instigated shutdown as a precursor to privatized upgrades, potentially reshaping urban infrastructure models across major Democratic strongholds
* **Social Media Onslaught:** After creating a viral trend by putting AI generated sombrero hats on Democratic politicians after the shutdown vote. Trump posted an AI generated video to Truth Social of a reworked version of Blue Oyster Cult's "(Don't Fear) The Reaper featuring members of the administration in the band and Russ Vought as the reaper.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1a96a20d-c92e-449f-965d-149245e946cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Health Sciences Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/28041d1f-3eff-4709-8aa3-0f355e610046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [RFK Jr drops AUTISM BOMBSHELL on Big Pharma](https://substack.com/redirect/28041d1f-3eff-4709-8aa3-0f355e610046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62fd2061-637a-40bc-b97d-ce4e871de0a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
RFK Jr just took dead aim on Big Pharma... and he is **NOT** messing around.
In a prime-time press conference he took them to task on everything from Tylenol and autism to COVID vaccines... And Big Pharma is _**HORRIFIED**_.
For the first time in decades, they're face-to-face with a politician their money _**CAN NOT**_ control. And that means their # 1 fear may be about to come true.
RFK Jr is now poised to EXPOSE **[Big Pharma's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/28041d1f-3eff-4709-8aa3-0f355e610046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
It's a secret that could cost them hundreds-of-billions in profit and dark money political donations...
Which is why they'll do everything in their power to stop you from hearing **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/28041d1f-3eff-4709-8aa3-0f355e610046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. And they may just succeed...
So we're not taking any chances, we're revealing everything TODAY in **[this short video](https://substack.com/redirect/28041d1f-3eff-4709-8aa3-0f355e610046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/28041d1f-3eff-4709-8aa3-0f355e610046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/28041d1f-3eff-4709-8aa3-0f355e610046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. It's not every day the US Secretary of Health and Human Services calls out one of Big Pharma's biggest cash cows. But that's exactly what RFK Jr just did. And they're terrified he's going to go one step further by revealing **[Big Pharma's Biggest Secret yet](https://substack.com/redirect/28041d1f-3eff-4709-8aa3-0f355e610046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
* * *
* * *
# Dept of Energy takes an axe to $8B in "rushed" Biden era green energy deals
In a stunning first-day blow amid a federal shutdown, the U.S. Department of Energy **[axed over 300 green energy awards](https://substack.com/redirect/7f1d0caa-38dc-40c8-9e13-94feb63a8e33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** worth nearly $8 billion across 16 states, sparking outrage from Democrats who decry the move as political payback targeting blue states.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7f1d0caa-38dc-40c8-9e13-94feb63a8e33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive Funding Slashed Overnight** : Cancellations hit projects from clean energy demos to grid upgrades, including $1.2 billion for California's ARCHES hydrogen hub and $1.1 billion for Washington's Pacific Northwest initiative, halting emissions cuts and infrastructure boosts.
* **Shutdown Sparks Political Fury** : Critics like Gov. Bob Ferguson and Sen. Chuck Schumer blast the timing as "outrageous" retaliation against Harris-won states, vowing legal fights while Trump officials defend it as fiscal prudence.
* **Viability Questioned by Feds** : Secretary Chris Wright deems awards "rushed" and uneconomical under Biden-era haste, prioritizing taxpayer ROI despite pleas that axing them undermines U.S. competitiveness in global clean tech.

* * *
* * *
# Massive explosion rocks LA as jet fuel facility detonates
A **[massive fire and explosion erupted](https://substack.com/redirect/893e1f48-c749-4327-8621-07bf7bf51b01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Thursday night at Chevron's sprawling El Segundo oil refinery--one of California's largest--igniting a jet fuel production unit and prompting a swift emergency response, though no injuries or evacuations were reported.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8f299f5b-0fdf-4de8-acaf-bdc8c1263da3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Fire Targets Jet Unit:** Flames engulfed a critical jet fuel production unit at the El Segundo facility, one of the West Coast's largest, with the cause remaining unclear amid ongoing investigations.
* **Zero Casualties Confirmed:** All refinery personnel and contractors were safely accounted for, averting human tragedy in the chaotic nighttime inferno that drew rapid emergency intervention.
* **No Resident Evacuations:** Local authorities declined to issue evacuation orders for nearby communities, citing stable monitoring of air quality and scene containment efforts.
* **Environmental Monitoring Clear:** Chevron's fence-line sensors detected no hazardous exceedances, easing immediate pollution fears from the blaze despite its industrial scale.

* * *
* * *
# Bezos warns of an AI bubble but sees a bright future after it pops
Amazon founder Jeff Bezos warned Thursday that artificial intelligence is inflating into an **["industrial bubble"](https://substack.com/redirect/afc5a5d8-b06c-4732-9e43-9504d39cae26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** fueled by frenzied funding for dubious startups, yet he predicts the tech will deliver "gigantic" societal benefits by revolutionizing every industry once the hype settles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/afc5a5d8-b06c-4732-9e43-9504d39cae26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Bezos Flags Bubble Frenzy** : Describes current AI surge as echoing 1990s biotech boom, where excitement funds wild ideas, complicating investor discernment between viable and flawed ventures.
* **Dot-Com Echoes Resurface** : Likens AI valuations to the 2000 internet crash, citing extreme cases like a six-person firm securing billions, but stresses such manias often yield lasting innovations.
* **Society 's Massive Payoff Looms**: Foresees AI transforming all sectors with profound advantages, akin to biotech's life-saving drugs, emerging "post-bubble" as "winners" solidify.
* **Echoed Warnings from Titans** : Bezos joins OpenAI's Sam Altman and Goldman Sachs' David Solomon in cautioning overvaluation risks, including potential stock market pullbacks amid speculative fervor.

* * *
* * *
# Cracker Barrel DUMPS the ad firm that wrecked it's business, VP also booted
In a stunning reversal amid fierce backlash, Cracker Barrel Old Country Store **[abruptly terminated its contract](https://substack.com/redirect/8c613176-a6b5-48fb-8807-d5a33d4bdf5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with design firm Prophet on Thursday, just weeks after unveiling--and quickly scrapping--a controversial modern logo that sparked outrage from customers and even President Donald Trump, contributing to an 8% plunge in restaurant traffic.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8c613176-a6b5-48fb-8807-d5a33d4bdf5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Leadership Shakeup Targets Focus** : Marketing VP Matt Benton exits as Thomas Yun returns to prioritize craveable classics and authentic country hospitality in menu revamps.
* **Backlash Ignites Culture War** : The iconic overalls-and-barrel logo swap drew viral fury, amplified by Trump's public slam, forcing swift reversion to preserve brand heritage.
* **Redesign Rollout Halted Abruptly** : Modern white interiors at four test sites have been replaced with traditional dark woods and decor suspended amid complaints of losing cozy charm.
* **Traffic Slump Hits Hard** : August 19 changes triggered 8% visit drop, with executives forecasting 7-8% quarterly decline and ongoing weakness in foot traffic as the company desperately seeks to regain customer loyalty.

* * *
* * *
# Apple bans ICE targeting app from it's store after deadly attack that killed 2
Apple **[yanked the ICEBlock app](https://substack.com/redirect/304ae3cb-4dcb-496a-8b39-0a08cf0a760f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from its App Store Thursday after a stern demand from Attorney General Pam Bondi and the Justice Department, citing grave risks to ICE agents' safety amid a surge in assaults following a deadly Dallas shooting that killed two.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fd09c11e-7f2a-45dd-914c-acdef543466e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Bondi Demands Swift Removal** : Attorney General Pam Bondi directed the DOJ to pressure Apple, declaring the app's anonymous ICE sightings a direct threat to officers risking their lives daily.
* **Creator Vows Fierce Fightback** : ICEBlock developer Joshua Aaron slammed Apple's move as "capitulating to an authoritarian regime," insisting the tool protects communities from administration overreach, not harms law enforcement.
* **Dallas Shooting Fuels Outrage** : Suspect Joshua Jahn searched for ICEBlock-like trackers before the fatal attack on a Texas ICE office last month, intensifying fears as assaults on agents skyrocketed over 1,000%.
* **Surge in Agent Assaults** : ICE's acting director Marcos Charles blamed violent rhetoric for the explosion in attacks, urging an end to rhetoric that endangers federal personnel enforcing immigration laws.

* * *
* * *

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: About Jack Ciattarelli
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
As Election Day comes closer and closer, I want to share with you everything you need to know about my opponent
| As Election Day comes closer and closer, I want to share with you everything you need to know about my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, and his plans for our state if we let him win this race.

And after reading this email, if you agree that my opponent is the wrong person to be leading New Jersey, I hope you’ll [_**split whatever you can between my campaign and The Long Run PAC to help me win this upcoming election.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5735?t=1&akid=5630%2E196590%2EsvTOQR)
---
| [DONATE ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5735?t=2&akid=5630%2E196590%2EsvTOQR)
---
**On abortion rights:** Jack Ciattarelli supports a statewide abortion ban and wants to defund Planned Parenthood healthcare centers in New Jersey, which would lead to patients losing access to not only abortion care, but also cancer and STI screenings, routine gynecological exams, and more.

**On affordability:** My opponent proudly stood alongside Trump as Washington Republicans cut Medicaid, set Medicare on track for disaster, took away food assistance, and gave billionaires a massive tax break in their price hike bill. Not only did he urge Republican Members of Congress to vote for Trump’s agenda — _he’s promising to implement it at the state level here in New Jersey, too._

**On Trump:** Ciattarelli got Trump’s endorsement in this race after shamelessly begging for it. He praises the disastrous policies Trump is implementing in Washington and promises, and even said this: “When I’m governor, we’re gonna do the same in New Jersey.”

It’s abundantly clear — **Jack Ciattarelli is out of touch with New Jersey, and we cannot let him become the next governor of our state.**

But with far-right super PACs lining the pockets of his campaign, I’m relying on my grassroots supporters now more than ever to help us out in the final stretch of this campaign.

[_**If you’re with me, please split whatever you can between my team and The Long Run PAC to help our campaign fight back against Jack Ciattarelli and his far-right backers and win this election.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5735?t=4&akid=5630%2E196590%2EsvTOQR)

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5739?t=11&akid=5630%2E196590%2EsvTOQR)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5740?t=13&akid=5630%2E196590%2EsvTOQR)
---
Thank you,

\- Mikie

# Prop 50 Ballots are Being Mailed Out! Return Your NO Vote ASAP
---
|
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** October 3rd, 2025Contact: nathan@nathanmagsig.com
---
| | | | | | **Prop 50 Ballots Will Be Mailed TOMORROW**
**(Clovis, CA)** \- Tomorrow, all ballots for the Prop 50 election will be mailed to your home. It is more important than ever that you Vote NO and return your ballot as soon as possible.

Proposition 50 would replace the independent California Citizens Redistricting Commission with lawmakers who could redraw districts for the 2026, 2028, and 2030 elections, effectively giving politicians the power to pick their voters instead of voters picking their representatives. It is estimated Republicans will **lose** **5 Congressional seats** if this passes.
**Why You Should Vote NO:**
* **Defend Independent Redistricting:** California voters approved an independent redistricting process to prevent partisan gerrymandering. Proposition 50 would undo that and put politicians back in charge.
* **Protect Rural and Conservative Voices:** Allowing lawmakers to redraw districts mid-decade will dilute the influence of our vote in the Central Valley.
* **Prevent Political Power Plays:** Proposition 50 is a clear attempt by Sacramento politicians to entrench power amongst themselves, overriding the will of the people.

**Take Action:**
* Vote **NO** on Proposition 50.
* Return your ballot promptly to ensure it counts.
* Encourage friends and family to vote **NO** to protect fair elections and taxpayer dollars.

This Ballot Measure is already going to _cost California taxpayers over $280 million_ , wasting resources that could be going to our roads, schools, and public safety.
For more information on Proposition 50 and how to vote, visit the California Secretary of State’s voter guide: [https://voterguide.sos.ca.gov/proposition/50/](https://nathanmagsig.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566959e132b9980afc6311201&id=6d63cb193a&e=6cdbd718cb)
---
| | ###
Nathan Magsig is a current Fresno County Supervisor, former Mayor of Clovis, and is running for the 12th Senate District. His family, wife Julie and their three children, reside in Clovis, CA.

name: David Hogg
subject: Answering some of your questions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Responding to some of the questions you have for me.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251003-1&t=1&akid=2712%2E587540%2EjQYN38)
Peter,
A few weeks ago, I asked you all if you had any questions about Leaders We Deserve, the Democratic Party, personal stuff — and I got hundreds of questions. Here’s just a few — some fun and some serious ones.
_**“I go to protests and most of them there’s just a lot of older people. Where are the younger people?”**_
This frustrates me too, but here’s what I've learned: When we give young people a representative like Zohran in NYC and show them somebody who actually understands the issues they're dealing with like the incredibly high cost of living and give them a clear solution, they do show up. When I was in NYC with Zohran, I’d never seen so many young people come up to a political candidate. They didn’t just know his name — they literally recited his platform back to him. That's the power of having younger candidates out there who actually do understand the lived experience of these young people. That's why Leaders We Deserve exists. We want to find the best young people we can in the country to help inspire a generation and wake them up to believe that democracy actually can work for them.
_**“What’s your favorite show?”**_
Better Call Saul.
_**“Cats or dogs?”**_
Dogs.
_**“How do you propose bringing the entire Democratic Party together with clear focused messaging that’ll appeal to a majority of Americans?”**_
For years, we’ve been obsessed with messaging. At this point, it’s a problem beyond messaging — it's a messenger problem. That’s what we’re trying to solve here at Leaders We Deserve. We need people on the frontlines of issues everyday Americans are facing that far too many members of Congress can only pretend to know. These issues that people like Congressman Maxwell Frost know all too well — when he was just a freshman member of Congress, he struggled to get housing because of the cost of running for office. Many members of Congress who've been there for decades don't even know what the cost of a gallon of milk is, let alone the average cost of rent. We need more people with those lived experiences in Congress. They’ll be on the frontline of fighting for those issues because they know the real challenges. That’s why Leaders We Deserve exists.
_**“What’s your favorite food?”**_
Anything my mom makes.
_**“How can we get corporate money out of the government and return our government to be in service of regular people’s lives?”**_
We received this question multiple times — and it’s exactly why we do this work. Our candidates don't take corporate money and that's because we know that if we're gonna reform the campaign system that has enabled the NRA, private prisons, and so many special interests actively harming millions of Americans, we cannot do that within a broken campaign finance system.
The way we’re gonna end up fixing this is electing young people who do not take corporate money, will be here for years to come, and are ready to fight the campaign finance system.
We back our candidates completely with support from over 200,000 individual donors across the country — your support makes it possible for us to win.
Right now is the best time to make an impact. This moment is critical — the groundwork we lay today _will_ determine the outcome of next year’s midterms. And a recurring monthly donation of just $5-$10 goes a long way in our ability to recruit principled candidates who can go toe-to-toe with corporate PACs and out-of-touch incumbents.
**[Please consider making a contribution today to help fuel our work to elect the next generation of bold, young progressive leaders.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251003_1_ama?refcode=em20251003-2712&amount=5&refcode2=2712_587540_jQYN38&akid=2712%2E587540%2EjQYN38)**

clean_body: Responding to some of the questions you have for me. Peter, A few weeks ago, I asked you all if you had any questions about Leaders We Deserve, the Democratic Party, personal stuff — and I got hundreds of questions. Here’s just a few — some fun and some serious ones. “I go to protests and most of them there’s just a lot of older people. Where are the younger people?” This frustrates me too, but here’s what I've learned: When we give young people a representative like Zohran in NYC and show them somebody who actually understands the issues they're dealing with like the incredibly high cost of living and give them a clear solution, they do show up. When I was in NYC with Zohran, I’d never seen so many young people come up to a political candidate. They didn’t just know his name — they literally recited his platform back to him. That's the power of having younger candidates out there who actually do understand the lived experience of these young people. That's why Leaders We Deserve exists. We want to find the best young people we can in the country to help inspire a generation and wake them up to believe that democracy actually can work for them. “What’s your favorite show?” Better Call Saul. “Cats or dogs?” Dogs. “How do you propose bringing the entire Democratic Party together with clear focused messaging that’ll appeal to a majority of Americans?” For years, we’ve been obsessed with messaging. At this point, it’s a problem beyond messaging — it's a messenger problem. That’s what we’re trying to solve here at Leaders We Deserve. We need people on the frontlines of issues everyday Americans are facing that far too many members of Congress can only pretend to know. These issues that people like Congressman Maxwell Frost know all too well — when he was just a freshman member of Congress, he struggled to get housing because of the cost of running for office. Many members of Congress who've been there for decades don't even know what the cost of a gallon of milk is, let alone the average cost of rent. We need more people with those lived experiences in Congress. They’ll be on the frontline of fighting for those issues because they know the real challenges. That’s why Leaders We Deserve exists. “What’s your favorite food?” Anything my mom makes. “How can we get corporate money out of the government and return our government to be in service of regular people’s lives?” We received this question multiple times — and it’s exactly why we do this work. Our candidates don't take corporate money and that's because we know that if we're gonna reform the campaign system that has enabled the NRA, private prisons, and so many special interests actively harming millions of Americans, we cannot do that within a broken campaign finance system. The way we’re gonna end up fixing this is electing young people who do not take corporate money, will be here for years to come, and are ready to fight the campaign finance system. We back our candidates completely with support from over 200,000 individual donors across the country — your support makes it possible for us to win. Right now is the best time to make an impact. This moment is critical — the groundwork we lay today will determine the outcome of next year’s midterms. And a recurring monthly donation of just $5-$10 goes a long way in our ability to recruit principled candidates who can go toe-to-toe with corporate PACs and out-of-touch incumbents. If you’ve already supported us — thank you so much. Our work is only possible because of people like you. In solidarity, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

name: Rob Bonta
subject: ICYMI: My thoughts on the Comey indictment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Folks, [https://secure.ngpvan.com/XASV2Vt6z0GjMW22KB_-Lg2] I wanted to make sure you saw this:
I sent a letter to U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi [https://www.sfchronicle.com/politics/article/bonta-bondi-comey-indictment-21069921.php?utm_source=marketing&utm_medium=copy-url-link&utm_campaign=article-share&hash=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2ZjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tL3BvbGl0aWNzL2FydGljbGUvYm9udGEtYm9uZGktY29tZXktaW5kaWN0bWVudC0yMTA2OTkyMS5waHA%3D&time=MTc1OTE4NDgwNDQ0Nw%3D%3D&rid=YjY2YmM1MjQtODM4NC00MGQyLWFkZDMtYThmNjg2ZDc3MmFh&sharecount=MA%3D%3D] after the Department of Justice indicted former FBI Director James Comey, making clear that any abuse of prosecutorial power is both un-American and unacceptable.
https://www.sfchronicle.com/politics/article/bonta-bondi-comey-indictment-21069921.php?utm_source=marketing&utm_medium=copy-url-link&utm_campaign=article-share&hash=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2ZjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tL3BvbGl0aWNzL2FydGljbGUvYm9udGEtYm9uZGktY29tZXktaW5kaWN0bWVudC0yMTA2OTkyMS5waHA%3D&time=MTc1OTE4NDgwNDQ0Nw%3D%3D&rid=YjY2YmM1MjQtODM4NC00MGQyLWFkZDMtYThmNjg2ZDc3MmFh&sharecount=MA%3D%3D [https://www.sfchronicle.com/politics/article/bonta-bondi-comey-indictment-21069921.php?utm_source=marketing&utm_medium=copy-url-link&utm_campaign=article-share&hash=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2ZjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tL3BvbGl0aWNzL2FydGljbGUvYm9udGEtYm9uZGktY29tZXktaW5kaWN0bWVudC0yMTA2OTkyMS5waHA%3D&time=MTc1OTE4NDgwNDQ0Nw%3D%3D&rid=YjY2YmM1MjQtODM4NC00MGQyLWFkZDMtYThmNjg2ZDc3MmFh&sharecount=MA%3D%3D]
As a prosecutor, Pam Bondi should know this as well as I do: we hold a very serious responsibility to wield our power in a fair and just manner, driven by facts and law.
Comey’s indictment is one more step in a deeply alarming trend of the politicization of the U.S. DOJ and ongoing abuse of power by those who ought to be most committed to justice.
I’m inspired by the many former U.S. DOJ employees who have resigned rather than agreeing to take part in the President’s petty, politically-motivated agenda.
But public servants shouldn’t have to sacrifice their own careers to defend the integrity of the Justice Department — our U.S. Attorney General and our President should never put them in that position.
As a fellow law officer, I implore Pam Bondi to reassert the U.S. DOJ’s independence, preserve the integrity of our legal system, and uphold the democratic norms our country relies on.
And as California Attorney General, I will never stop fighting against those who violate the law and the Constitution — and for the legal rights and freedoms owed to every one of us.
—Rob
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

subject: I’ve made a decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
After a great deal of reflection and prayer, I’ve made a decision...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116528248/573708065/-1743316615?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.03_James-Talarico-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiYTI4Yy04MmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u-996BBKvKrDFXXpcXdAO3ITQwbsWeyerF_elSHUe-s=) I’ve heard from a lot of Texans this summer. And after a great deal of reflection and prayer, I’ve made a decision:

I’m running for the U.S. Senate.

**_[I’m asking you to make one of the first donations to my campaign. Split it between my campaign and Maggie Hassan. This is a massive undertaking, and it would mean the world to me to know you have my back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116528249/573708066/-1743316615?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.03_James-Talarico-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiYTI4Yy04MmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u-996BBKvKrDFXXpcXdAO3ITQwbsWeyerF_elSHUe-s=)_** | | | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116528250/573708067/-1743316615?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.03_James-Talarico-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiYTI4Yy04MmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u-996BBKvKrDFXXpcXdAO3ITQwbsWeyerF_elSHUe-s=)
---
Right now, there’s something broken in America. Our economy is broken. Our politics are broken. Even our relationships with each other feel broken.

**That’s because the most powerful people in the world want it that way.**

The biggest divide in America is not left versus right — it’s top versus bottom.

Billionaires want us looking left and right at each other instead of looking up at them.

The people at the top work so hard to keep us angry and divided because our unity is a threat to their wealth and power. So their cable news networks and their social media algorithms tear us apart.

They divide us by party, by race, by gender, by religion so we don’t notice they’re defunding our schools, gutting our healthcare, and cutting taxes for themselves and their rich friends.

It’s the oldest strategy in the world: divide and conquer. But we will not be conquered.

**The fight ahead will not be easy. We’re the underdogs.**

We’re going up against these billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. We’re going up against a rigged system. And we’re going up against a lot of money.

But I’m a former middle school teacher — I don’t scare easily. And Texans don’t scare easily.

**Big Money is powerful, but it's nothing compared to people power.**

That’s why this is going to be a campaign fueled by people like you. I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I refuse to start now. So I need you with me.

**_[Please split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Maggie Hassan today to become a Founding Donor. We need as many people as possible chipping in on day one to prove our movement is strong enough.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116528251/573708068/-1743316615?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.03_James-Talarico-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiYTI4Yy04MmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u-996BBKvKrDFXXpcXdAO3ITQwbsWeyerF_elSHUe-s=)_**
