clean_body: After a great deal of reflection and prayer, I’ve made a decision... = I’ve heard from a lot of Texans this summer. And after a great deal of reflection and prayer, I’ve made a decision: I’m running for the U.S. Senate. = | | | = Right now, there’s something broken in America. Our economy is broken. Our politics are broken. Even our relationships with each other feel broken. That’s because the most powerful people in the world want it that way. The biggest divide in America is not left versus right — it’s top versus bottom. Billionaires want us looking left and right at each other instead of looking up at them. The people at the top work so hard to keep us angry and divided because our unity is a threat to their wealth and power. So their cable news networks and their social media algorithms tear us apart. They divide us by party, by race, by gender, by religion so we don’t notice they’re defunding our schools, gutting our healthcare, and cutting taxes for themselves and their rich friends. It’s the oldest strategy in the world: divide and conquer. But we will not be conquered. The fight ahead will not be easy. We’re the underdogs. We’re going up against these billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. We’re going up against a rigged system. And we’re going up against a lot of money. But I’m a former middle school teacher — I don’t scare easily. And Texans don’t scare easily. Big Money is powerful, but it's nothing compared to people power. That’s why this is going to be a campaign fueled by people like you. I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I refuse to start now. So I need you with me. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to James Talarico and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We're going to make history, and we're going to do it together. Let’s go. James If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Chris Ahuja
subject: The future of our party isn’t for sale
body:
A turning point for Democrats

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=cf78b67441&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,**Yesterday’s New York Times spotlighted a shift taking place in American politics: more Democrats are rejecting AIPAC.** I’m glad to see it because for too long, special interest corporate PACs and big-dollar influence have crowded out the voices of ordinary Americans. **AIPAC’s relentless push for unconditional support of Israel, no matter the cost or consequence, is deeply problematic**. It raises serious ethical and legal questions, undermines accountability, and sidelines the urgent need for a fair and just foreign policy that prioritizes human rights and peace.
**That’s why I’m running. Our campaign is built on people power, not PAC power.** We’re standing up to the entrenched interests that spend millions to keep Washington beholden to them, and instead, we’re lifting up the voices of working families who deserve to be heard.
**But to do it, I need you with me.** Together, we can prove that integrity and grassroots support will always be stronger than lobbyist money.
**I’m proud to be endorsed by Track AIPAC** and proud to be running without a dime from AIPAC or any corporate PAC. This campaign is powered entirely by people like you fighting for dignity, human rights, and justice. stand up to entrenched money and power.
[**Can I count on you to pitch in $25, $50, or whatever feels right today to keep building this people-powered movement?**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=8bc8050d93&e=5a6ee82cdb)

---
| [Donate Now](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=6b685a41b4&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| |
**Thank you for standing with me in this fight.**
**In solidarity,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=af6e0d0ab0&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

Join our winning team and help lead Harris County to a brighter future with leadership that **WORKS FOR THE PEOPLE!**

name: Winsome
subject: Better a few hours too soon than a minute too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: Please read EVERY word carefully | Please read EVERY word carefully| | | | Please read EVERY word carefully| - This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully? Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. Let me explain my predicament: FIRST, while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one go! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW , the polls are TIED. But I cannot win with this crippling cash disadvantage. TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE, I'm facing my CRUCIAL End of Quarter Deadline Goal and I'm WAY behind! in a serious bind here, Peter. I'm over $10,000 behind pace to reach my upcoming Goal. I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother: Democrat opponent has Leftist billionaires like George Soros and Hollywood liberals backing her, but I'm 100% relying on you! can't thank you enough for reading this message all the way through, Peter. You are truly a key part of my team! Together, we will close this fundraising gap and beat my liberal opponent in November! Thanks again and may God bless you! -Winsome Earle-Sears . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596

name: Guy Short, Founder of The Flyover
subject: What every investor asks
body:
Can The Flyover really deliver a return? Here's what you should know.

| | |
---
| |
#
---
**Dear Reader,
**
The most common question I get is simple:
"**How do I get a return on my investment in ****_The Flyover_****? "
**
It's the right question to ask. And while all investments carry risk, here's why _The Flyover_ is different:
* We're already profitable after just two years (Most start-ups never become profitable).
* We operate with 80% gross margins and 24% net income (Great margins).
* That puts _The Flyover_ in the top 1% of media start-ups (Top 1%)!

The three most common ways [investors can realize returns](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskb1ugzAUhZ_GbIn8gwkZPFRCbGmWSh0tgy_BrbFT-wLK21c0ibp07Pzd--kcnfeTPhnnXbi8mgkUDlFbsK43CFYHWLMHREh6HQ3CAunmwgIZYzL5M2tOudwxuqNC98Mwe__7WxVWDQAcRAGKHeRRMklFWYwKOJjBdqJjnFe2rxkrD9YAA1MeedWZwqnNyygVrGZUiH0peUfrQdYGQAIcSUnBOoxp_xFdwBEGf4sLpH0fp8KrEfGaiXghvCW8vQf-43LDop1x0jnOqQcimuYZn_BqAxNYN09ENOc1gN2dwDrzQL2ZrsZdAhFNe3c-QQwIAYlovmbI6GLgD4KQNtdbe2701o7LIil7XZ33LlcHUtLLZJz_aYH_OsWi-HcAAAD___mpp-U) are:
1. **A Sale:** A larger media company or strategic partner could acquire _The Flyover_. (If that day comes, we'd only partner with those who share our standards. CNN or New York Times need not apply.)
2. **Public Listing:** The future could include listing shares on a stock exchange, giving investors freedom to buy and sell.
3. **Profit Distributions** (Dividends): Because we're profitable now, unlike most start-ups, dividends are a [real possibility](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskb1ugzAUhZ_GbIn8gwkZPFRCbGmWSh0tgy_BrbFT-wLK21c0ibp07Pzd--kcnfeTPhnnXbi8mgkUDlFbsK43CFYHWLMHREh6HQ3CAunmwgIZYzL5M2tOudwxuqNC98Mwe__7WxVWDQAcRAGKHeRRMklFWYwKOJjBdqJjnFe2rxkrD9YAA1MeedWZwqnNyygVrGZUiH0peUfrQdYGQAIcSUnBOoxp_xFdwBEGf4sLpH0fp8KrEfGaiXghvCW8vQf-43LDop1x0jnOqQcimuYZn_BqAxNYN09ENOc1gN2dwDrzQL2ZrsZdAhFNe3c-QQwIAYlovmbI6GLgD4KQNtdbe2701o7LIil7XZ33LlcHUtLLZJz_aYH_OsWi-HcAAAD___mpp-U).

To recap: **Sale. Listing. Distributions.
**
Here is what's important:
While _T_ _he Flyover_ offering is technically open to anyone, it is our #1 goal to [fill this round](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskb1ugzAUhZ_GbIn8gwkZPFRCbGmWSh0tgy_BrbFT-wLK21c0ibp07Pzd--kcnfeTPhnnXbi8mgkUDlFbsK43CFYHWLMHREh6HQ3CAunmwgIZYzL5M2tOudwxuqNC98Mwe__7WxVWDQAcRAGKHeRRMklFWYwKOJjBdqJjnFe2rxkrD9YAA1MeedWZwqnNyygVrGZUiH0peUfrQdYGQAIcSUnBOoxp_xFdwBEGf4sLpH0fp8KrEfGaiXghvCW8vQf-43LDop1x0jnOqQcimuYZn_BqAxNYN09ENOc1gN2dwDrzQL2ZrsZdAhFNe3c-QQwIAYlovmbI6GLgD4KQNtdbe2701o7LIil7XZ33LlcHUtLLZJz_aYH_OsWi-HcAAAD___mpp-U) with as many _Flyover_ readers as possible. _The Flyover_ exists because of you--and we want to own it with you. Over the last few years I've gotten to know countless _Flyover_ readers - and y'all are salt of the earth. There is nobody I'd rather partner with.

We've already welcomed more than 1,425 Flyover investors, and together we've raised **$2.15 million of the $5 million total**. That means we're just **$350,000 away from our $2.5 million goal for Q3 - but we are behind. **That's why I'm writing you again today. Longtime readers who [invest right now](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskb1ugzAUhZ_GbIn8gwkZPFRCbGmWSh0tgy_BrbFT-wLK21c0ibp07Pzd--kcnfeTPhnnXbi8mgkUDlFbsK43CFYHWLMHREh6HQ3CAunmwgIZYzL5M2tOudwxuqNC98Mwe__7WxVWDQAcRAGKHeRRMklFWYwKOJjBdqJjnFe2rxkrD9YAA1MeedWZwqnNyygVrGZUiH0peUfrQdYGQAIcSUnBOoxp_xFdwBEGf4sLpH0fp8KrEfGaiXghvCW8vQf-43LDop1x0jnOqQcimuYZn_BqAxNYN09ENOc1gN2dwDrzQL2ZrsZdAhFNe3c-QQwIAYlovmbI6GLgD4KQNtdbe2701o7LIil7XZ33LlcHUtLLZJz_aYH_OsWi-HcAAAD___mpp-U) will still receive** 5% bonus shares**--and up to 15% bonus shares for larger investments.

Will you be one of the readers who helps us reach $2.5 million?

[**Invest in ****_The_**** ****_Flyover_**** today**](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskb1ugzAUhZ_GbIn8gwkZPFRCbGmWSh0tgy_BrbFT-wLK21c0ibp07Pzd--kcnfeTPhnnXbi8mgkUDlFbsK43CFYHWLMHREh6HQ3CAunmwgIZYzL5M2tOudwxuqNC98Mwe__7WxVWDQAcRAGKHeRRMklFWYwKOJjBdqJjnFe2rxkrD9YAA1MeedWZwqnNyygVrGZUiH0peUfrQdYGQAIcSUnBOoxp_xFdwBEGf4sLpH0fp8KrEfGaiXghvCW8vQf-43LDop1x0jnOqQcimuYZn_BqAxNYN09ENOc1gN2dwDrzQL2ZrsZdAhFNe3c-QQwIAYlovmbI6GLgD4KQNtdbe2701o7LIil7XZ33LlcHUtLLZJz_aYH_OsWi-HcAAAD___mpp-U)

Sincerely,
Guy Short

clean_body: Can The Flyover really deliver a return? Here's what you should know. | | | | | Dear Reader, The most common question I get is simple: "How do I get a return on my investment in The Flyover? " It's the right question to ask. And while all investments carry risk, here's why The Flyover is different: We're already profitable after just two years (Most start-ups never become profitable). We operate with 80% gross margins and 24% net income (Great margins). That puts The Flyover in the top 1% of media start-ups (Top 1%)! The three most common ways are: 1. A Sale: A larger media company or strategic partner could acquire The Flyover. (If that day comes, we'd only partner with those who share our standards. CNN or New York Times need not apply.) 2. Public Listing: The future could include listing shares on a stock exchange, giving investors freedom to buy and sell. 3. Profit Distributions (Dividends): Because we're profitable now, unlike most start-ups, dividends are a . To recap: Sale. Listing. Distributions. Here is what's important: While T he Flyover offering is technically open to anyone, it is our #1 goal to with as many Flyover readers as possible. The Flyover exists because of you--and we want to own it with you. Over the last few years I've gotten to know countless Flyover readers - and y'all are salt of the earth. There is nobody I'd rather partner with. We've already welcomed more than 1,425 Flyover investors, and together we've raised $2.15 million of the $5 million total. That means we're just $350,000 away from our $2.5 million goal for Q3 - but we are behind. That's why I'm writing you again today. Longtime readers who will still receive 5% bonus shares--and up to 15% bonus shares for larger investments. Will you be one of the readers who helps us reach $2.5 million? Sincerely, Guy Short Founder, The Flyover | | Own The Flyover Disclaimer Equity crowdfunding investments in private placements, and start-up investments in particular, are speculative and involve a high degree of risk and those investors who cannot afford to lose their entire investment should not invest in start-ups. Companies seeking startup investment through equity crowdfunding tend to be in earlier stages of development and their business model, products and services may not yet be fully developed, operational or tested in the public marketplace. There is no guarantee that the stated valuation and other terms are accurate or in agreement with the market or industry valuations. Further, investors may receive illiquid and/or restricted stock that may be subject to holding period requirements and/or liquidity concerns.DealMaker Securities LLC, a registered broker-dealer, and member of | , located at 4000 Eagle Point Corporate Drive, Suite 950, Birmingham, AL 35242, is the Intermediary for this offering and is not an affiliate of or connected with the Issuer. body:
Here’s why we urgently need your help:
#
Here’s something you may not know, Peter:
**The race for North Carolina’s open U.S. Senate seat is on track to become one of the most expensive and competitive elections EVER.**
**[If you’re ready to help us flip this critical Senate seat and elect Democrats across the country in 2026, please chip in $5 today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96260?refcode=em20251003-9519&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9519%2E614464%2E3k9CU3)** Otherwise, keep reading to learn more about what’s happening in North Carolina right now.
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96260?refcode=em20251003-9519&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9519%2E614464%2E3k9CU3)**
Earlier this year, North Carolina’s current U.S. Senator, Republican Thom Tillis, announced that he will not seek re-election.
Almost immediately, the nation’s top election watchers re-classified the race from “Lean Republican” to “TOSS UP” — solidifying North Carolina as Democrats’ best opportunity to pick up a Senate seat in 2026.
Then, candidates entered the race on both sides. Democrat Roy Cooper, the state’s former governor who has never lost an election, and Republican Michael Whatley, former chairman of the Republican National Committee.
**Now, the GOP is flooding North Carolina with money.** They know the stakes of this race. They know that Democrats are gaining incredible momentum. So they’re already spending whatever it takes to keep this seat in their control — more than a year out from the election!
**That’s why we urgently need your help today, Peter.[Will you help us take advantage of our best opportunity to flip a U.S. Senate seat and to elect more Democrats in 2026 by chipping in $5 or whatever you can today? We’re committed to electing Democrats in all 50 states, but with the GOP more motivated than ever we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96260?refcode=em20251003-9519&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9519%2E614464%2E3k9CU3)**

subject: It’s time to fix our broken system in DC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Reilly for Montana

It’s Reilly Neill.

The Daines government shutdown is officially underway. I’m reaching out because Montanans deserve better.

After voting to take healthcare away from Montana’s working families, veterans, and vulnerable communities, Daines joined the Senate Republicans in forcing a government shutdown to prevent any chance of getting it back.

We need real leadership that will keep the government running and deliver for every Montanan. That’s why I’m running to beat Daines, and why I need your support. [Will you chip in $7 now to support my campaign?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquMsbqgvb_9iNr2WTy5P_7nWLwrGEq8WRtV0NBejvsUu_228oEyDi_A5GCSR92aUhOudEVCgjMxno9CED6NGERGW24mVbFr8XD_62OgzoXA8nAsGDQgDpFUmNs4dA8Xe4A2TDx5nyc-rYRdZr1QFc2WQa4yhcxwspnj3inH2Oo3AlyIpRzuptqTxbjHJs56Yh4iB8Dbdfe-5vZyjWk2Sl_Z-18naXEf8r-QwiDZ3BocFIxyv0izpQb2T5Lj2JJpdWiLRPKT0tL_u4IAIWqvQYjAQF4ytcZQ_Dq1Ce1ig3f4NBHJn5K71xzGnbit2Vd-mXc2xLGhKFGOWj-o9Mjr23zV/4kf/JcOCcc3ZS-yd2w0uAGeEog/h2/h001.m2O-O6DdxT7PJGqY-01G0MhyXtgn9GIh7v7jlTDFmDI) | | [DONATE »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquMsbqgvb_9iNr2WTy5P_7nWLwrGEq8WRtV0NBejvsUu_228oEyDi_A5GCSR92aUhOudEVCgjMxno9CED6NGERGW24mVbFr8XD_62OgzoXA8rRGRfjxJE4aeUFRE6p9jKpHq0rsoSnJW4T1KSX4p82I6dZ4TvTlnppiBdYPWXWglJHi3kfAlU9Pap54Qi_vsCm_o2S92wL4fl-eNyY5t17cTJgZ4sbpuzVi1HjECnch5FV94AO71RVouxnbKVty0jn5AGQFXiedsG1546AKUKR88g-KYKz7NAQj62kVsB-oG88XrODEFzBfry_2oRQZYslyvlGD7g2_FPpDBfq6UyJm/4kf/JcOCcc3ZS-yd2w0uAGeEog/h3/h001.i8gID3FKHjaYXL337c0tkCMRoKfNSbBcTgvtyUkqVUE)

Daines doesn’t care about the government shutting down because he’s not representing you in the Senate. He’s representing the big-money donors and corporate special interests that got him there.

My campaign is different. I’m not beholden to billionaires or DC insiders. I’m running to stand up for you in the Senate by lowering costs for Montanans and bringing accountability to corruption in Washington.

[The time to fix our broken system is now, and I need your support. Will you chip in $7 to support my campaign?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquMsbqgvb_9iNr2WTy5P_7nWLwrGEq8WRtV0NBejvsUu_228oEyDi_A5GCSR92aUhOudEVCgjMxno9CED6NGERGW24mVbFr8XD_62OgzoXA8oNllRJJxYiywPljP7vgiQQKOZU8pwLHtywSP5BkXwOwPTPcoat_Ae2nwUIjN5bzu4ebgIrntKnrQUJriksnf3rLU_3lO80zyDGW6CgNReT4tThfhBqn1U5eI1KtP-4LX428S97adGaWIEkW8xzPdGo7BGDVflz6vkTsGP6RwZsFmYJLZQv_8ZD-pcvSDe-NdqYonLyMmUtIKiUQzsF0L6nAnKIovC0qfEalrw5SlPof/4kf/JcOCcc3ZS-yd2w0uAGeEog/h4/h001.9H3ktbJxmbSGQftVBwTwT3Hfmr6x68O25uDK3zyyql0)

name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: From the bottom of my heart, Peter, Thank You.

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

I want to convey how much this means to me, because I wasn’t supposed to make it this far... Let me explain. At 17, I dropped out of high school. My parents, a tough Army General and an even tougher schoolteacher, gave me two choices: Go back to school, or get a job. So I went to work at a fine-dining establishment some of you may know as Waffle House. Simply put, I’ve had to work for everything I have ever had in life. Jesus carried me through trauma, heartbreak, single motherhood, public failure, and private grief. He carried mewhen I was diagnosed with PTSD. He carried me when I moved four times to keep my children safe. And when I had nothing left to give,He filled me with living water. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0k3n25n8zwkxzankvpmgvsvyatcmcqq0vld6sqryb7tyxbk64svf594rzgsh4rc1ca7xrz04ud4b5z94woz3dfzowfbb&__stmp=t3kj2u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=34017q10ity9h3kv47kqluwqa9vky1nbg75up4m1192moi71d5d63xsheb1zloc5fc1omgb1a8b58fjck41o3bf1rmsexrrqzt1eps3qns3poxerj2joh25p30e76i301ix5k351s3ag07a0vm5ify&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kj2u&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**

clean_body: Please read the message below from Turning Point USA. Steve Thompson, Editor | | | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / AFFILIATE RELATIONSHIP NOTICE: The sender of this communication likely has a financial or material connection to the companies or individuals mentioned and may receive commissions from purchases you make through related sites. name: Kendall Qualls
subject: How we can shock the political class
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat Tim Walz

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsn5tl5qcmiinvuimftfv8mafmkqbrica83r16b0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a _Conservative outsider_ running for governor of Minnesota to **defeat Tim Walz.** His far-left leadership and failed policies have hurt families here and serve as a dangerous model for the rest of the country.
Before I share my story, I need to ask: **_[Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help me take him on and protect our values?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2fqca3urmc9hhpnhlnrdrdlh58ofmots8h1a1l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs) _**

---
[CHIP IN NOW →](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo904oj5nh0pid5t60fdcufbvpuoq1u66ngmind0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
| | **Tim Walz’s leadership is a warning for America.** He’s raised taxes by _billions_ , expanded government control over everyday life, and pushed radical social policies that divide communities and weaken public safety.
_If his approach spreads to more states, America will be less free, less prosperous, and less safe._
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** I grew up in poverty — first in Harlem, then in a trailer park in Oklahoma. I worked my way through college, served as a U.S. Army officer, and spent 30 years in the private sector leading teams and turning around struggling businesses.
I’ve _never been_ a career politician, and I don’t owe the political class anything.
That’s exactly why I can, and will, take on the entrenched bureaucracy, cut waste, lower taxes, and put power back in the hands of hardworking people.
This fight isn’t just about Minnesota. _It’s about stopping a dangerous agenda before it spreads_ , and proving that Conservative leadership can still win, even in a state the left thinks they own.
The national Democratic machine is already lining up behind Walz.
**If Conservatives across America stand with me now, we can shock the political class and restore freedom, prosperity, and common sense to Minnesota.**
**_[Can I count on your support right now?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmcqep6mlmop3uetcreggh82kfb57limogtudsko_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)_ **Your donation today will help us reach voters, fight back against attacks, and build the momentum we need to win.
---
[DONATE $25](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkk0t7vu7q6pfav02qbfmf671qiolks9ce6bfau0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
[DONATE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zusoot4e2vtka5tc1n3ium6kghmbuo4f02ij5bf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
[DONATE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjeth25gqamhjkhn22v5t65huu8p0ici3tppd57o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2dtjn55p9tpdmgst4n620dnju4rq68eq6ur9lv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
| | **__**Thank you for believing in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za1qvl3du7db201pnjmbeffdau8ntrjf4gusvo4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrheioa7pkcbumck6oevutadcm08cv6an77619m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za749p4dd4br750v5jjfmmp5p1dvl9ap35ecp0m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
|
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zefg0kulthmv390653h2i070kfh1r5engovsm4v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
****
**The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsg5en1l743oiksupndoencidninckf6s67h3tv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.
[SHOP THE STORE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zucu0i79k78u7jhnoqdfdvlepu0fahc08jqrd5oo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4slj60or2chh2bs)

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021yeqvlm7qi7jxfjp8mjdrqh4nvmirtstdigx3sbw4omq9q2nzht8lwoco0u6kfbvadysnjzleacx9srnbqofg4jsoi8qtowxhj1n5g0873vemfuagxlafmvyh9ki261wpf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kjsz&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---

clean_body: Please read the message below from Turning Point USA. | | | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. | Trump and the GOP let the government shut down so they can raise healthcare costs for working people—and lied about why.

Now, they’re threatening to lay off federal workers. They made it clear _they don’t care what happens to us._

But I do. I know how hard it is when your paycheck is late or you lose healthcare. I’ve had to drive for Uber to make ends meet and been denied apartments in D.C. due to my credit.

**While people like us struggle, Republicans are nowhere to be seen. But I’m still here, Peter, and even while the government is shut down I still want to represent everyday people by hearing _directly_ from you.**

So I’m sending out a survey to hear what you think about the shutdown.

A lot of the emails you get from me are asking for your support to fuel this movement so we can defeat fascism. This time, I want to ask for your opinion, Peter, so I can advocate for you while Republicans are nowhere to be seen.

[**_Will you take this survey to tell me what you think about the government shutdown and how it affects you? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/C-LoV0WLk-Ls03Aq7o1h2A~~/AAPPABA~/s0ggLUmzU7Ntq0R9C5b92bKjC0mBDX3oAGSYpegREAs62axzHc3KDdaqMPhY2c7oGaXI6XsbzkL5NtFXQNbZtTpSh--WFW7jPnqMESikVBkxrKUrhI5YpWzsHhqY9sn_A-WeV7JFRuPftp0u3NgxX1aA8HSkuKPFsM_wPWeQzCuGoPZs3GGHIwFXOgio4R0g4YGAdBMiECiQfKuaWJmgWOiDjhYGudmUUGlu9ZsYHI_9pZE4eBrQE05Ve7VwKdFvzvm_kexDg7ZTUlWo_QAnHFLXYTZHFApLrnFj_dn0RMhMGiaY5CRch-BFLM6JR7e_) | | **[Take the Survey](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/C-LoV0WLk-Ls03Aq7o1h2A~~/AAPPABA~/s0ggLUmzU7Ntq0R9C5b92bKjC0mBDX3oAGSYpegREAs62axzHc3KDdaqMPhY2c7oGaXI6XsbzkL5NtFXQNbZtTpSh--WFW7jPnqMESikVBkxrKUrhI5YpWzsHhqY9sn_A-WeV7JFRuPftp0u3NgxX1aA8HSkuKPFsM_wPWeQzCuGoPZs3GGHIwFXOgio4R0g4YGAdBMiECiQfKuaWJmgWOiDjhYGudmUUGlu9ZsYHI_9pZE4eBrQE05Ve7VwKdFvzvm_kexDg7ZTUlWo_QAnHFLXYTZHFApLrnFj_dn0RMhMGiaY5CRch-BFLM6JR7e_)**

Maxwell Frost

Hey folks,
I just wrapped another fiery live session of _Welcome to the Party, Pal_ with my friend and new Democrat Joe Walsh. We went deep on the government shutdown, ICE raids in Chicago, and what it means to actually fight for working people in this moment.
* **[00:01:00]** Joe reflects on becoming a Democrat and why the party still frustrates him.
* **[00:03:00]** We dig into the shutdown strategy, Democratic messaging, and why affordability is the key frame.
* **[00:12:15]** I talk about ICE raids in Chicago and why this aggressive, unconstitutional behavior should terrify all of us.
* **[00:22:00]** Joe and I agree: Democrats must reclaim the moral high ground on immigration without losing touch with security and order.
* **[00:33:00]** We explore what kind of Democratic leadership we need in 2028 to break through the establishment fog.

**[If you care about building a Democratic Party that actually fights--that delivers, that speaks plainly, and doesn't flinch in the face of cruelty--become a paid subscriber today. I'd appreciate your support.](https://substack.com/redirect/f8bfa9bd-08dd-4c42-ab90-96e259830c74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

body:
Add your name to stand with Democrats in this government shutdown
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116532298/573721531/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQxZDg3OC04YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swoMcNOi6263Jk21kj0ch5pzryjH0hoEi0fdoZZbfAs=)
**🚨 BREAKING NEWS 🚨**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116532299/573721533/-309737922?refcode=251003_RG_shutdown-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQxZDg3OC04YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swoMcNOi6263Jk21kj0ch5pzryjH0hoEi0fdoZZbfAs=)**
Hi, it’s Congressman Robert Garcia here with an urgent request.
The government has officially shut down, and the damage to our country is real — to federal workers, community services, and programs that so many families depend on.
But that’s not all. We’re now seeing Donald Trump use the federal government to weaponize that pain — blaming Democrats publicly through partisan messages and websites.
**That’s not just wrong — it’s likely illegal under the Hatch Act. And I’m calling for a full investigation into these violations.**
**[But I need to know where you stand, so let me know: Do you support Democrats investigating Trump’s lawless administration and working to hold him accountable for his abuses of power?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116532300/573721534/-1512507916?refcode=251003_RG_shutdown-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQxZDg3OC04YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swoMcNOi6263Jk21kj0ch5pzryjH0hoEi0fdoZZbfAs=&emci=e56be6a6-79a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c8d1d878-8ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
[ANSWER NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116532302/573721535/-1512507916?refcode=251003_RG_shutdown-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQxZDg3OC04YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swoMcNOi6263Jk21kj0ch5pzryjH0hoEi0fdoZZbfAs=&emci=e56be6a6-79a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c8d1d878-8ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)
It’s simple: We must hold Trump accountable for his reckless attacks on the rule of law, democratic norms, and the constraints on his power.
If we cave now, we’d only be setting the stage for Trump to abuse his power without consequence even more in the future. We can’t let that happen.
**By standing together, we let Washington know that we won’t back down. That we won’t let fear and coercion win. And that we will defend our communities, our neighbors, and our future with all our strength.**
**[If you’re in, add your name to my petition and let me know you’re ready to stand up to Donald Trump at this critical moment for our democracy.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116532304/573721536/-1512507916?refcode=251003_RG_shutdown-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQxZDg3OC04YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swoMcNOi6263Jk21kj0ch5pzryjH0hoEi0fdoZZbfAs=&emci=e56be6a6-79a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c8d1d878-8ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116532306/573721539/-1512507916?refcode=251003_RG_shutdown-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQxZDg3OC04YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swoMcNOi6263Jk21kj0ch5pzryjH0hoEi0fdoZZbfAs=&emci=e56be6a6-79a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c8d1d878-8ba0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116532307/573721542/-309737922?refcode=251003_RG_shutdown-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQxZDg3OC04YmEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swoMcNOi6263Jk21kj0ch5pzryjH0hoEi0fdoZZbfAs=)

body:
Trump and his buddies don’t care if our children go hungry. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116532768/573722991/1113648782?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkY2FkMWY1LThjYTAtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1MWwnK4ssxmbHUJdlzfrQh3Q9dIDAO4lAce5cXvSf0=&emci=288ab3dc-65a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0dcad1f5-8ca0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16951753)

Let’s call this what it is, Peter: **this is a _Republican_ government shutdown.** Trump’s administration has already set their wildly-unpopular plans in motion: They slashed Medicaid to the tune of almost a trillion dollars. And they’re hell-bent on letting Obamacare funding expire, so folks’ premiums will skyrocket — all to give their billionaire buddies a tax break. And now, they’ve ushered in a cruel and catastrophic government shutdown — _all because they refused to negotiate with Democrats._ **[Peter, if you stand with Democrats against Republican inaction, add your name>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116532769/573722992/-1020505496?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkY2FkMWY1LThjYTAtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1MWwnK4ssxmbHUJdlzfrQh3Q9dIDAO4lAce5cXvSf0=&emci=288ab3dc-65a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0dcad1f5-8ca0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16951753)** **[STAND WITH DEMOCRATS »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116532770/573722993/-1020505496?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkY2FkMWY1LThjYTAtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1MWwnK4ssxmbHUJdlzfrQh3Q9dIDAO4lAce5cXvSf0=&emci=288ab3dc-65a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0dcad1f5-8ca0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16951753)** Republicans don’t care that their actions could cause Americans everywhere to suffer:
* Mothers and children who rely on the WIC food program could lose the resources that keep them from going hungry.
* The Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP, formerly known as food stamps) could also run out of funds — and plunge people everywhere into food insecurity.
* Tens of thousands of federal sector workers and active-duty members of the military will be forced to go in and do their jobs without pay.

Democrats’ attempts to negotiate with Republicans over a way to keep the government funded and preserve access to health care for 20 million Americans were met with stonewalling, selfish tantrums, and partisan blame games. _Peter, the cruelty is the point._ Republican inaction caused this shutdown, and everything that may happen because of it. Democrats need to know RIGHT NOW if you stand with them against Republicans’ refusal to negotiate — and their willingness to let our kids go hungry. **[The time is now. Add your name if you stand with Democrats against Republican inaction>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116532771/573722994/-1020505496?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkY2FkMWY1LThjYTAtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1MWwnK4ssxmbHUJdlzfrQh3Q9dIDAO4lAce5cXvSf0=&emci=288ab3dc-65a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0dcad1f5-8ca0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16951753)** **[STAND WITH DEMOCRATS »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116532772/573722995/-1020505496?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkY2FkMWY1LThjYTAtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v1MWwnK4ssxmbHUJdlzfrQh3Q9dIDAO4lAce5cXvSf0=&emci=288ab3dc-65a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0dcad1f5-8ca0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16951753)** Onward, Unite the Country

clean_body: Trump and his buddies don’t care if our children go hungry. | Let’s call this what it is, Peter: this is a Republican government shutdown. Trump’s administration has already set their wildly-unpopular plans in motion: They slashed Medicaid to the tune of almost a trillion dollars. And they’re hell-bent on letting Obamacare funding expire, so folks’ premiums will skyrocket — all to give their billionaire buddies a tax break. And now, they’ve ushered in a cruel and catastrophic government shutdown — all because they refused to negotiate with Democrats. Republicans don’t care that their actions could cause Americans everywhere to suffer: Mothers and children who rely on the WIC food program could lose the resources that keep them from going hungry. The Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP, formerly known as food stamps) could also run out of funds — and plunge people everywhere into food insecurity. Tens of thousands of federal sector workers and active-duty members of the military will be forced to go in and do their jobs without pay. Democrats’ attempts to negotiate with Republicans over a way to keep the government funded and preserve access to health care for 20 million Americans were met with stonewalling, selfish tantrums, and partisan blame games. Peter, the cruelty is the point. Republican inaction caused this shutdown, and everything that may happen because of it. Democrats need to know RIGHT NOW if you stand with them against Republicans’ refusal to negotiate — and their willingness to let our kids go hungry. Onward, Unite the Country | Unite the Country is dedicated to electing Democrats who support common sense policies, champion middle class values and are willing to engage Americans regardless of where they live — but we can’t do it without you! At this critical moment in American history, we’re calling on you to join Unite the Country in this fight. = = = Follow along:** | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: FROM: Peter TO: President Trump
body:
You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump.

| | | | Hey there –
We are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.
You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. [So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-4ph5n31mOE852PlnIQ)Dear President Trump,
I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.
Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time.
From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:
1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America.
2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.
Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration.
Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.
Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
Sincerely,
X_________________ | [ SIGN THE LETTER >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-OoA35gvmNGZVhnQMnhw)
---
Thank you,

Team Marsha Blackburn
| |

---
* Flip the house next year
* Impeach President Trump
* Reverse the Trump agenda

---

The Democrats are flooding this race with over $100 million from Soros, the DNC, and the liberal unions to rig California’s maps and export their radical policies in California nationwide—open borders, high taxes, and woke nonsense. If Prop 50 passes on November 4th, Democrats will: Flip the house next year Impeach President Trump Reverse the Trump agenda Last year, over 6.3 million Californians voted for me in the senate race —the most ever for a Republican in our state’s history. Now, my You Gotta Believe PAC** is fighting to turn out those over 6.3 million Garvey voters to vote NO on Prop 50 and protect our independent redistricting commission. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: About the government shutdown:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
As you no doubt know, right now, Washington, D.C. is at a standstill. Instead of working together to keep the government open and protect affordable health care, Republicans have chosen to walk away from bipartisan negotiations—and the result is a government shutdown that puts all kinds of burdens on millions of Americans.
Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House. They have the power to end this shutdown. But instead of doing the hard work of governing, they’ve handed over decision-making to the White House, which is enacting laws and issuing orders based on reckless policies that raise costs, take away health care, and put families in jeopardy. And it is doing so with impunity while Congress fails to insist on accountability.
This government shutdown shows the failure of leadership and the elevation of gamesmanship. (Look no further than the memes from the President of the United States.) Now, perhaps unsurprisingly, Republicans are trying to blame Democrats for their failure to govern. Again, Republicans control the House, the Senate, and White House. They have not only the ability but the responsibility to prevent—and now to end—a government shutdown by putting a bill on the floor of the House and the Senate that has the votes to pass. It’s that simple.
I came back to Washington this week to do my job: fight for responsible government, protect health care for millions of Americans, and work toward real bipartisan solutions. I remain ready to work with anyone—Democrat or Republican—to reopen our government and make sure it works for the people it serves. I will not give in or give up. And I will not support this Administration’s abuse of power or this Congress’ failure to fight for the people, and for the principle that ours is a government of the people—not one person.
That’s what Texans in the Seventh District elected me to do, and that’s what I’ll keep doing.
Together we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

name: Breaking News Oregon
subject: President Trump is coming after Oregon
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251003em-bnor-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251003em-bnor-rs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251003em-bnor-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251003em-bnor-rs]
SUPPORT TOBIAS READ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251003em-bnor-rs]
The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against the state of Oregon and Secretary of State Tobias Read.
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.
This is unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.
Tobias has made it clear: He will not hand over Oregonians’ private data. He will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.
But let’s be clear: Tobias has gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies are trying to weaponize the federal government against him — and against every voter who values free and fair elections and privacy.
Grassroots support is Tobias’s firewall. That means us. That means you.
We aim to raise $25,000 within the next 72 hours to demonstrate our support for Tobias in the face of this abuse of power.
Can you rush a donation right now to defend Oregon, protect our elections, and have Tobias’s back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251003em-bnor-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251003em-bnor-rs]
This is not normal. This is not safe. And we cannot let Trump and his cronies get away with it.
— Breaking News OR
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Winsome
subject: Better a few hours too soon than a minute too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: Please read EVERY word carefully | Please read EVERY word carefully| | | | Please read EVERY word carefully| - This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully? Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. Let me explain my predicament: FIRST, while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one go! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW , the polls are TIED. But I cannot win with this crippling cash disadvantage. TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE, I'm facing my CRUCIAL End of Quarter Deadline Goal and I'm WAY behind! in a serious bind here, Peter. I'm over $10,000 behind pace to reach my upcoming Goal. I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother: Democrat opponent has Leftist billionaires like George Soros and Hollywood liberals backing her, but I'm 100% relying on you! can't thank you enough for reading this message all the way through, Peter. You are truly a key part of my team! Together, we will close this fundraising gap and beat my liberal opponent in November! Thanks again and may God bless you! -Winsome Earle-Sears . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596

name: IDCCA
subject: Let’s clear something up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116533368/573724909/-939470041?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_031025_FR_Shutdown2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q5Y2RhNjQtOGZhMC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cEGrrkBO2S2ZzVi39eWx9iVHM4l4C1_qveYYS9zfyjQ=)_
Let’s clear something up, folks. Republicans have a trifecta. They have a majority in the House, Senate, AND White House. They did not need a single Democratic vote in order to prevent a shutdown, and they don’t need a single Democratic vote in order to open it back up again.

They have a trifecta, and could fix this at the drop of a hat – but instead are choosing to punish the American people, and then lie to us about it.

We need to get our majority back in Congress if we want to get anything done, and that’s where you come in. name: Jason Crow
subject: Donald Trump is embarrassing our country on the world stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Donald Trump is embarrassing our country on the world stage.

At the United Nations General Assembly last week, instead of using the moment to lead and bring us closer to our allies, Trump used the opportunity to tell our allies they’re “going to hell” and called climate change the “biggest con job in the world.”

And now, after literally rolling out the red carpet for Putin just last month, he’s changed his stance on Russia’s devastating war in Ukraine because Putin bruised his ego. Trump’s flip-flopping on Putin is not only a national embarrassment, but it risks driving our national security into the ground.

America is at its best when our alliances are strong.

When we retreat and isolate ourselves from the world, it hurts our economy and makes us less safe at home. The president is failing to lead at a critical moment.

I spent my life in service to this country. I served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. My time in service taught me that responsibility and accountability is fundamental to leadership — and that starts at the top. That's not the leadership we have right now.

It’s time to elect leaders who will bring us closer to our allies, not drive us apart. Will you pitch in right now to help us build the coalition that will stand up and protect our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-oct25?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thanks for your support,

Jason

subject: In case you missed it...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**_In case you missed it..._**
Jon spoke with Pod Save America this week about the Trump administration’s boundless corruption and relentless assault on the rule of the law. They also talked about Georgia’s CRITICAL U.S. Senate race, and _what you can do to help._
[**Watch here, and then chip in $10 or whatever you can to power Jon’s reelection campaign today >>>**](https://act.electjon.com/go/2703?c0=ossoff-em-oct25-podsave.Ktds3q&refcode=em251003-1-f&t=1&akid=870%2E5691347%2Egs5PDS)

So as Trump poses this sort of radical threat to the rule of law and the Constitution — things that we have to protect —we can't just become mere guardians of the status quo. We have to be about change and reform.”_
**[WATCH NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/2703?c0=ossoff-em-oct25-podsave.Ktds3q&refcode=em251003-1-f&t=3&akid=870%2E5691347%2Egs5PDS)**

name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: We're building something special, thanks to all of you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Because of you, we met our end-of-quarter goal, Peter!

That's no small thing — the work we do is only possible because folks like you are showing up time and again when it matters most, _and I truly don’t take that for granted._

**I want you to know how deeply grateful I am.** This work has never been about me or any one person. It's always been about all of us, the common-sense leadership we're fighting for, and the future we're building together, not just here in Kentucky, but nationwide.

Now, we've got to keep the momentum going through the months ahead. The work in front of us isn't going to be without its challenges, but I believe in the strength of this team and what we've built _**together.**_

[**Will you consider chipping in whatever you can to help us get a head start on October fundraising? We have some big elections coming up in November that we need to support in this final stretch.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116533688/573725676/1089852515?ms=em25_251003_eoqty_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&refcode=em25_251003_eoqty_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&source=em25_251003_eoqty_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251003_eoqty_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=f15jYGM4MldmcADTkyQtazb6HrvTrMOLhpJ/MqImxKHSwEJ0i+sKX8W8WUSv0gEwiUm3rKwoUpuOYuQnu8I0eCyNeNrt0Zq3I0yVzQF+Q/J+QOJkPeAwZiVaacL3gDdSIY6uhLbtY4GVKJgcnBOf6XfcHd0nIRdiekjFaHVz13QNxUykJsx/snq1dMDf62PX&refcode2=e011b417-90a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTAxMWI0MTctOTBhMC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=u1hh4mBqnEqeA8PcCv4Cp1gVQuGE1A5vQ9ut1eYW6Q8=) clean_body: Because of you, we met our end-of-quarter goal, Peter! That's no small thing — the work we do is only possible because folks like you are showing up time and again when it matters most, and I truly don’t take that for granted. I want you to know how deeply grateful I am. This work has never been about me or any one person. It's always been about all of us, the common-sense leadership we're fighting for, and the future we're building together, not just here in Kentucky, but nationwide. Now, we've got to keep the momentum going through the months ahead. name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: PA FWD Party October Newsletter
body:
Shutdown the Duopoly!

|
## Shut Down the Duopoly
Did we need one more example of disfunction coming from our 2 party system? No, but disfunction seems like all our politics seem to be interested in producing these days. Our media and algorithms incentivize everyone involved to chose a tribe and demonstrate their rigid devotion. This problem has been a long time coming and nothing is going to change our national politics overnight, but the answer is right in our own communities. We need to elect people locally that believe in working together regardless of party labels, that put their loyalty to their constituents over their loyalty to their party leadership, and that put aside old grievances to focus on making our government function again. That's what we're working on. Next year we'd like to field several viable State House Candidates and victories there can lead to a more fair system for non-major party candidates overall. This is our 4th election cycle as a party and we're proud of progress we've made. We're proud of all the candidates, and elected officials we've worked with and all the volunteers that worked to support them. This year is especially important. We have a great lineup of affiliated candidates and a great opportunity to show the value our endorsement brings. **Supporting them = supporting us = supporting a system based on solutions not dysfunction.**

clean_body: Shutdown the Duopoly! | Shut Down the Duopoly Did we need one more example of disfunction coming from our 2 party system? No, but disfunction seems like all our politics seem to be interested in producing these days. Our media and algorithms incentivize everyone involved to chose a tribe and demonstrate their rigid devotion. This problem has been a long time coming and nothing is going to change our national politics overnight, but the answer is right in our own communities. We need to elect people locally that believe in working together regardless of party labels, that put their loyalty to their constituents over their loyalty to their party leadership, and that put aside old grievances to focus on making our government function again. That's what we're working on. Next year we'd like to field several viable State House Candidates and victories there can lead to a more fair system for non-major party candidates overall. This is our 4th election cycle as a party and we're proud of progress we've made. We're proud of all the candidates, and elected officials we've worked with and all the volunteers that worked to support them. This year is especially important. We have a great lineup of affiliated candidates and a great opportunity to show the value our endorsement brings. Supporting them = supporting us = supporting a system based on solutions not dysfunction. (Watch the news for another big announcement next week) \- Derry Township School Board Director \- Delaware County Controller \- Lower Macungie Township Commissioner 10/7- Candidate Forum at the Lower Macungie Community Center 10/11- Door knocking- please reach out for details \- Berks County Court of Common Pleas \- Adams County Court of Common Pleas 10/11- Christian Fyke- New Kensington City Treasurer (Write In) \- Bucks County Sheriff 10/9- You can check out the pledge they signed . Join us October 20th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You'll have things you want to talk about, We willtoo! Click below to see more Help support these events from our partner organizations. And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party -=-=- Forward Party · 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States

Hi, it's **Brigadier General (Ret.) Shawn Harris**. I led troops in combat overseas--never in my life did I think I'd have to fight to keep our military from being used against our own people here at home. But Donald Trump keeps pushing this dangerous idea--and Marjorie Taylor Greene cheers him on every step of the way. Troops should _never_ be used against American citizens. Period. I'm running for Congress to stop her, defend our Constitution, and make sure our military is never turned into a political weapon. We're building momentum, but MTG's big donors are flooding her with cash. [**Can you rush a contribution right now so we can take the fight to her? Every $15, $25, or $50 gets us closer to ending this embarrassment for our district.**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/gqNDeodQNhWc5_Fu_oa8kg~~/AAPPABA~/Z_ebVOS4WI8fy2uf8ABgS7HasP_3ykYpX7XW9lS0dHz35fhxTwTRDYpZeLsZScrbLc3vPpcfLB9RefWON6Lf3SRtb2ZrJMDNq1oOuFtGt00x_cCCp4T0lv3LCSJ-ZQssu0q6yldgJD1Die5d6IYyb4O2SbSNtZLY4jiA-6y6J6t1E50dAdmqNmgyUu_hX3ZA6j7m2s1U3CmvnklqUkdqPYS_kUyv0JaCi_du7eOvML6hJ-XeO931ebmRCp9a8G9lKVLSyigZbBjbXc3-DAlX_i-wFvYSbljJb5oKbGx582cYOqyQnOW01jpXKxC649Rl)

We're building momentum, but MTG's big donors are flooding her with cash. ~~ ~~ ~~ Thanks for your support, Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA
