name: Scott Presler
subject: Mail-in ballot numbers from New Jersey (great news)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
I need you to read every word of this email, just 3 minutes

| | | | |
---
Friend, please take 3 minutes to read every word of this email.
Last week, polling in the New Jersey’s governor’s race started to show what I’ve been seeing for a long time.**The race is officially tied.**
The polling for Republican nominee Jack Ciattarelli continued to improve this week and we are truly in the midst of a tectonic shift in New Jersey... All that’s left now is to do the hard work between now and Election Day to turn out every Republican voter in the state.
That’s where I have even more good news.**Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a far higher rate than Democrats.**
This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... So far, Democrat voters have requested more than twice as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, so they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do.
Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day.
That’s why my grassroots team is on the ground registering voters, chasing mail-in ballots, and preparing to launch our massive get out the early vote program. And if you take a look at these numbers, you know we’re making an impact.
[SPONSOR A STAFFER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhVZ/?__vbtrk=MzI0NjI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0NjI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Patriot, that’s where you come in.
**We need your help to make the difference.** By sponsoring an Early Vote Action staffer, you’re fueling the grassroots work to flip New Jersey RED in 2025.
**_[Every new voter we register, every mail-in ballot we chase down, and every Republican we get to the polls brings us one vote closer to victory](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhVZ/?__vbtrk=MzI0NjI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0NjI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I’m counting on you to deliver the resources we need to win again, you know I’ll be on the ground doing the hard work with the grassroots either way, but with your support our impact will be felt by far more voters.
**_[So, please, if you haven’t already, consider sponsoring a staffer on my grassroots action team and help us bring home victory](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhVZ/?__vbtrk=MzI0NjI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0NjI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
_In Liberty,_
**Scott Presler**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhVZ/?__vbtrk=MzI0NjI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0NjI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Voter Action Project Research
subject: Poll: Undermining trust in our elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
Please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Alleged non-citizen voting became a talking point during the 2024 elections.
However, the nonpartisan Center for Election Innovation & Research spent much of 2025 tracking state governments and their efforts across the country, and has confirmed that non-citizen voting is extremely rare and non-coordinated.
In fact, Louisiana's Republican Secretary of State Nancy Landry recently announced that a grand total of 79 possible non-citizens had voted in the state over the last 40 years. The nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice estimates that more than 74 million votes were cast in Louisiana over that time period, making this approximately 1 out of every 1 million votes cast.
Secretary of State Landry also acknowledged that she couldn’t even be sure that those 79 were actual cases of ineligible votes being cast — some may have been incorrectly identified as a result of data errors or outdated information.
We want to hear from voters in your area about this topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you believe that disproven claims about non-citizen voting discredit our elections and undermine public trust in the results?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=100325_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=100325_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100325_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100325_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

---|---|---
**[A man wearing a"Thank you Charlie Kirk" shirt threw hands](https://substack.com/redirect/c84e04bc-3e92-4e40-a33c-4d899186772a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after another man walked up and kicked him outside of the Portland ICE facility which has been the scene of several violent incidents this week.
The two men can be seen exchanging strikes before the Charlie Kirk supporter knocks the attacker to the ground with a right hook.
"Motherf***er, you done?!!" the man shouted after the knockdown.
Law enforcement swarmed in to break the men up after a few moments of combat. Both men appear to have been arrested after the incident.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9a78ae58-66a7-4e8c-99c0-1084401ef11b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[](https://substack.com/redirect/05a5545d-58d0-407c-a80c-3ee4620d751c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Breaking: Hamas agrees to release all hostages per Trump's peace deal
Hamas announced Friday it **[has agreed to release all Israeli hostages](https://substack.com/redirect/3854c1a9-cf5d-401c-b876-540b50cd8a6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --both living and dead--after "extensive consultations" based on President Trump's peace proposal, with 48 hostages believed still held in Gaza, including 20 thought to be alive.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3854c1a9-cf5d-401c-b876-540b50cd8a6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Ready for immediate negotiations** : The militant group stated it's prepared to begin negotiations immediately through mediators to finalize the details of the arrangement for ending the fighting in Gaza.
* **Trump 's deadline pressure**: The announcement came as President Trump issued a 6 p.m. Sunday deadline for Hamas to accept his 20-point peace deal unveiled Monday with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, threatening that "all hell" would break loose if Hamas refused.

* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/c926e0ba-8312-4750-8fb0-961e553901c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[RFK Jr's Capitol Hill confession ROCKS congress](https://substack.com/redirect/c926e0ba-8312-4750-8fb0-961e553901c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c926e0ba-8312-4750-8fb0-961e553901c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
Not long ago RFK Jr went toe-to-toe with senate Dems on Capitol Hill... And he was NOT holding back.
What he EXPOSED left the room in stunned silence.

**[An emerging health threat](https://substack.com/redirect/c926e0ba-8312-4750-8fb0-961e553901c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that affects over one hundred million Americans. And if you were born on or before January 1st, 1965... then you're most at risk.
Angry Democrats mocked him as a conspiracy theorist...
Just like they did when he warned about the COVID Lab leak, microplastics and corruption in the FDA...
All of which now appear to be _**100% TRUE**_.
Which is exactly why you need to hear RFK Jr's 2025 warning _**NOW**_.
You can **[get full details here now](https://substack.com/redirect/c926e0ba-8312-4750-8fb0-961e553901c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/c926e0ba-8312-4750-8fb0-961e553901c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. I'll be blunt, if you're over the age of 60 then the RFK Jr warning exposed in this video will make you angry... but it could also save your life. **[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/c926e0ba-8312-4750-8fb0-961e553901c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
* * *
# FBI severs ties with left-wing SPLC
Top conservative leaders including Moms for Liberty CEO Tina Descovich, Dr. Ben Carson, and representatives from Alliance Defending Freedom and Family Research Council sent a letter to the White House urging it to cut ties with the Southern Poverty Law Center (SPLC), leading to FBI Director Kash Patel's announcement severing all FBI relationships with the organization.
* **SPLC 's "Hate Map" controversy**: The letter argued that the SPLC has strayed from its civil rights mission and placed mainstream conservative organizations like Moms for Liberty, Alliance Defending Freedom, and Turning Point USA on its "Hate Map" alongside groups like the KKK.
* **History of violence connections** : The conservative leaders cited multiple incidents where the SPLC's designations allegedly inspired violence, including a 2012 attempted mass shooting at Family Research Council headquarters where the gunman cited SPLC's hate group designation, and a 2017 assault at Middlebury College.
* **FBI severs all ties** : Patel confirmed the FBI has terminated all partnerships with the SPLC and has no intelligence products from the group, calling it a "partisan smear machine" whose hate map has "inspired violence," coming days after the FBI also cut ties with the Anti-Defamation League for condemning critics of transgender ideology.

* * *
# Flag burning event planned at University of Virginia
A group called "Friends Against Fascism Organization" **[announced a"tailgate" event at the University of Virginia to burn American flags](https://substack.com/redirect/a489bfc2-1388-4078-8a47-5555e6974b11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while serving food and drinks, organized by law student and Navy veteran Kirk Wolff as a symbolic protest against President Trump's executive order calling for prosecution of flag burning that incites violence.
* **Legitimacy and legality questions** : The University of Virginia stated the group is not an official student organization and no approval was granted for the demonstration, with officials investigating the post's legitimacy, while the event tests Trump's executive order against the 1989 Supreme Court ruling that flag burning is protected First Amendment speech.
* **Organizer 's motivation**: Wolff, who has previously protested Trump's Gaza policies, stated the president "does not get to say what the law is" and cannot "stop free speech, expression and democracy," arguing that Trump must be reminded "his political enemies are not military enemies."

| | Peter, September wrapped with a very successful end-of-month fundraising push, thanks to you! I appreciate your support more than ever in the increasingly unprecedented times that we live in. This month, I stood with workers to call on the Trump administration for increased protections for Pennsylvania miners. I also called on Pennsylvania’s 17 House Representatives and 2 US Senators to include $1.9 billion in the new budget for the Victims of Crime Act, which helps serve nearly 150,000 Pennsylvanians each year. I will continue to fight for the Commonwealth in everything I do, including fighting for healthcare for all. I will continue to stand firm in protecting us from federal overreach and chaos. Nothing will change that. I'm ready for the fight ahead, Peter. Thank you again for your support. Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, September wrapped with a very successful end-of-month fundraising push, thanks to you! I appreciate your support more than ever in the increasingly unprecedented times that we live in. This month, I stood with workers to call on the Trump administration for increased protections for Pennsylvania miners. I also called on Pennsylvania’s 17 House Representatives and 2 US Senators to include $1.9 billion in the new budget for the Victims of Crime Act, which helps serve nearly 150,000 Pennsylvanians each year. I will continue to fight for the Commonwealth in everything I do, including fighting for healthcare for all. I will continue to stand firm in protecting us from federal overreach and chaos. Nothing will change that. I'm ready for the fight ahead, Peter. Thank you again for your support. Thank you again for your support, Peter. —Austin Davis | | = * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. name: Team Taylor
subject: This race comes down to a simple choice between two candidates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
We can’t afford to let Maria Lazar and her far-right backers buy a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251003-654&t=1&akid=658%2E294397%2EReiWrH)
Folks,
This race comes down to a simple choice between two candidates:
* Judge Chris Taylor, who has spent her life fighting for fairness, justice, and protecting people’s rights.
* Or Maria Lazar, our extreme opponent who would use the Wisconsin Supreme Court to roll back our freedoms and side with right-wing special interests.

**Whoever wins next April will serve a 10-year term.** The outcome of this race will shape the future of Wisconsin for the next _decade_ — on everything from reproductive freedom to democracy itself.
We can’t afford to let Maria Lazar and her far-right backers buy a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
**That’s why we need you with us right now.** [**Will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can to elect Judge Chris Taylor and secure our progressive majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251003_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251003-654&refcode2=658_294397_ReiWrH&akid=658%2E294397%2EReiWrH)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20251003_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20251003-654&refcode2=658_294397_ReiWrH&akid=658%2E294397%2EReiWrH)**
Every gift today fuels our people-powered campaign against right-wing special interests. Together, we can keep our courts fair, impartial, and on the side of the people.
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251003-654&t=2&refcode2=658_294397_ReiWrH&akid=658%2E294397%2EReiWrH)**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Here’s the truth
body:
This is how Dems plan to take Congress... and take down Trump again
| | | | Friend - They want chaos.
Democrats are thrilled the government just shut down - because to them, this is political gold.
**They’re using it to stall President Trump’s agenda and**** _get billions in funding for health insurance for illegal immigrants._**
They haven’t changed one a bit since the American people rejected their insane policies last November, in fact they’ve only doubled down... and make no mistake:
**_If they get power back in Congress, the very first thing they’ll do is impeach President Trump... AGAIN!_**
They’ve done it before, they’ll do it again, and they’ll do it with a smile on their faces.
But I’m fighting back.
---
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
[STAND WITH MTG – HOLD THE LINE](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
Friend, I’ve had enough of watching Schumer and his goons grind our country into the ground while pretending it’s “leadership” or “courage”.
Democrats don’t want solutions. They want collapse.
That’s why we cannot allow them to hold the seat of power again.
**_[Can I count on you to pitch in $25, $50, or even more to help me hold the line and stop the Left from taking Congress](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_?**
[CHIP IN](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
They want Trump out of the picture - for good.
But that’s not happening. Not while I’m still in this fight. Not while millions of patriots like you are standing with me.
We’ve already seen what happens when the radical Left takes power - _and we had to fight with everything we had to take it back._
**Now they’ll do anything to regain the seat of power and undo everything we fought so hard for.**
Not on my watch.
One nation under God,
| | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**

name: Keith
subject: Thank you for powering this movement
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

I can’t thank you enough for everything you’ve done to support our campaign! Because of you, we were able to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal on Tuesday.

Moments like this prove that a united grassroots team is more powerful than billionaires and corporate PACs. And in times like these, it’s never been more important to stand together and fight for what’s right.

The strength of this movement comes from you, Peter. Your support shows that when Minnesotans come together, we can take on any challenge.

Thank you again,

Keith Ellison

Attorney General Keith Ellison is the People’s Lawyer, fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

name: John Fetterman
subject: 🚨 important November election reminder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10347%2E434096%2E0epq1Q ]John Fetterman

Hi Derek – John here.

I wanted to make sure you know about the upcoming judicial elections on Nov. 4 – because the deadline to register to vote is less than 3 weeks away.

State Supreme Court races like these matter. Big time. The PA Supreme Court rules on things like redistricting, reproductive rights, election laws, trans rights, COVID rules, and environmental protections.

Flip one seat and the outcomes flip too.

⚠️ Here’s the thing: Judicial elections draw lousy turnout, but they have a huge impact. Fair maps or gerrymandered maps. Reproductive freedom or archaic abortion bans. You get the point.

It's why Elon Musk tried to buy Wisconsin's state Supreme Court race this past spring (the man dumped millions), and why we need to make sure folks in PA are registered and ready to vote on or before Election Day.

🗳️ We've got THREE seats up for election this year, with the potential to swing the current majority. Stakes don’t get bigger than that.

So here’s what you do. Make a plan. Bring a buddy. Remind your neighbor. Cast your ballot like democracy depends on it – because it does. And don’t sleep on the down-ballot races – those make a difference too. Make sure you're all set by using the buttons below:

Request your ballot

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51756?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1002&akid=10347%2E434096%2E0epq1Q

Check your voter registration

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51757?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1003&akid=10347%2E434096%2E0epq1Q

Register to vote

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51758?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1004&akid=10347%2E434096%2E0epq1Q

Find your polling place

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51759?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1005&akid=10347%2E434096%2E0epq1Q

Democracy works best when we all show up – or, as the case may be, send in our absentee ballot. 🇺🇸

John ❤️

👋 WAIT! Before you click away:

Trump and his crew are ransacking the government and playing games with people’s lives. It’s reckless. It’s cruel. And John’s not having it.

He’s raising the alarm. He’s calling them out. He’s standing up for working families in PA + across the country.

But John knows that if we want to hold extremist Republicans accountable, we have to win at the ballot box. It's as simple as that.

But it's going to take a lot to overcome the piles of cash that Trump and his rich buddies have stockpiled. John on the other hand – he's got grit, guts, and you.

If you want John to keep swinging for working people, he needs backup. Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to keep him in the fight for working folks in PA + across the country?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51760?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1006&akid=10347%2E434096%2E0epq1Q

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: null

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1007&akid=10347%2E434096%2E0epq1Q

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

# [A response to Secretary Hegseth](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=175227462&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MjI3NDYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTk1MjgyODMsImV4cCI6MTc2MjEyMDI4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTUyMzMzNTIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nZf5oX3a3kAQui-Qtvi-rES_0o0c5dupiXckQ4mDmzY)
### High military standards include the one against murder.
| | [Conor Lamb](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)
---
| Oct 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@conorlambpa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5233352&post_id=175227462&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MjI3NDYyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTUyODI4MywiZXhwIjoxNzYyMTIwMjgzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNTIzMzM1MiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lT8agvGKL4yG5DeSo5x2ybgr0dfzn7WrYmg415Z6obs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [](https://substack..Jw1e4bIq2B3sQcQLtDRIcHknqQzhqwmux0nVxP5xxWw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/conorlambpa/p/a-response-to-secretary-hegseth?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/64ef30d4-90e6-43cc-8dda-e9bd3971c322?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Again today, the Secretary of "War" posted a video of our military blowing up a boat at sea, allegedly carrying drug traffickers and illegal drugs. We are given no evidence of this, just the evidence of the killings themselves.
Consider this killing in light of Hegseth's decision to spend millions of dollars flying generals and admirals from around the world to Quantico for a TED-style [speech](https://substack.com/redirect/c89601bc-309b-4cc4-a7f7-982d60a925ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) earlier this week, which boiled down to being about shaving and physical fitness. For the non-military audience, this is how Hegseth communicated his priorities. The message received by the troops was that the physical and the superficial are what matter; the legal, the moral, and the substantive do not. Shave your face clean, and that old line from the Marines Hymn about keeping "our honor clean" can be forgotten.
Now I'm a fan of both shaving and physical fitness. One morning in Marine basic training when we woke up in the field, cold and wet, with faces covered in camouflage paint, many of us didn't shave and we were punished swiftly and severely. There was a great lesson learned that day about discipline. But it was a lesson delivered by junior officers to trainees. Much like how college students don't need to re-learn phonics, even if they need to be taught what to read or how to read more deeply, military leaders at the higher ranks don't benefit from remedial lectures about lessons learned along ago. Neither do their troops. They need leaders with a strong sense of strategic direction, and neither law nor morality can be left out of that discussion.
The killings committed by this administration are illegal, and they know it. ([This](https://substack.com/redirect/15504a91-9dca-40fb-829d-15965e6135f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a fairly balanced, non-partisan assessment of the legalities, if you are interested.) But consider who was not present in the room full of generals and admirals this week: the top military lawyers who Hegseth [fired](https://substack.com/redirect/467514fc-8060-429c-8149-1465ccb1e34f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) months ago before commissioning his personal lawyer into the military. Now, the Secretary can literally get away with murder. Every time he announces another one without even trying to defend or explain it, he reaffirms something for the military audience. It's not that there's a _new_ sheriff in town -- really, there's _no_ sheriff in town. It's frontier justice, and Trump is the boss.
But if we condition our troops to believe that, where does it lead? You don't have to be an expert to understand that My Lai, Haditha, Abu Ghraib complicated our strategic objectives and eroded the morale of our troops. The meaning of the word "morale" is "the confidence, enthusiasm, and _discipline_ of a person or group." In Marine officer training we were taught about all three of those war crimes, both from a legal perspective and a leadership perspective. The takeaway was that you can't maintain the basic discipline a military needs -- which it needs like oxygen -- if reckless force and unlicensed killing are tolerated. Things get out of control too quickly.
It's plain that Hegseth doesn't care. But he isn't pulling any triggers, and the people who are may face real consequences down the line. If you care about the troops, this should matter to you. Killing affects the people we ask to do it, and they need to know why it had to be done. It's heartbreaking to me to think that, as Hegseth carries out Trump's gruesome political agenda, he may be corrupting people who wanted to serve their country for noble reasons.
What I do during these moments is look back at the words of General (later Secretary) Jim Mattis, whose intellectual and moral influence on the Marines was massive while I was on active duty.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/27edafa9-48c8-4331-b6be-3550d972aeca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This [statement](https://substack.com/redirect/a121fe70-0c10-4496-9764-3f4dd9eb5485?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he released in the wake of the murder of George Floyd took real guts, and it is just as important for the troops to hear today, especially considering Trump's [comment](https://substack.com/redirect/f21f386c-bdd4-44a2-a2d9-cbbe0c4021d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this week (at the same Quantico event where Hegseth spoke) that the military should use American cities as training grounds. It's a how a real, battle-tested, honorable, brave military leader should talk:
> _The words "Equal Justice Under Law" are carved in the pediment of the United States Supreme Court. ... It is a wholesome and unifying demand--one that all of us should be able to get behind. We must not be distracted by a small number of lawbreakers. ... [T]ens of thousands of people of conscience ... are insisting that we live up to our values--our values as people and our values as a nation._
> _When I joined the military, some 50 years ago, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. Never did I dream that troops taking that same oath would be ordered under any circumstance to violate the Constitutional rights of their fellow citizens ... We must reject any thinking of our cities as a "battlespace" that our uniformed military is called upon to "dominate." ... It erodes the moral ground that ensures a trusted bond between men and women in uniform and the society they are sworn to protect, and of which they themselves are a part. . . . We need to unite around a common purpose. And it starts by guaranteeing that all of us are equal before the law._
> _Instructions given by the military departments to our troops before the Normandy invasion reminded soldiers that "The Nazi slogan for destroying us...was 'Divide and Conquer.' Our American answer is 'In Union there is Strength.'" We must summon that unity to surmount this crisis--confident that we are better than our politics._
> _Donald Trump is the first president in my lifetime who does not try to unite the American people --does not even pretend to try. . . . We can unite without him, drawing on the strengths inherent in our civil society. This will not be easy, as the past few days have shown, but we owe it to our fellow citizens; to past generations that bled to defend our promise; and to our children. . . . _
> _We must reject and hold accountable those in office who would make a mockery of our Constitution. At the same time, we must remember Lincoln 's "better angels," and listen to them, as we work to unite. . . . _
> _\- James Mattis_

clean_body: High military standards include the one against murder. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more High military standards include the one against murder. | | | Oct 3 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Again today, the Secretary of "War" posted a video of our military blowing up a boat at sea, allegedly carrying drug traffickers and illegal drugs. We are given no evidence of this, just the evidence of the killings themselves. Consider this killing in light of Hegseth's decision to spend millions of dollars flying generals and admirals from around the world to Quantico for a TED-style earlier this week, which boiled down to being about shaving and physical fitness. For the non-military audience, this is how Hegseth communicated his priorities. The message received by the troops was that the physical and the superficial are what matter; the legal, the moral, and the substantive do not. Shave your face clean, and that old line from the Marines Hymn about keeping "our honor clean" can be forgotten. Now I'm a fan of both shaving and physical fitness. One morning in Marine basic training when we woke up in the field, cold and wet, with faces covered in camouflage paint, many of us didn't shave and we were punished swiftly and severely. There was a great lesson learned that day about discipline. But it was a lesson delivered by junior officers to trainees. Much like how college students don't need to re-learn phonics, even if they need to be taught what to read or how to read more deeply, military leaders at the higher ranks don't benefit from remedial lectures about lessons learned along ago. Neither do their troops. They need leaders with a strong sense of strategic direction, and neither law nor morality can be left out of that discussion. The killings committed by this administration are illegal, and they know it. ( is a fairly balanced, non-partisan assessment of the legalities, if you are interested.) But consider who was not present in the room full of generals and admirals this week: the top military lawyers who Hegseth months ago before commissioning his personal lawyer into the military. Now, the Secretary can literally get away with murder. Every time he announces another one without even trying to defend or explain it, he reaffirms something for the military audience. It's not that there's a new sheriff in town -- really, there's no sheriff in town. It's frontier justice, and Trump is the boss. But if we condition our troops to believe that, where does it lead? You don't have to be an expert to understand that My Lai, Haditha, Abu Ghraib complicated our strategic objectives and eroded the morale of our troops. subject: You need to hear what James said about the shutdown:

body:
#
Peter —
There is a lot of partisan finger-pointing in Washington right now.
Republicans control the House, Senate, and White House — but they'd rather shut down the government than fund health care.
James was asked about the shutdown, and he nailed exactly why this fight matters for every family. [**Take a listen here.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/738?t=1&akid=92%2E1347274%2EUK9MvA)
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/738?t=2&akid=92%2E1347274%2EUK9MvA)
This is why we need James leading these fights in the Senate.
He knows how to win a fight and stand up for working people. He does it every day in the Texas House. And he won’t cave to mega-donors or party bosses like John Cornyn.
Too many people in Washington treat politics like a game. They’ve lost sight of the real impact policy has on people’s lives.
We need leaders who can communicate and lead with moral clarity like James — not politicians who are more concerned about scoring cheap points with their partisan base.
Team Talarico

**James is running for the U.S. Senate to take on the billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. But he can't do it alone. Flipping this seat will require the largest grassroots movement in Texas history.**

name: Team Bynum
subject: the stakes couldn’t be higher
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
While Republicans in Washington refuse to negotiate on a funding bill that represents the needs of hard working Americans, Janelle and her Democratic colleagues are ready to responsibly fund our government.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116538663/573741946/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2VkNTlkYzktYTNhMC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2osqiPWP1BY1AWsEGEbBzSj0uNIxhQqbduG_QdP5ye0=) Did you see this message from Janelle? While Republicans in Washington refuse to negotiate on a funding bill that represents the needs of hardworking Americans, Janelle and her Democratic colleagues are ready to responsibly fund our government. She’s working tirelessly to ensure Oregonians have access to the care they need when they need it, and to pass a budget that centers the American people — not billionaires. But it’s clear Republicans have no interest in bringing forward a bill that makes those issues front and center. **The stakes couldn’t be higher. Peter,

As the senior U.S. Senator from the great state of Iowa, I keep my finger on the pulse of the political landscape of our state.

Which is why I was so deeply disturbed by the shocking results of the recent special election here:

But here's the silver lining: The Democrats didn't win on the issues. They won simply because they turned out a much larger percentage of their voters than Republicans did.

In fact, that's a pattern we've been seeing all year...

Per _Cook Political Report:_ "Republicans just can't count on Trump's more peripherally-engaged voters to show up when Trump isn't on the ballot.
**[...across two House special elections...](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/2PrWnfoyXlxkeZ9jB6NrrlZ_m6BIQ-d0xVbi72M1wlHjy6gejs6s-UvfLDF8TmXqK4t9W0XUhc-az8eWxR0nG2dX1DbAyOc6NxLPre7L0trsLNKuX9PgoIc7MU7L7wldVfr32wBOXO0xK-0pHCHBsNIfaIGhuM9HjpntdYbyzFE-sdMnENkdCKYxvZ98x_n8M0qkT5TSGjDK7NvCBacmoKqjrIxM0B-veIdUKU7sFuX8YXoURzxqdQBnR9t3YWw3jpZq0rZPbmhxui_COZP4hegGZGLmKAfNBfWclUDZULJ2rZkSyHDubtnK_d-Yj0aiAdfvLorwJIMWpLbT5LQama2eLqvPrnIvhMGgbcgwwMCSRIHnrcHb1W17_Sg4Yt5eWkO1fdbiZRbKl0kTXuF4CxdfRmbLVgD-_MvcKAVshhz_Rrq9NUlhzz1gi_97TK1WZDJUatpA0fxCoj6Y2pL_SqD5gmDVRgr5g1PILYC4bFOigq-46mZAcaUZ6Li1ZWbfghA1nlM7yAo267BhebY1sBP4XLObwpDs1g0KzWi6krpOEwdBfsFc8CylHxdObxw4xyBpO7j6JnF9vAh-fEPN9VruWFwbfvHMQ9qkBVjEhFjXMOAHC6lLlTwwxfUmeLLxptPfVu2wIKuMdgUa0wt38CCd5IY8fVPkHdIpfeIRyspJVoOg8-CK-_rCQU6QnPllw-RoI8z7tXPfn4ePTJZ_R0rv0Db3WUFUwJnI0N0r1YjdwfBweodJjwvzPOky-tP0s099UWaZgVDyon7G4bG0g9jYS7LcvGtm5oRLAoNPVrr2edGda7HI6Mj8st2vKkPIRebPHsNeIhh21-_NL0HDKb2WxViIFrmR6nK2zXdyuUdBMQ2I6Y98dV6ckYdWQT95XKfDO6jY7yULzvlwBBXTTS1Pn1CisOSKi2i3GuO4o5_oBhnTC-hB_x7McTd2UJiy9ZgKoTq-fL0hY0hjL-0GNoqQaEc78I_QylS2VzG8TZ8dv9_QtGfdcSB7_beFDUmncQ/eh_lDhzi9ZvaBs6EXqktwEfm2Wpx1THP/13)** clean_body: Democrats just pulled off an upset in my home state of Iowa. Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, As the senior U.S. Senator from the great state of Iowa, I keep my finger on the pulse of the political landscape of our state. There are not many things that surprise me ... Which is why I was so deeply disturbed by the shocking results of the recent special election here: That 's right: I won't sugarcoat things - But here's the silver lining: The Democrats didn't win on the issues. They won simply because they turned out a much larger percentage of their voters than Republicans did. In fact, that's a pattern we've been seeing all year... Per Cook Political Report: "Republicans just can't count on Trump's more peripherally-engaged voters to show up when Trump isn't on the ballot. Democrats have been averaging 63% of Harris 's 2024 vote totals while If those numbers hold true for the midterms, it will be a disaster for Republicans. We could LOSE even here in Iowa and be forced to hand power in the Senate to radical, far-Left Democrats. It would truly be a nightmare scenario for our country. This all proves just how important the GOP's 2025 Voter Verification Initiative is for the midterms, Peter. We need to ensure we have a fully, 100% VERIFIED voter file so we can get every last Republican voter out to the polls! But your profile has been flagged for me as one that is still marked as Thank you, Senator Chuck Grassley | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Marcy Kaptur  (personal)
subject: A personal, heartfelt thank you
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Hi there, it’s Marcy. I wanted to reach out personally to say thank you.

We recently closed the books on our third fundraising quarter of the year, and your support is making a real difference for our campaign.

With MAGA super PACs already pouring dark money into our race, we are making it clear that our district is not for sale.

I can’t overstate how moved, humbled, and deeply grateful I am to have you with me, friend. This will be one of the tightest and most pivotal races in the nation, and meeting these deadlines is exactly what we need to do to win.

Together, I know we can continue delivering big victories for Northern Ohio, like lowering healthcare and prescription drug costs, enacting stronger environmental protections, and building an economy that finally works for workers.

Thank you so much,

Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=797c4f56-a4a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=797c4f56-a4a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4]
Follow Marcy
https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur [https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur] https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tcAb-PaXtEayL-mWUU_QGw2?unsubscribedata=WdHeYJU0GAGgbq1fJyQC4L4TuwKgFm3KwRy8LlJsD7XxCmQHuQeoQdfaJiVrd6wywBHsXB2NvpDEfEAYRG5drbGnlu1cqQJABNw3wNT6bE68AVgG2KZ%2BtzwfH%2B1E0%2BEgGtQWNllBri0Dv9CCGpEuNgozyKcSZju5sVs7VYjGNoBLk%2FwqsA%2B2Z%2B0C54bx%2B4ut59ERlYauXbKMKcSuCJja%2F%2BD8fJzyf02SWMtcl102BaqT%2BR%2FKeclUuFbpvb5f%2BIU485YF7td2PrnMSGpJf5DWsSG0g%2BfOKimysmQPoPOF6xucrjEzenXuNbKKsKIMp2kpBqSTztMCbliawemrf1jjlVtEVFe3JfASb5cVcrupT7jklbb2KW7XCXGrYNivsAuUtmHHjrXovm21WEbiUyztJmda1wPuLEtKAEvzdw8dSNY%3D] . name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Here’s what’s at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I want to take a moment to say something simple, but deeply important
I am so proud of what we’ve built together. We crushed our extended end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and I could not be more thankful for your help. But we can’t let up now. _Too much is at stake._ **We’re building a massive grassroots army to fight back against Donald Trump’s far-right regime and flip the Senate for Democrats. I’m asking you personally to be part of this critical work.** [**_Will you chip in $10 or $25 or even $50 to help me elect Democrats to take back the Senate majority and stop Trump’s attacks? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116538908/573742906/-1797184696?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.03_Thank-You_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjdjNGY1Ni1hNGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nwTGG_yvnzi_YLGZOPl4dzlrE3rnhCSPAh00JzWTog0=) | | [ CHIP IN >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116538909/573742907/-1797184696?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.03_Thank-You_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjdjNGY1Ni1hNGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nwTGG_yvnzi_YLGZOPl4dzlrE3rnhCSPAh00JzWTog0=)
---
Taking back the Senate isn’t just about winning a single election. It’s about ripping away the GOP’s unchecked power. It’s about standing in between them and their attacks on your health care, your Social Security benefits and your wallet. It’s about stopping them from forcing another government shutdown.
We can’t do that if we don’t hold blue Senate seats like Georgia, Michigan and New Hampshire. That won’t be possible without flipping key states like Ohio, North Carolina and Texas.
Democrats across the country are counting on your support to fight back against the GOP’s never-ending attacks on the air and reach voters in every corner of their states.
As DSCC Chair, I don’t take your support for granted. Every dollar you give today helps elect Democrats, hold the GOP accountable and take back the majority in 2026.
[**_Can I count on you to contribute $10, $25, $50, or whatever amount makes sense to you to power our work to flip the Senate and stop Trump’s chaos? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116538910/573742908/-1797184696?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.03_Thank-You_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjdjNGY1Ni1hNGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nwTGG_yvnzi_YLGZOPl4dzlrE3rnhCSPAh00JzWTog0=)

clean_body: I want to take a moment to say something simple, but deeply important I am so proud of what we’ve built together. We crushed our extended end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and I could not be more thankful for your help. But we can’t let up now. Too much is at stake. We’re building a massive grassroots army to fight back against Donald Trump’s far-right regime and flip the Senate for Democrats. I’m asking you personally to be part of this critical work. = | | = Taking back the Senate isn’t just about winning a single election. It’s about ripping away the GOP’s unchecked power. It’s about standing in between them and their attacks on your health care, your Social Security benefits and your wallet. It’s about stopping them from forcing another government shutdown. We can’t do that if we don’t hold blue Senate seats like Georgia, Michigan and New Hampshire. That won’t be possible without flipping key states like Ohio, North Carolina and Texas. Democrats across the country are counting on your support to fight back against the GOP’s never-ending attacks on the air and reach voters in every corner of their states. As DSCC Chair, I don’t take your support for granted. Every dollar you give today helps elect Democrats, hold the GOP accountable and take back the majority in 2026. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Here’s to the work we’ll do together in the months ahead – to take back the Senate, lift up working people and build an America that lives up to its promise. With determination, Kirsten Gillibrand * =

name: Dan Steiner
subject: What if America just quietly erased its future?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f11ea4b010e7495fb86645ed3ff634ba-9d18c6570ef243419268112632e0ecac/63)
---
# **
America’s birth rate has fallen to 1.599 . . . the lowest point in our nation’s history.
**

---
# This isn’t just a number. It’s a wake-up call.

We’re watching our nation quietly disappear one preborn child, one fearful decision, one cultural compromise at a time.

As abortion surges again, fueled by easy access to the abortion pill, and fewer families feel equipped or encouraged to bring new life into the world, we must ask: **Is this just a shift in values . . . or is it a spiritual crisis?

** At PreBorn!, we believe this is more than a cultural trend. **It’s a moment God has called us to step into. Boldly.

** Our Network Clinics are helping women in crisis find clarity, courage, and the hope of Christ. We offer **free ultrasounds** , holistic care, and gospel truth. And when a mother sees her baby on the screen:

**80% of the time, she chooses life.

** But we want to hear from you:

---
# **
**[**Do YOU believe this is a national crisis worth confronting?

** ✅ YES, this is deeply concerning
❌ NO, I’m not concerned, but life should still be protected**
**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f11ea4b010e7495fb86645ed3ff634ba-9d18c6570ef243419268112632e0ecac/63)

---
# Your voice matters.

Your opinion can make a difference.

Your action can save a life.

Let us know what you think at this link: [https://resources.preborn.com/live-poll-americas-declining-birth-rate ](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/f11ea4b010e7495fb86645ed3ff634ba-9d18c6570ef243419268112632e0ecac/63)

Dan Steiner
President, PreBorn!
---

body:
All Democrats want is for people not to get kicked off their health insurance because their premiums have skyrocketed.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116539042/573743351/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzdjNGY1Ni1hNGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=di4cg_-Agimo3qbSokzJoS0WMIfOl-ORLuupytRaE_8=&emci=576ec9b6-949f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=777c4f56-a4a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,

The Republican shutdown has started – and though the GOP will try to convince people it's not their fault, I hope that effort falls flat. The GOP controls the House, the Senate, and the Presidency and they could keep the doors open if they wanted to.
**Republicans can end this anytime.**

All Democrats want is for people not to get kicked off their health insurance because their premiums have skyrocketed. Premiums which weren’t going to skyrocket until Republicans passed the Republican Budget bill (aka the One Big Beautiful Bill Act). If Republicans have it their way, it'll be significantly harder for Americans to afford health care. _In our district alone, health care premiums could go up by $3,000 per person. _
Under the Trump Administration, we've seen MAGA Republicans play a dangerous game with the livelihoods, freedoms, and rights of the American people. Enough is enough.

I am one of the most bipartisan members of the House. I understand how to compromise. That's why I can say with certainty that the federal government has shut down due to gross mismanagement (or because it was their plan all along).

How do we stop legislation that gives tax breaks to corporations and the rich...at the expense of the middle class for whom everything is getting more expensive? How do we prevent another shutdown? **We elect more Democrats. We retake the House.**
In order to get this done, we need to come together to support Democrats running in tough races – we have three strong pick up opportunities in Pennsylvania alone! During this shutdown, a significant portion of the money I raise will go to help Democrats defeat vulnerable Republican members of Congress. **[So please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me protect our democracy and deliver progress for you and your family? Everything you donate will help me elect other Democrats to avoid future shutdowns.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116539043/573743352/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1179-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzdjNGY1Ni1hNGEwLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=di4cg_-Agimo3qbSokzJoS0WMIfOl-ORLuupytRaE_8=)**

# [The Rage in My Chest Needs Somewhere to Go](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=175234008&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MjM0MDA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk1MzA0NTEsImV4cCI6MTc2MjEyMjQ1MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.q4q0mnxxkLH7dbxOyUBMe1CQvhEUMFlB0R072tZ2vDY)
### ICE is terrorizing immigrant communities here in Chicago.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Oct 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=175234008&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MjM0MDA4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTUzMDQ1MSwiZXhwIjoxNzYyMTIyNDUxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MuLnZjHTpX9gEZZuAx10S4NwYoQ202kAYlfNi1mePwE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and pay our new Community Manager a living wage. Paid subscribers make it all possible--just $8/month if you're down to support](https://substack.com/redirect/14b19d80-e38c-46bf-91e3-8cc49530da8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): **_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/14b19d80-e38c-46bf-91e3-8cc49530da8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I'm sitting here raging about the ICE raids happening in Chicago this week. The stories are unbelievable. A couple of hours ago, I got a text alert about raids going down at schools not far from where I live, and I decided to go see for myself. Unfortunately, by the time I got there, whatever had happened was already over.
And that's after reading this morning about a Blackhawk helicopter and dozens of masked, armed federal agents raiding a Chicago apartment building in the middle of the night--cuffing everyone inside, including kids--and running checks for warrants and immigration status. Not only did ICE raid every apartment in that building, but they ransacked them--kicking down doors, destroying furniture and belongings, trashing homes. What the hell is going on in this country? How is that not fascism? How is this not state-led terror and violence?
After missing the chance for a rapid response to the text alert, I headed over to the local school where I serve as a council member to check in. Thankfully, it looked calm. Nothing seemed to have gone down there, which is good. There are a lot of kids and families at that school I worry about.
And then, when I got home, I opened up X to find a video of Kristi Noem and Benny Johnson parading around Chicago, acting tough and creating content for cheap clicks about local elected officials not granting them access to city facilities.
Truly the worst kind of people.
In the wake of all that, I've been thinking about how I've chosen to resist in this moment. I use my voice to push back against this administration and everything it's doing to vulnerable communities in this country--honestly, to all Americans who are struggling and deserve a government that gives a damn about their safety, their financial well-being, and their constitutionally protected rights and freedoms. And I'm proud of that work. I'm not minimizing it. It matters to have new voices in the Democratic Party showing up--doing things like I did today, going on Newsmax and pushing back against these ICE raids, against the shutdown, against Trump's damn tariffs. Calling out the administration and every single Republican for failing the American people. That work is valuable.
But I've been sitting with the fact that I don't use my body in this fight very often--and that has to change.
Some of that's connected to what I've done to my body over the last 20 years. For those who don't know, I used to weigh 600 pounds. I spent years trying to kill myself with food, buried in anxiety and depression. But over the last four years, I've lost over 300 pounds. I've completely changed my life. I've become a much stronger person--mentally and physically. That mental strength has been critical over these last ten brutal months. But now it's time for my physical strength to step the hell up.
I'm thinking seriously about what it looks like to be a physical presence in this resistance. And for me, it starts right here in Chicago--showing up for these families and these kids who are being harassed and terrorized by masked, unidentified ICE agents backed by a federal government that targets them because of their skin color.
And let's be clear: I have zero problem with violent criminals being removed. But I have a serious problem with good people--people who are part of this community, especially these kids--being targeted, attacked, and deported like this. They are as American as you or me. I reject the idea that they aren't.
Here's the truth: rage without action rots. It eats you alive. And I refuse to let that happen to me.
So I'm done just scrolling and stewing. I'm done just shouting into microphones and timelines. That has its place--but it's not enough. Not when helicopters are hovering over kids' bedrooms. Not when families are being torn apart in the middle of the night. Not when agents in armored vehicles are pointing guns at neighbors who did nothing but stand up and say: this isn't right.
I don't know exactly what it looks like yet. It might look like helping with school pickups and drop-offs in the morning--while juggling my own son's schedule. It might look like finding a way to get up to the Broadview Detention Center, about an hour south of where I live, and joining the protests. Maybe it means helping to bring this community with me, to document what's happening.
This is the line where words end and presence begins. I don't know yet what all that's going to look like, but I know this: the rage in my chest isn't going to rot inside me anymore. It's going to move. It's going to show up. It's going to fight back.
Because if we don't, who will?

Donald Trump is circling New Jersey.
With just weeks to go until Election Day, Trump and his allies are pouring everything into Republican Jack Ciattarelli’s campaign against Democrat Mikie Sherrill to flip New Jersey's Governor's mansion and brag that his MAGA GOP is “stronger than ever.”
And make no mistake: he smells opportunity.
🔴 Union leaders are worried about rank-and-file members drifting toward Republicans.
🔴 Black Democratic leaders are sounding the alarm about turnout and connection.
🔴 The GOP just landed their first major law enforcement union endorsement in decades.
That’s why this race is going to come down to the ground game. If we don’t turn out every voter possible, especially in communities that Democrats can’t afford to lose, Trump could get exactly the headline he wants the morning after Election Day.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e23665200/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3Yvd3pDNWdNdzlleA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEwMDM/LbmNsZXpCU3liQg/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTR0RLU2xLcGdscw/gaOBM1w/s0i23b47b2c)
| |
---
| | Dear Patriot, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e23665200/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEwMDM/LbmNsZXpCU3liQg/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTR0RLU2xLcGdscw/gaOBM1w/s9ob9874709)

name: Chip Roy
subject: It's time to draw a line in the sand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
I am ready to fight - and win - to protect our Texas way of life. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0ab594b4e0354f70b596c54b20277693&_e=W2cRzm9xprhqj3tDvOL_I9DPtl7KQhbB-7M6IdBSwad_o_RxZ6VWetlcH3cJqPUnbp_BQIs8VKdCILCnymye_mJngqGnQ4PbkQ1Dx7edc-6do1LQkv4ZhvoqYsoLQo8b5it9dZxTxgdkYMYiL3dcvG7V4ME2vmG_Bt3GFnA8bRq3Qxz3DroBwD92g7JoFI-bs1l5MoPowKb0FyzLcPIhntZR3eV-Y7NkM3rJeNzOBuyYTF9SAuBGo6EHimj0jLGzsO0iYyLGoOKgebMHtv2UXNZntz7WDPW6_ihkZK3af-Uux_b8PP5sNKdKW-vUPb9k_2K96_YPVrRxY7zz_-pSbDdahagBsXTJcJqr9wnCSznY5bn2A1bnyldZUtgRnirrmNOWw9wp2ZrIL1VDzRVOwdz7Y7B6wJjq_e2UHKWTotdL7wh2I5C-GJ_cGwhlP3smxh64z7KfcnWoGldt88Tewe9skBB9ba4YC5s7tS9XV9z8KO3pnP9RPo4DiiH3xFU6M-uZFzs1HD92MRNy03eeCHy8aP7PTttV7YFGT-vvRp0cQbb-DtttZWs7MEE-kq72u1B1RP7fmQqe2IkU6VueGgCYaI52aLb9pI2tHy4JuS6Xm_kGHLSeqcE6TmEmP8ioFcxc7QB89nh2Lw8UxSg-hNfsbsRQEb-64YDz75_cOSE%3D)
Texas is under assault, Peter.

From open-border politicians, radical leftists, and faceless foreign corporations that threaten our sovereignty, safety, and our way of life, **it's time to draw a line in the sand.**

That's why I am running for Attorney General - to protect our Texas way of life.

For so long, Texas was a conservative beacon. We have a proud tradition of rising to defend our homes, our freedoms, and our communities. Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination.

But radical Leftists moving here are threatening to turn Texas blue. Politicians like Colin Allred are flooding our state with Hollywood and Wall Street donors.

_**They will do whatever they can to turn Texas into California or New York.**_

clean_body: I am ready to fight - and win - to protect our Texas way of life. | Texas is under assault, Peter. From open-border politicians, radical leftists, and faceless foreign corporations that threaten our sovereignty, safety, and our way of life, it's time to draw a line in the sand. That's why I am running for Attorney General - to protect our Texas way of life. For so long, Texas was a conservative beacon. We have a proud tradition of rising to defend our homes, our freedoms, and our communities. Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination. But radical Leftists moving here are threatening to turn Texas blue. Politicians like Colin Allred are flooding our state with Hollywood and Wall Street donors. They will do whatever they can to turn Texas into California or New York. I will fight every single day for our God-given rights, for our families, and for the future of Texas. No more Soros-funded judges and district attorneys putting criminals on our streets. No more judge-made mandates that Texans pay for illegals in our public schools. No more communities built on Sharia law. Texas deserves an Attorney General who is unafraid to fight, unafraid to win, and unafraid to defend Texas. It was my honor to represent Texas and the 21st Congressional District in Washington and defend President Trump's America First agenda, but it's time for a new fight. subject: Claim your "We Are Charlie Kirk" wristband today
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207ny9me9hyn5aw0ekvc8v21ki41lrccxd3pkpcs8a0x9ebqz36fbb670mkwjwzosih9o8y4dzj1k0aoj9g&__stmp=t3kun3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kun3&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3d4lgqonssoh61282nzgv4gfb5zwd4uynzgt7xasb2521p75sb81fcytnofgasepcklejqdmlfkj5fixyjb6dm8jy9ym6flozpme2dcwwahhkj6obfwvh7ywzywt5r8whmjacrzz15&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kun3&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kun3&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kun3&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kun3&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3d4lgqonssoh61282nzgv4gfb5zwd4uynzgt7xasb2521p75sb81fcytnofgasepcklejqdmlfkj5fixyjb6dm8jy9ym6flozpme2dcwwahhkj6obfwvh7ywzywt5r8whmjacrzz15&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kun3&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3kun3&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
#
Powered by People doesn’t just operate in election years. We know that organizing and voter registration is crucial in the “off-years” too.
Here’s a quick look at some of our upcoming events in just the next few days:
We’re invested in building community and long-lasting connections throughout Texas. That means registering new voters on college campuses, holding in-person organizing events, and building winning coalitions.
Our organizing is powered by volunteers. Beto doesn’t take a salary from Powered by People, he offers up his time just like any other volunteer because he believes in fighting for the future that Texas and our country deserve.
[**Will you donate $3 right now to help us continue to organize in the off-year? Hi there,
I’ll cut to the chase: I’m asking you to chip in just $3 to my campaign for Attorney General. And here are three reasons why your $3 matters so much right now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=3]
1 → The Attorney General’s office is in MAGA’s hands. Jason Miyares has used his position to carry water for Trump’s allies, push an extreme agenda, and put politics ahead of the people of Virginia. Now, they’re pouring big money into his campaign to hold onto this seat.
2 → Early voting is already underway. Virginians across the state are casting their ballots as you read this, and we need to ensure that we reach as many voters as possible before they hit the polls.
3 → This race will come down to the wire. With just a few weeks until Election Day, every single dollar could be the difference between four more years of MAGA control or an Attorney General who will defend reproductive freedom, protect voting rights, and stand up for every Virginian.
Virginia should be a firewall against Trump, not a launching pad for his movement. But to take back this office, I need your help.
That’s why I’m asking: will you chip in $3 (or more if you can) today? Your support will help me defend Virginia from the MAGA agenda and deliver real leadership as Attorney General. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-update-em_q42025?amount=3]
